subject: This race is going to get more intense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
Wisconsin needs someone willing to do the hard work. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/48a6e3c87947/i-am-running-for-congress-8815033?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=039a44d8cf&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hi there,

The first month of the year has flown by. Mike had a great start in 2021. It was incredible to see the amount of support that his campaign has received but now the race is going to heat up. For Mike Van Someren to come out on top, we are going to need even more support in the upcoming weeks and months.

Mike has already hit the ground running this year. As a passionate believer in American Democracy, he has already laid out a [Common Sense Plan to Restore America’s Democracy](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=7893be6e4f&e=356c0699dd) ensuring that the people have a real say on who gets to represent them. He understands that democracy is something that must be maintained in order for it to truly work. If you are ready for a representative who wants to listen to you and work for you representing your interests in Washington, [could you set up a recurring donation of $50, $25, $10 or whatever you can give each month?](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=2ee087ae6c&e=356c0699dd) For less than the cost of your monthly Netflix subscription you can help ensure the campaign is able to communicate with voters and get the message out that there is someone that wants to listen to and work for everyday people like you.

---
| [DONATE](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=a696270e69&e=356c0699dd "DONATE")
---
| This campaign needs your help to get us over that finish line. Every single contribution will go to securing the necessary resources to make sure we have a winning campaign.

Thank you so much for your support,

**Team Mike Van Someren for Congress**
---

---

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: re: SCOTUS vacancy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
It is time to put a Black woman on the Supreme Court.

#
Friends -
News outlets reported today that Justice Stephen Breyer is expected to retire from the Supreme Court. I want to first thank him for his important service to our nation.
A vacancy on the Supreme Court *also* gives President Biden an opportunity to make good on his promise to nominate a Black woman to the Supreme Court.
As the former Chief Justice of North Carolina's Supreme Court, I firmly believe that our Supreme Court — like all institutions — must reflect the diversity of our nation.
[**We must be loud and clear on this. Please sign my petition to tell President Biden to make good on his promise to nominate a Black woman to fill this vacancy on the Supreme Court and to tell Senate Democrats to confirm her without delay or interference from Republicans.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/SCOTUS_vacancy_em/?source=em220126-2-t1&refcode2=308.357359.1gV4fk&t=2&akid=308%2E357359%2E1gV4fk)
This vacancy shows again that it is crucially important we elect a Senator who will thoughtfully consider the qualifications of any nominee and how their decisions will impact the lives of North Carolinians, from voting rights to reproductive freedom and other critical issues.
[**Please add your voice to mine by signing our petition calling on President Biden to nominate and the U.S. Senate to confirm a Black woman to the Supreme Court. We know that Republicans will try to stop this progress, but we cannot be deterred.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/SCOTUS_vacancy_em/?source=em220126-2-t1&refcode2=308.357359.1gV4fk&t=3&akid=308%2E357359%2E1gV4fk)
\- Cheri Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/SCOTUS_vacancy_em/?source=em220126-2-t1&refcode2=308.357359.1gV4fk&t=4&akid=308%2E357359%2E1gV4fk)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=308%2E357359%2E1gV4fk). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=308%2E357359%2E1gV4fk). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=308_357359_1gV4fk&akid=308%2E357359%2E1gV4fk) today to help us make history.

name: Nick4WA HQ
subject: Help us reach our goal this month
body:
We only have a few days left and we need your help!

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_to_action_jan_26_22&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, **[Today the Nick4WA HQ Team is simply asking you to help us reach our goal and donate $25 right now.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvgzq9eVrS2wcfSTH4cualz9-2oDm4pLLWhIMuRQlNR1aUBkQvZu7KsnQQIWTdO8Yw&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_to_action_jan_26_22&n=2)** This campaign is about you, Nicolaus is running to give you a voice, to ensure that the working class has someone to represent them in the Senate. Nicolaus is ready to get to work and we know so many of you are so ready for change. It's time to get the corporations out of our government, it's time to end the no-representation politics. **[We need you to donate $25 right now so we can push forward and keep moving.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvgzq9eVrS2wcfSTH4cualzMxJ4y32W9Aos1kHjMbxOdzA-qh2oYNPWACzgpDW_xZM&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=call_to_action_jan_26_22&n=3)** Nicolaus is fighting for you and that is what we need. This past Sunday Nicolaus was out canvassing and talking to people just like you and so many people are ready for change, and so many believe their voice is not heard. It got us thinking... _Did we LOSE you to the radical Left?_

name: Alex Padilla
subject: re: SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
this issue is too important to wait.
#

Friends —
In June of last year, Mitch McConnell told a conservative radio host that it’s “highly unlikely” he would allow President Biden to fill a Supreme Court vacancy if he becomes Majority Leader.
So now that news outlets are reporting that Justice Breyer will soon retire from the Supreme Court, President Biden **must** nominate a replacement — and they must be confirmed by the Senate — as soon as possible.
The brutal truth is, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back the Senate and block any nominees President Biden would put forward.
So it’s incredibly important that we get this done before November. We cannot let Republicans block another nominee and further stack the Supreme Court with conservatives.
_As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I will do everything in my power to confirm President Biden’s nominee as quickly as possible._
I look forward to casting my vote, but we need all Senate Democrats united in getting this done as quickly as possible, so I am asking you today to stand with me in calling on President Biden and the Senate to treat this imminent Supreme Court vacancy with the urgency it requires.
[**Add your name: Call on President Biden and the Senate to appoint and confirm a new nominee to the Supreme Court as quickly as possible. We must act now — this issue is too important to wait.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scotus-petition-em-jan22/?source=em220126-1-15&refcode2=603.159979.4a9kf_&akid=603%2E159979%2E4a9kf_)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scotus-petition-em-jan22/?source=em220126-1-15&refcode2=603.159979.4a9kf_&akid=603%2E159979%2E4a9kf_)**
Thank you so much for standing with me in this important moment.
\- Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=603%2E159979%2E4a9kf_)

name: Morgan Harper's iPhone
subject: Quick note before I’m called back to prep time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
I really need your help on this.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220126-570-footer-ak&t=2&akid=570%2E90090%2EMOb7Kr)
I’m in between debate run-throughs and practice and I wanted to come to you directly.
I’ll be honest, I’m trying to keep my mind on my debate prep, but our fundraising is falling behind and we’re still $8,223 away from reaching our monthly goal.
[**_With 1 day left until I take the debate stage, it would mean a lot if I could see our fundraising go up before tomorrow so I can focus all my energy on the debate. Can I count on your contribution of $5_****?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/22587?t=3&akid=570%2E90090%2EMOb7Kr)

— Morgan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Loudoun schools to parents: “Your kids come second.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=fc83fb200d&u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=b25ceeea13)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Friend,

Did you see what is happening in Loudoun County?

_**“She said you should really take your children home and they’re not going to be allowed to go to class,” said Mrs. Platt. “They will go to the library; they will be separated in the library.”**_[Source: 7News](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f7c31509ec&e=fc83fb200d)
So, you’re telling me, a sexual predator was allowed to switch schools and continue to receive in-person instruction, but if you send your kid to school without a mask they’re stuck in the library?
It sounds like the Loudoun County School system is so warped that maskless kids are treated worse than sexual predators. This is the type of woke hogwash that has parents pushing back.
---
| [Join Team Lawson today & join the fight against the WOKE Left](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=5829c579c6&e=fc83fb200d "Join Team Lawson today & join the fight against the WOKE Left")
---
| _**“We followed (former Gov.) Northam and his executive orders,” said another parent whose son didn’t wear a mask into the school building. “Nobody retaliated; nobody rose up. We followed it because we are law-abiding citizens and we’re doing the same thing now. We’re following the new governor’s orders. You cannot pick and choose because of the letter behind the governor’s name. And I feel like that’s what (Loudoun County Superintendent Scott) Ziegler and the school board are doing.”**_ [Source: WTOP](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=57403c4c41&e=fc83fb200d)
Scott Ziegler is more concerned about masks than combating sexual misconduct in our schools. It’s unbelievable I have to write this, but it’s true.
**_“We wanted our kids to have that choice,” one mother told WTOP. “And we fully support those that feel safest in a mask, also those that feel that the mask is impeding their learning or their health. So we’re just out here in support of their decision and their choice.”_** [Source: WTOP](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=e982d83749&e=fc83fb200d)
There is no question that every family has a right to make their own decision as to what is best for their family – masking or no masking. But students should not be punished for following the Governor’s order. Parents have stood up and will not be silenced by bureaucrats who put woke agendas first and our children last.
Best,
****

Jeanine Lawson
Congressional Candidate, VA10
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, Did you see what is happening in Loudoun County? “She said you should really take your children home and they’re not going to be allowed to go to class,” said Mrs. Platt. “They will go to the library; they will be separated in the library.” So, you’re telling me, a sexual predator was allowed to switch schools and continue to receive in-person instruction, but if you send your kid to school without a mask they’re stuck in the library? It sounds like the Loudoun County School system is so warped that maskless kids are treated worse than sexual predators. This is the type of woke hogwash that has parents pushing back. | "Join Team Lawson today & join the fight against the WOKE Left" | “We followed (former Gov.) Northam and his executive orders,” said another parent whose son didn’t wear a mask into the school building. “Nobody retaliated; nobody rose up. We followed it because we are law-abiding citizens and we’re doing the same thing now. We’re following the new governor’s orders. You cannot pick and choose because of the letter behind the governor’s name. And I feel like that’s what (Loudoun County Superintendent Scott) Ziegler and the school board are doing.” Scott Ziegler is more concerned about masks than combating sexual misconduct in our schools. It’s unbelievable I have to write this, but it’s true. “We wanted our kids to have that choice,” one mother told WTOP. “And we fully support those that feel safest in a mask, also those that feel that the mask is impeding their learning or their health. So we’re just out here in support of their decision and their choice.” There is no question that every family has a right to make their own decision as to what is best for their family – masking or no masking. But students should not be punished for following the Governor’s order. Parents have stood up and will not be silenced by bureaucrats who put woke agendas first and our children last. Best, ** Jeanine Lawson Congressional Candidate, VA10 | "Sign up to volunteer today for Team Lawson" | | "Paid for by Lawson for Congress" | | | | | | | | | | | jeaninelawson.com | | Copyright © 2022 Lawson for Congress, All rights reserved. Peter, Our opponent just announced his 4th quarter fundraising report, and it was significantly more than what we raised. In fact, it was the most raised by any senate candidate in the whole country! While there was little doubt that national Democrats and special interests would pour money into our opponent's bank account last quarter, it was an eye-popping amount. Over 90% of the money came from outside Georgia! We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap. Our opponent is the top fundraiser in the entire U.S. Senate, so any gift you make will help us chip away at his financial advantage and grow our media fund. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia race, which is a dead heat according to recent polling. I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. While I know money certainly isn't everything in campaigns, it's still important for candidates who are running in statewide races like we are. This race is a TOSS-UP. Because of the cash advantage our opponent holds over us, he will be able to start reaching out to voters sooner than we can via TV ads, radio ads, social media ads, direct mail and billboards. We can't let our opponent get too much of a head start in advertising, so we've got to close the fundraising gap. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kerry=20McQuisten=20for=20Oregon?=
subject: Former gubernatorial candidate Jim Huggins endorsement!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7dd1dbecca81/were-off-and-running-6721366?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
| |
# Jim Huggins has endorsed me!
_Tonight, I’m honored to announce that former Republican gubernatorial candidate Jim Huggins has endorsed me. I’m thrilled that Jim is on my team! He brings a wealth of skills and knowledge to the table - and makes this effort stronger for Oregon. We both want to save our state from eight more years of one-party Democrat rule. Oregon is worth fighting for, and working together is what it takes! Thank you, Jim!_

**His statement in full:**

Many of you have asked who I would endorse for the Republican nomination for Governor. This is not a decision I take lightly and is one I've given careful consideration. Some of you have stated your opinions on the various candidates--and I appreciate that. To some degree I've considered your input...and I hope you'll consider mine. Please keep in mind I've learned quite a lot about the candidates having spent more time with most of them than the average voter will. This has given me some unique insight into the people and who they are--insight most don't have. So I would ask that you read through the following, do your own research, and make a decision for yourself. This is my recommendation but the actual vote it yours. No matter what, we need a solid statesman-like leader that can WIN the general election. The following is the text from the Press Release we issued earlier today:

SALEM, OR (January 26, 2022) – In a statement released today, former gubernatorial candidate Jim Huggins endorsed Baker City Mayor Kerry McQuisten for Governor of Oregon. Huggins noted “Over the past year as a gubernatorial candidate, I’ve learned that the issues citizens in the Portland metro area care about are the same ones people care about statewide. The 2022 election will not be a ‘Portland/Tri-County area versus the rest of the state.’ Portland’s riots, violent crime, ineffective law enforcement, homelessness, and education are key issues throughout our state.”

“I believe these issues are uniting the voters because they deeply impact our businesses, especially small businesses, and our economic security.” Huggins stated. He went on to say, “Our state is in a crisis that’s been in the making for a number of election cycles. With each election, the lack of Republican leadership has become more obvious as has the overreaching power grab by the Democrats, most recently led by Kate Brown. Our families, especially our children, and our safety are under attack. Left unchecked, Kate Brown v2.0 (whether it’s Kotec, Reid, or Johnson) will result in ruin for all of us.

“To avoid that, this state needs real leadership. Not political leadership. Real leadership. Someone with courage and is a true statesman who will stand up and do the right thing regardless of the attacks. This is what our citizens want and need. This is what will defeat the liberal democrats in November.”

Huggins believes Kerry McQuisten is that leader we need. He noted, “She may not be as well known along the “I-5 corridor” as other candidates, but that will soon change. She is clearly the most capable and experienced leader for Oregon. As the Mayor of Baker City, she has proven herself to be a calm and dedicated professional; a genuine leader throughout Eastern Oregon. **She consistently presents herself in a statesman-like manner with the interests of Oregon as her sole focus. She has already garnered national media attention and, in my opinion, could easily become the next Kristi Noem among US Governors.** This would be a welcome change to the leadership image our state has on the national stage today.”
.
Huggins added ,**“Having shared the stage with many of the candidates as well as talking with them behind the scenes, I’ve gained valuable insight...who they are and what’s motivating them to run for the high office of Oregon’s Chief Executive Officer.** What I can say is that the remaining field of gubernatorial candidates has one leader left in the race who is able to address the real issues facing this state and the 3.9 million citizens who call Oregon home.”

Huggins concluded, “I encourage everyone to support Kerry McQuisten in her bid to become our next Governor. She needs your vote in the Primary on May 17th and again in the General Election on November 8th. **She’s the only candidate who can renew the tarnished image of our state’s political circus."**

**“Real leaders are hard to find. Let’s show the nation we found one“.** # # #
More endorsements are listed on my web site **[www.kerrymcquisten.com.](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=af8f03f961&e=ae2345792a)**
_**Please join my fight to save Oregon today! **_ Your donations help me stop my wealthy opposition from buying the primary with a flood of TV ads.**Your dollars will be effectively spent.** I'm willing to do all the work it takes, but I can't do it without you.

Yours,
_Kerry_

clean_body: | | | | | | | Jim Huggins has endorsed me! Tonight, I’m honored to announce that former Republican gubernatorial candidate Jim Huggins has endorsed me. I’m thrilled that Jim is on my team! He brings a wealth of skills and knowledge to the table - and makes this effort stronger for Oregon. We both want to save our state from eight more years of one-party Democrat rule. Oregon is worth fighting for, and working together is what it takes! Thank you, Jim! His statement in full: Many of you have asked who I would endorse for the Republican nomination for Governor. This is not a decision I take lightly and is one I've given careful consideration. Some of you have stated your opinions on the various candidates--and I appreciate that. To some degree I've considered your input...and I hope you'll consider mine. Please keep in mind I've learned quite a lot about the candidates having spent more time with most of them than the average voter will. This has given me some unique insight into the people and who they are--insight most don't have. So I would ask that you read through the following, do your own research, and make a decision for yourself. This is my recommendation but the actual vote it yours. No matter what, we need a solid statesman-like leader that can WIN the general election. The following is the text from the Press Release we issued earlier today: SALEM, OR (January 26, 2022) – In a statement released today, former gubernatorial candidate Jim Huggins endorsed Baker City Mayor Kerry McQuisten for Governor of Oregon. Huggins noted “Over the past year as a gubernatorial candidate, I’ve learned that the issues citizens in the Portland metro area care about are the same ones people care about statewide. The 2022 election will not be a ‘Portland/Tri-County area versus the rest of the state.’ Portland’s riots, violent crime, ineffective law enforcement, homelessness, and education are key issues throughout our state.” “I believe these issues are uniting the voters because they deeply impact our businesses, especially small businesses, and our economic security.” Huggins stated. He went on to say, “Our state is in a crisis that’s been in the making for a number of election cycles. With each election, the lack of Republican leadership has become more obvious as has the overreaching power grab by the Democrats, most recently led by Kate Brown. Our families, especially our children, and our safety are under attack. Left unchecked, Kate Brown v2.0 (whether it’s Kotec, Reid, or Johnson) will result in ruin for all of us. “To avoid that, this state needs real leadership. Not political leadership. Real leadership. Someone with courage and is a true statesman who will stand up and do the right thing regardless of the attacks. This is what our citizens want and need. This is what will defeat the liberal democrats in November.” Huggins believes Kerry McQuisten is that leader we need. He noted, “She may not be as well known along the “I-5 corridor” as other candidates, but that will soon change. She is clearly the most capable and experienced leader for Oregon. As the Mayor of Baker City, she has proven herself to be a calm and dedicated professional; a genuine leader throughout Eastern Oregon. She consistently presents herself in a statesman-like manner with the interests of Oregon as her sole focus. She has already garnered national media attention and, in my opinion, could easily become the next Kristi Noem among US Governors. This would be a welcome change to the leadership image our state has on the national stage today.” . Huggins added ,“Having shared the stage with many of the candidates as well as talking with them behind the scenes, I’ve gained valuable insight...who they are and what’s motivating them to run for the high office of Oregon’s Chief Executive Officer. What I can say is that the remaining field of gubernatorial candidates has one leader left in the race who is able to address the real issues facing this state and the 3.9 million citizens who call Oregon home.” Huggins concluded, “I encourage everyone to support Kerry McQuisten in her bid to become our next Governor. She needs your vote in the Primary on May 17th and again in the General Election on November 8th. She’s the only candidate who can renew the tarnished image of our state’s political circus." “Real leaders are hard to find. Let’s show the nation we found one“. # # # More endorsements are listed on my web site Please join my fight to save Oregon today! name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: The media is attacking me again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Help me get my story out! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d298789d18&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
The media is once again turning up the heat on me. They are attacking me on election integrity. They know the truth and they are terrified of me because I speak truth to their BIG LIE!

[**They know if they want to keep Democrats in power – they CANNOT let me win!**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e4963b4a26&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d809ab63b5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This Yahoo broadside against my campaign starts as follows:

_On Jan. 6, 2021, Arizona lawmaker Mark Finchem — a practiced peddler of nutso conspiracy theories — stood outside the US Capitol and tweeted his support for the mob seeking to overturn Joe Biden's victory ._

_"What happens when the People feel they have been ignored, and Congress refuses to acknowledge rampant fraud," Finchem wrote, pushing the election lie hatched in the Trump White House._

_Returning home, Finchem not only supported the supposed "audit" of Biden's 2020 win in Arizona but also found a way to make a fast buck off the Maricopa County clown show by selling T-shirts reading "#Proveit."_

_So naturally, when it came time to support a candidate to oversee future Arizona elections, Donald Trump went all-in for Finchem, who marinates in QAnon Kool-Aid when he isn't grifting or hanging out with members of the right-wing Oath Keepers militia._

_"A man who is tough and smart and loves our country," the former president said at his recent rally in the Arizona desert._

_It would be funny if it weren't so scary._

_Finchem, a four-term member of the Arizona House, is part of a larger effort by Trump and his acolytes to hijack the country's election machinery by putting loyalists in charge of the balloting in key states._

You know what? The same-old lies and tricks are starting to tick me off.

This is what gaslighting America looks like, folks. They spend an entire election cycle trying to rob Donald Trump of victory, and then spend the next election cycle that Republicans want to steal elections?

**How dumb do they think we are?**

_But you know what? If every time they are attacking me, they are also attacking President Trump, then I know I’m standing on the right side of history!_

The only reason they are attacking me like this is because I am one of the only candidates for Secretary of State across the nation who is GETTING WORK DONE!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6fe3b7ef21&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I have been leading the vanguard of the grassroots election integrity movement all year:
* I paid out of pocket for election integrity hearings in Maricopa when no one else would listen
* I pioneered and developed currency grade ballots and waterproofing.
* I have advanced election integrity nationwide, working with countless state legislators.
* I have been a vocal supporter of President Trump, speaking at his rallies.
* I have introduced legislation, through H.B. 2023 to increase election transparency at the ballot box!

**The media has shown their true colors.**

**_They hate nothing more than President Trump and Election Integrity! And they know I’m the face of it!_**

When you see them get the knives out and start attacking me, you know that’s because we are making tremendous progress, and the Left is getting SCARED.

[_Help us keep the Left SCARED of Election Integrity by donating TODAY! Together we can win Arizona in 2022 and make Arizona the gold standard for Election Integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=68e1e66a48&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Anything you can give helps tremendously!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=88cfe9b67e&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3a09d1680b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=376c10ee91&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=657a97a53e&e=44b8c466b0).

clean_body: Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. | $9.8 million is an incredible sum of money to raise in three short months. If we're going to pull off a win in November, we MUST close the gap financially. Peter, Our opponent just announced his 4th quarter fundraising report, and it was significantly more than what we raised. In fact, it was the most raised by any senate candidate in the whole country! While there was little doubt that national Democrats and special interests would pour money into our opponent's bank account last quarter, it was an eye-popping amount. Over 90% of the money came from outside Georgia! We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap. Our opponent is the top fundraiser in the entire U.S. Senate, so any gift you make will help us chip away at his financial advantage and grow our media fund. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia race, which is a dead heat according to recent polling. I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. While I know money certainly isn't everything in campaigns, it's still important for candidates who are running in statewide races like we are. This race is a TOSS-UP. Because of the cash advantage our opponent holds over us, he will be able to start reaching out to voters sooner than we can via TV ads, radio ads, social media ads, direct mail and billboards. We can't let our opponent get too much of a head start in advertising, so we've got to close the fundraising gap. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Steve Chabot
subject: 10 Things Republicans are FOR
body:
Joe Biden dared Republicans... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [10 Things Republicans are FOR](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-j/)
In a speech recently, Joe Biden dared Republicans to give him one thing they were FOR. In this week's blog, I give him 10. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Party of Racism](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-d/)
Joe Biden gave a speech last week essentially alleging that Republicans are a bunch of racists. You can read my thoughts in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Democrats Want to Make it Easy to Cheat](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-u/)
Democrats currently control the House, the Senate, and the Presidency. They'd like to keep their stranglehold on power by passing "election reform" which would unfairly advantage them in future elections. Are they going to be able to do it? You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [2022 - We're Off!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trkdtte-kujkulhluu-n/)
We're less than a week into the new year. The Bengals are looking good, but a lot of other things, not so much. You can read about it in this week's blog. name: Don Huffines
subject: [FOX NEWS] Tucker Carlson & I had a chat...
body:
don’t California our Texas
don't California our Texas [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qllhtdd-yuddtktydi-r/) Fellow Patriot, Texas is at risk of becoming another California . . . _. . . and we 're losing the culture war because we don't have courageous Conservative leadership._ [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qllhtdd-yuddtktydi-y/) I told Tucker Carlson last night that we're in a battle for the soul of Texas and for the soul of our nation._**[Will you rush a grassroots donation of $5, $10, $20, $50, or even $100 so that we can save Texas?](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qllhtdd-yuddtktydi-j/)**_ In Texas, we lost control of the universities decades ago, and now we've got public schools teaching socialism to our children. They're teaching critical race theory, transgender ideologies, and putting pornography in our school libraries -- not to mention the drag queen story hours! The left has taken over the major cities in Texas and our border is a mess . . ._. . . we 've got 2 million illegals pouring over our border in the last 12 months! __**This will change under a Huffines administration.**__**[So please, rush a grassroots donation of $5, $10, $20, $50, or even $100 so that we can save Texas TODAY.](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qllhtdd-yuddtktydi-t/)**_ With courageous leadership, we can return God and virtue to the public square, reignite the promise of our founding, and make Texas the lighthouse of liberty again.For Texas, [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qllhtdd-yuddtktydi-i/) **Don Huffines for Governor****An Actual Republican** [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qllhtdd-yuddtktydi-d/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qllhtdd-yuddtktydi-h/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qllhtdd-yuddtktydi-o/) | _Copyright(C) 2021 Don Huffines Campaign, All rights reserved._You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. **Our Mailing Address:**
Don Huffines Campaign
P.O. Box 177185
Irving, TX 75017 [Preferences](https://dhcampaign.updatemyprofile.com/t-qllhtdd-17329976-yuddtktydi-b) | [Unsubscribe](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-u-qllhtdd-yuddtktydi-n/)

name: Team Gaynor
subject: We're in the lead!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GAYNOR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We’re blowing our competition out of the water, but we are going to need your help to keep it up!
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcddn2h6719hus0lqrhe86m1mhpb012j8tjedsf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9ge8oj4c3h2bs)
---
| Friend, **We’re blowing our competition out of the water, but we are going to need your help to keep it up!** We’ve out-raised each of our primary opponents to the point where we have more than all of them combined!**However, that doesn’t mean we can start getting complacent!**

While we might be beating our opponents in current fundraising,**this election is far from over, and things can change quickly.** We are sure that big money donors will be jumping in soon to even the playing field, which is why we want your help to push Steve past the line and into his new role as Arizona Governor!
---
| | [PITCH IN TO WIDEN THE GAP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7j4sd03a8d8q55aukf29tlabpignc73e6qg8kr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9ge8oj4c3h2bs "PITCH IN TO WIDEN THE GAP")
---
| The issues facing our state are incredible.** Our border has been opened to cartels and human traffickers, Arizonans are being forced out of their jobs, and our rights and liberties are under threat from Radical Leftist politicians! **

Steve knows that these policies have no place in Arizona, and he will fight against them each and every day.** He believes that our state can only succeed when our leaders respect our rights, work in our best interest, and stand for our conservative values!**
---
| [CHIP IN $10 TO JOIN THE FIGHT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi65hqp1atrefjna90ok7q3b4oitu8ckkg8f80qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9ge8oj4c3h2bs "CHIP IN $10 TO JOIN THE FIGHT")
---

---
| [CHIP IN $50 TO JOIN THE FIGHT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhr0j8kjtsdgq5dqk6qr6uk0ipm4q1nf17qehero_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9ge8oj4c3h2bs "CHIP IN $50 TO JOIN THE FIGHT")
---
| [CHIP IN $100 TO JOIN THE FIGHT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z360quvcel656l3kn24js6vv6t66b5pp42fp8n5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9ge8oj4c3h2bs "CHIP IN $100 TO JOIN THE FIGHT")
---
| [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztrhhm4sj0o9gn1dojbs1109ga6eme5nmp16e29g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9ge8oj4c3h2bs "CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
| While we may be in the lead now, we’ve got a long campaign ahead. The Left is sure to be pulling out all the stops to saddle Arizona with a Radical Democrat governor,**[_which is why it’s crucial you pitch in and join Steve’s fight today!_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl6u4a9030d2lu4gm2jerrjsksopnoqusjrvlgco_rp22sh2s8i66ob6c9ge8oj4c3h2bs)**
---
| **For Arizona,**
_Team Gaynor_

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Help Kickstart Senator Johnson’s Re-Election Campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson announced he will run for re-election to the U.S. Senate. Help kickstart his campaign today so we can maintain a strong, conservative voice in Wisconsin and the Senate.
Hi Peter,**Senator Ron Johnson announced that he would run for re-election to the U.S. Senate.**

This is great news for America and a blow to Schumer, Biden, and Pelosi. Ron has spent his time in Congress fighting for smaller government, personal responsibility, and common sense solutions. For those of us that believe government is usually the problem, not the solution, this is fantastic news. [Help Ron Get a Head Start](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zirqud-idtjvlhlh-r/) Apart from being a friend, he is a strong ally and supporter of conservative principles. He has been at the forefront of attacks from the Democrats and far left because they are threatened by his leadership and experience tackling problems big and small. **With the Senate currently split, and Vice President Harris holding the tie-breaking vote, it is critical that we take control of the Senate in 2022. We cannot afford to let the Democrats control Congress.****[Donate now to help show Ron you stand with him and reject the far left's agenda. Your help is greatly appreciated.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zirqud-idtjvlhlh-y/)**Thank you,Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Ron Fight Back Against the Far Left](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zirqud-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zirqud-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zirqud-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zirqud-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zirqud-l-b) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8496%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=DQ3uJUhrPnpyjYb1MPD8EQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12399%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vp%2bwBc%2fIFIZ2RQuGv5hjvg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12390%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6mHva9bxEuV%2b1J%2brwDGF8Q&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c12390%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6mHva9bxEuV%2b1J%2brwDGF8Q&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8496%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=DQ3uJUhrPnpyjYb1MPD8EQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8496%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=DQ3uJUhrPnpyjYb1MPD8EQ&sysid=1)

January 27th, 2022 | We'd like to get you a rare, “street legal” Italian switchblade that’s legal in all 50 states. And we’d like to give it to you for Free. This blade is normally $110. But if you give permission to ship it to your doorstep you can get this blade for $0.00 (just cover S&H). . The reason this knife is being given away is simple... As part of a special brand awareness promotion, our buddies have set aside a small handful of these knives for anyone who wants an ultra-sharp blade to carry in this dangerous world. Fair warning... this special deal ends as soon as they run out of stock. We have no idea how many are left... but considering this is a $110 knife being given away for Free... we can’t imagine there are many left over. . Thank You. P.S. There’s a possibility this kind of knife could be outlawed - especially if the wrong people find out this company got away with making legal switchblades. | Friend, **We’re blowing our competition out of the water, but we are going to need your help to keep it up!** We’ve out-raised each of our primary opponents to the point where we have more than all of them combined!**However, that doesn’t mean we can start getting complacent!**

While we might be beating our opponents in current fundraising,**this election is far from over, and things can change quickly.** We are sure that big money donors will be jumping in soon to even the playing field, which is why we want your help to push Steve past the line and into his new role as Arizona Governor!

| The issues facing our state are incredible.** Our border has been opened to cartels and human traffickers, Arizonans are being forced out of their jobs, and our rights and liberties are under threat from Radical Leftist politicians! **

Steve knows that these policies have no place in Arizona, and he will fight against them each and every day.** He believes that our state can only succeed when our leaders respect our rights, work in our best interest, and stand for our conservative values!**

name: Charlie Crist
subject: re: US Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
I wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t so important. |
---

| | Friend: This is a big deal, and I wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t so important. A seat has just opened up on the US Supreme Court, which means the future of voting rights, reproductive rights, and more are at stake. We know the GOP will do everything in their power to block President Biden’s nominee.

With so much on the line, it’s more essential than ever that we defeat Ron DeSantis and elect a Democratic governor in Florida. But winning this election won’t be easy.

Next Monday marks our first end-of-month deadline of 2022, and the stakes have never been higher. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41105108/327364829/-1064097418?refcode=20220127_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Q2MjExZS03MzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGrVoxbTFJbZUn2OEPT-tzmO5QL_Aug5ygXnDqx3594=)
---
**[Can I count on you to make an immediate donation to my campaign today to help us reach our $100,000 goal before Monday’s deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41105109/327364830/-1064097418?refcode=20220127_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Q2MjExZS03MzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGrVoxbTFJbZUn2OEPT-tzmO5QL_Aug5ygXnDqx3594=)**

The US Supreme Court isn’t the only place where high stakes decisions are made by the slimmest of margins.

Right here in Florida, Ron DeSantis won his election by less than half a point in 2018, and **_Meet the Press_ recently predicted that the election in November could be determined by a gust of wind.** Every single month matters and could make the difference between victory and defeat.

Right now, far-right billionaires from outside Florida are spending big to prop up Governor DeSantis because they’re scared he could actually lose. But **if we fall short of our goals, their spending could overwhelm us** on Election Day.

I don’t know about you, but I don’t want to look back after November and wonder if we could’ve avoided defeat if we had just pushed a little harder earlier in January. The funds we raise right now are laying the foundation for our efforts this fall, and we can’t afford to miss _any_ of our goals if we want to defeat Governor DeSantis.

**Together, I know we can get the job done. So friend, please: Pitch in anything you can right now to help us reach our $100,000 end-of-month goal and WIN on Election Day.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41105110/327364831/-1064097418?express_lane=true&refcode=20220127_f_1_ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Q2MjExZS03MzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGrVoxbTFJbZUn2OEPT-tzmO5QL_Aug5ygXnDqx3594=)
[DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41105111/327364832/-1064097418?express_lane=true&refcode=20220127_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Q2MjExZS03MzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGrVoxbTFJbZUn2OEPT-tzmO5QL_Aug5ygXnDqx3594=)

[OTHER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41105114/327364835/-1064097418?refcode=20220127_f_1_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2Q2MjExZS03MzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGrVoxbTFJbZUn2OEPT-tzmO5QL_Aug5ygXnDqx3594=)

Charlie

clean_body: I wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t so important. | | | Friend: This is a big deal, and I wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t so important. A seat has just opened up on the US Supreme Court, which means the future of voting rights, reproductive rights, and more are at stake. We know the GOP will do everything in their power to block President Biden’s nominee. With so much on the line, it’s more essential than ever that we defeat Ron DeSantis and elect a Democratic governor in Florida. But winning this election won’t be easy. Next Monday marks our first end-of-month deadline of 2022, and the stakes have never been higher. | = = The US Supreme Court isn’t the only place where high stakes decisions are made by the slimmest of margins. Right here in Florida, Ron DeSantis won his election by less than half a point in 2018, and Meet the Press recently predicted that the election in November could be determined by a gust of wind. Every single month matters and could make the difference between victory and defeat. Right now, far-right billionaires from outside Florida are spending big to prop up Governor DeSantis because they’re scared he could actually lose. But if we fall short of our goals, their spending could overwhelm us on Election Day. I don’t know about you, but I don’t want to look back after November and wonder if we could’ve avoided defeat if we had just pushed a little harder earlier in January. The funds we raise right now are laying the foundation for our efforts this fall, and we can’t afford to miss any of our goals if we want to defeat Governor DeSantis. Together, I know we can get the job done. So friend, please: Pitch in anything you can right now to help us reach our $100,000 end-of-month goal and WIN on Election Day. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, friend. Florida is counting on us. Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

body:

& nbsp; &nb; sp;

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hey – last chance here. I sent you your last email from Congressman Jim Jordan. Did you miss it again?

Totally okay – **[I set aside one copy of his signed book just for you, Fellow Conservative!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8lb-4qqlpo0/ "I set aside one copy of his signed book just for you, Fellow Conservative!")**

We’re running low on stock with very few copies left. I’m afraid if you don’t claim yours by midnight tonight, you might not get a copy! Fellow Conservative, I’d hate to see that happen.

Please, make sure you claim your limited-edition SIGNED copy of Jim Jordan’s must-read book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

Thanks again,
Sue

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 23rd, 2022
Subject: FWD: FWD: Do What You Said You Would Do

Hey, it’s Sue.

Jim Jordan emailed you TWICE, and we still haven’t heard from you. Did you not see his email? If you missed it, that’s okay! I’ve gone ahead and forwarded his previous correspondence to you.

**[If you want your own SIGNED copy of his latest book, make sure you reserve yours NOW>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8lc-4qqlpo1/ "If you want your own SIGNED copy of his latest book, make sure you reserve yours NOW>>>")**

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8ld-4qqlpo2/ "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

Thanks,
Sue

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 22, 2022
Subject: FWD: Do What You Said You Would Do

*****URGENT MESSAGE FROM CONGRESSMAN JIM JORDAN*****
Fellow Conservative, this is really important. My team reached out to let me know that we’re in LOW SUPPLY of signed books. **[If you want your own signed copy of _Do What You Said You Would Do_ , you need to act NOW!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8le-4qqlpo3/ "If you want your own signed copy of Do What You Said You Would Do, you need to act NOW!")**

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8lf-4qqlpo4/ "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

If you wait even FIVE minutes, we could be totally sold out. Please, don’t wait any longer. Make sure to reserve your copy IMMEDIATELY!

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 21, 2022
Subject: Do What You Said You Would Do

Fellow Conservative, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one – so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8lg-4qqlpo5/ "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8lh-4qqlpo6/)
---

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump’s successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That’s the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8li-4qqlpo7/ "By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi’s targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8lj-4qqlpo8/ "So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8lk-4qqlpo9/ "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8ll-4qqlpo0/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8lm-4qqlpo1/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3djp9-1v8ln-4qqlpo2/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

body:
Peter, I spent my birthday eight years ago defending our Second Amendment rights against Piers Morgan on fake news CNN. Our constitutional...
| [ ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/MW-cQGkLwPTW7Vqjym1rhVNlW5VG-2S4DQGt-N7jDJvp3lLBmV1-WJV7CgBdXW3_BXCn2RDYWnW7shPBW6zch-fN7WKS8s7XGVWW8d7zgD82mSd1W3nwDVt3p4PQFW26y_9N1PzrjmW3Z7PHJ952BcdVrydh14jB9TrVd8bHz7B4D73W8fgy7P4ND3PvW86Xjym65CS2CW4lGlQQ3LJBcMW1ZBsgw5MkN1lW15PC-j22DZPyW5hXBf54bfZQQW3HLgjs5GrNhSW5YQfVJ76QMN8W2bw_8s76-cHQW1pP_BH3zdCT3W2JY7fm5c2kdWW2Kvsv55L-yYrN2v7D52bRVV83fSY1)
---
# Peter,

I spent my birthday eight years ago defending our Second Amendment rights against Piers Morgan on fake news CNN... Our constitutional right to bear arms is still heavily debated by the radical Democrats and spineless RINOs in Washington today. [Click here to watch me DESTROY Piers Morgan on CNN ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/MW-cQGkLwPTW7Vqjym1rhVNlW5VG-2S4DQGt-N7jDJvp3lLBmV1-WJV7CgLtBW81V7bd2PjLndW47ZNW88MnV6cW4rfn5C4PjmD1W516ymc3XQKyXW92g8_K4B30bSW6V139T5tjNBvMJz9lmc-pKZW3VJd8K6_5HqBW98d45q3320tmW5Vv3Jn83s-z5W1rj4cf33kmF1W83MndR8jwzSwW7n2dJC4dhF68N8dnQq05VwjZW36y1vy27XLw5W1gd_dq66CVYPV5nQ8p2xfvZvW4DMW_J6GShT2W3j8pcx1Nb0vRW25ycZ51xS2WhW8DgDg22f4Y2kW1SBVXX2gXNZ8353M1)
---
[ ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/MW-cQGkLwPTW7Vqjym1rhVNlW5VG-2S4DQGt-N7jDJvp3lLBmV1-WJV7CgJ84W4q-44X30JLd7VGqqMd2qWWZVW6GXYf4830YVMN1ZbZxtX5n5vW65ydHl7zqvW4W5ZnQwk3XM-bLW4sfyxJ8NmS_-W2TpL4J6sYg9XVQCQZp6FflgdN2gFKPXRF6LtW20zs7S7ynVtvW3vY4r11qDzvmW9jGY3D92mJ8lW62DNZB5vfs_YW4wwfQy8_xtvCW5lvf051bTclwW7VzLgD8GCk8WN2lsFG93J7SMW1P0S_c17Nxp-W5PJ6G63Rtmj2W49tZp82ZmLlhW6wNv7n4KZBt537xj1)
---
I introduced the Piers Morgan Constitutional Right to Keep and Bear Arms Without Infringement Act in Oklahoma in 2014 to allow anyone in Oklahoma to exercise their Second Amendment rights without government-issued permit... I kept in the fight pushing for our rights to be restored until Constitutional Carry was finally signed into law in 2019, despite Republican leadership opposition. [Our right to bear arms is under attack by the corrupt political establishment in Washington, Peter. Click here to make a donation to my campaign and show your support for our Second Amendment rights >>>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/MW-cQGkLwPTW7Vqjym1rhVNlW5VG-2S4DQGt-N7jDJvp3lLBmV1-WJV7CgQ-VW8kh1NV2qWwpMW8znCn63TJNY5W7dH6tj4Br2g9W4jmYJS6t5pg9W5PNNjh7WNtJbW8jddzl1jVqP2VvK1Ft7z_nypW4J5Q8t8ZjGvWVmdrBL11m3qMN72kwvXlfB7cW1K7F-33H5JGHW6Q4wS02PdjfgW48glzx416GrWW48ZVtf7zzxgVW69wyZl72pJLGW16ZG_g8_1vfyW7BJ4j72r2HhTW3rVHRg2L2fVhW6pT-Lj2mTg3bN1SnrD2hX0V8W1YvpV-2q1mKZW6Rm4366-cw_l3pcx1) This year alone, I have filed numerous bills protecting our Second Amendment rights including these FIVE main bills: SB 1330 \- Nullifies any federal attempt to enforce red flag laws on Oklahoma citizens SB 1346 \- States that any personal firearm, accessory, or ammunition manufactured in Oklahoma that remains exclusively within our borders is not subject to federal law, taxation, regulation, or registration SB 1327 \- Prohibits federal regulation or registration of suppressors manufactured within the state of Oklahoma SB 1341 \- Prevents public money from being used in any way to advocate for gun control SB 1329 \- Allows any person in lawful possession of a valid handgun license to carry inside the state Capitol [Our fight for our Second Amendment rights is just getting started, Peter. body:

Peter, I’m looking at our fundraising books right now to check on our progress this month, and I see that if we’re going to hit our **$25,000** online fundraising goal for January, we need to step it up. You see, our fundraising numbers have dipped in recent days — not too badly, but enough that we have a bit of ground to make up. **We’re currently $9,821 away from our goal.** **[Can you help me out so I can let Roy know we’re getting back on track? Click here to give whatever you can>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41106771/327369039/435245919?refcode=ea.53c1ce6b-797f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.53c1ce6b-797f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MxY2U2Yi03OTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Swu3Gzmp8hEuARs31kH47tfjsvWUPfRo7PS8hvCv0F0=)** | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41106772/327369040/435245919?refcode=ea.53c1ce6b-797f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.53c1ce6b-797f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MxY2U2Yi03OTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Swu3Gzmp8hEuARs31kH47tfjsvWUPfRo7PS8hvCv0F0=)

**Peter, you know how high the stakes are.**
Thanks to the GOP’s ultra-partisan gerrymandering, North Carolina Democrats are at a disadvantage going into the November elections — one we can only overcome by working together.

clean_body: Fundraising has slowed in recent days. | Peter, I’m looking at our fundraising books right now to check on our progress this month, and I see that if we’re going to hit our $25,000 online fundraising goal for January, we need to step it up. You see, our fundraising numbers have dipped in recent days — not too badly, but enough that we have a bit of ground to make up. We’re currently $9,821 away from our goal. = | = Peter, you know how high the stakes are. Thanks to the GOP’s ultra-partisan gerrymandering, North Carolina Democrats are at a disadvantage going into the November elections — one we can only overcome by working together. Peter,

The Republican attacks on our democracy that we are seeing across the country are completely unacceptable, and the federal government must step in and stop them.

Last week, we all saw that the Senate failed to change the filibuster to allow legislation dealing with voting rights to pass on a simple majority vote. **Every single republican, including Ron Johnson, voted against making the much-needed change.**

Let’s be clear on our path forward. I strongly support both the _John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ and the _For the People Act_. And I would have been one more vote to change the rules to allow these pieces of legislation to pass with a 51 vote majority.

**[It’s important now more than ever to keep pressure on our federal government to pass election reform and voting rights legislation, and that’s why I’m asking you to sign my petition today to urge them to act>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41107958/327374014/-1967777044?refcode=EM_PET_220127vote_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDc1ZThjZS03YTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6560Vw-2H18665WMj4iTO9Jpzfk27xBRLNlcZq8ge2U=&emci=dcd89be5-ba7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=cd75e8ce-7a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=18659600)** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41107959/327374015/-1967777044?refcode=EM_PET_220127vote_N_AL_90DA_5_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDc1ZThjZS03YTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6560Vw-2H18665WMj4iTO9Jpzfk27xBRLNlcZq8ge2U=&emci=dcd89be5-ba7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=cd75e8ce-7a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=18659600)** There’s too much at stake to sit by because our country and our democracy depend on our collective action.

Thank you,

Alex Lasry

name: Alert (LeftAction)
subject: This could be the most important race in 2022
body:
This year's most critical race?
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/ryanoptout1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
|
---
| | | Hi Friend, Our friends at Tim Ryan for Senate want to talk to you about their efforts to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue and expand the Democratic majority. Given that _The Wall Street Journal_ called Tim Ryan “Democrats’ most important 2022 candidate,” we'd strongly encourage you to hear what they have to say. **[If you do not want to receive communications from them, simply click on this link, and you will not receive them.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49a5e0f6-7906-4fde-bef3-0b2fede4fb2a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Otherwise, you will receive emails, but always have the opportunity to unsubscribe immediately. Here are 5 reasons why Tim Ryan can beat the odds and win this battleground race:
1. **Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring, leaving Ohio’s Senate seat wide open.** Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive primary (already spending more than $40 million!)—giving Democrats a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue.
2. **Ohio already has a Democratic Senator.** Sherrod Brown has proven that Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first.
3. **A recent poll has Tim within single digits of his Republican opponents.** The more Tim can get his message out, the more voters he can win over.
4. **Working people are fed up and ready for change.** Ohioans are sick of handouts for big corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed.
5. **Grassroots momentum**. While Tim’s rich Republican opponents are propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, his campaign is powered by thousands of folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time.

If you want to be part of the team that flips this seat blue and expands the Senate majority, stay tuned for more Team Ryan updates! Thanks for your support, and for fighting back! Sincerely, The Left Action team
###

name: Dan Farough
subject: This is what it’s going to take to win
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hello, friend, I’m Dan Farough, Jocelyn’s campaign manager.
I joined this campaign, because just like you, I believe that this year democracy is going to be on the ballot in Michigan. But fortunately, Jocelyn is going to be on the ballot too, and that means our future is in good hands.

There are going to be a lot of challengers and interest groups who will attack Jocelyn and make up a bunch of lies about her record as Secretary of State. They’re already spending a heck of a lot of money doing it, too. But this campaign will win because we have the truth and the trust of Michigan voters on our side. That’s more powerful than whatever money the Devos family and their extremist allies will throw at us.

This campaign will be powered by individuals who understand the importance of this political moment and who are willing to put policy differences aside for the greater good of our state and country. We win when we harness this political movement. We win with your support, friend.

Grassroots donations are key to spreading this campaign and Jocelyn’s successful pro-democracy record across the state. Will you make a donation today and support this critical effort?

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=welcome3]
I’m looking forward to staying in touch with updates throughout the campaign. Thanks for your time and your dedication to our state.

Dan Farough
Campaign Manager

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: What Does “The Good Life” Look Like?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsNMadiHCN

We teach at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider
concepts such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character,
and justice when we...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osNMadiHCN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend of Knowledge,

Are you
struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find
myself in that position as well. It's part of the human condition
to be faced with difficult situations, choices, and people.

We teach
at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider concepts
such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character, and
justice when we face difficult questions.

In the
Nicomachean Ethics-the first book written on how best to
live-Aristotle argues that human happiness chiefly depends upon a
person's character, which is formed by making good choices.

But good
choices don't come naturally. That's why every student at
Hillsdale studies Aristotle. In fact, understanding Aristotle is
so important to living a good life that we've produced our online
course, "Introduction to Aristotle's Ethics: How to Lead a Good
Life."

And now
you can own the course on DVD, along with a special Hillsdale
College edition of Aristotle's Nicomachean Ethics, for personal
study.

You'll
not only study what Aristotle says about the good life with
Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, but you will also
explore ways to put this knowledge to work.

The DVD
gives you a seat at the table in a seminar-style class like those
here on campus, and you'll read from the same book the students
are in the course.

In
addition to the topics I've already mentioned, the course focuses
on subjects including:

Aristotle's Politics and the Nature of Man

Deliberation and Choice

Practical Judgment

Contemplation and Action

Just
consider what Rebecca, a free online course student, recently
said: "I have learned [through the Aristotle course] that every
choice we make etches into our soul."

Make a
good choice, and watch a special preview video of the course.
Then reserve your DVD and book today using this secure link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/aristotle-dvd-book-offer

After
watching the preview, if you're struggling with a thorny
question, I hope you'll join Rebecca and many others by reserving
your DVD of "Introduction to Aristotle's Ethics" along with its
companion book today. Quantities of the DVD and book are limited,
so don't wait too long to decide.

Warm
regards,

Bill Gray
Class of
2001
Associate
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College
