subject: Dr. Bob tours Northern Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Good morning Dr. Bob Lorinser will be making his way across the state. Here is the schedule. **Dr. Bob Lorinser visiting voters at multiple town halls throughout Northern Michigan to gather petition signatures** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110428/327381680/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=) [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110429/327381681/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110430/327381682/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=) [DONATE FOR INTEGRITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110431/327381683/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=) NORTHERN, Mich. – Dr. Bob Lorinser, Democratic candidate for U.S. Congress in Michigan's 1st District (MI01), is holding daily town halls throughout the week to meet with voters and answer questions from constituents in Northern Michigan. According to the campaign, Lorinser's town halls are open to the public "regardless of their political party," and the invitation extends to any elector in MI01 who wishes to ask questions. Over six days, Lorinser will host events in Traverse City, Lake City, East Tawas, Houghton Lake, Standish, Cheboygan, and Harrisville. "Republican, Democrat, Libertarian, Green, people with any or no political party affiliation are more than welcome to participate," said Dr. Lorinser. "I'm not running to represent a select group of people. I'm running for Congress to represent and advocate for all Northern Michiganders and Yoopers." The campaign scheduled stops in several counties new to the district. Wexford, Roscommon, Ogemaw, Iosco, and Arenac are now part of MI01 under Michigan's new redistricting plan. Lorinser's campaign says one of the primary purposes of the aggressive schedule is to ensure the representation of every county on the candidate’s nominating petitions. Each event will take COVID-19 precautions and have volunteers outside the venues for a "drive-thru" petition campaign. "As a candidate, these are also important because voters should know for whom they're voting," said Dr. Lorinser. "Our nation is so divided; Red versus blue, Republican versus Democrat. I hope Northern Michigan can join me in rising above the rhetoric to show the nation we can come together, and have civil discourse about the issues." Lorinser's main priorities are economic viability, small businesses and jobs, affordable and accessible education, environmental sustainability, and universal healthcare. Dr. Bob Lorinser is unopposed in the Democratic primary. He is poised to face Rep. Jack Bergman in November's general midterm election. Lorinser says the lack of constituent engagement is one of his main critiques of his opponent, as he notes Rep. Bergman hasn't held a town hall since 2017. By Feb. 5, Lorinser will have conducted six open forum town halls, with another tour scheduled for the Upper Peninsula in March. EVENT SCHEDULE [Details and registration information are available at [votedrbob.com/events](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110432/327381684/687116130?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=&emci=b0d4a77e-7d7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6359f74b-7f7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427)] Grand Traverse Town Hall Sun. Jan 30, 2:00 PM – 3:30 PM Traverse City Event Center 738 S Garfield Ave, Traverse City, MI Grand Traverse Fundraiser Sun. Jan 30, 5:00 PM – 7:00 PM Mimi's Taqueria, 2070 M-137, Interlochen, MI Missaukee County Town Hall Mon. Jan 31, 6:30 PM – 7:30 PM Missaukee County Annex Building 105 S Canal St, Lake City, MI Iosco County Town Hall Tues. Feb 1, 6:30 PM – 8:00 PM East Tawas Community Center 760 Newman St, East Tawas, MI Roscommon County Town Hall Wed. Feb 2, 6:00 PM – 7:30 PM Northern Center 7784 Stone School Rd, Houghton Lake, MI Arenac County Town Hall Thurs. Feb 3, 6:00 PM – 7:30 PM Arenac Community Center Standish, 583 E Cedar St, Standish, MI Cheboygan County Town Hall Fri. Feb 4, 6:00 PM – 7:30 PM Hive North 100 S Main St, Cheboygan, MI Alcona County Meet & Greet Sat. Feb 5, 8:30 AM – 11:30 AM Alcona Coffee 110 E Main St, Harrisville, MI # # # About Dr. Bob Lorinser Dr. Bob Lorinser is running for U.S. Congress in Michigan’s First District. After Dr. Bob Lorinser received three advanced degrees (Medical Doctor, Masters of Social Work, and Masters in Public Health), he worked as a social worker in a Veteran’s Affairs Hospital and as a resident doctor with the Indian Health Service, serving the Navajo Nation. In 1989, he found his home in Michigan’s First District, where he practiced family medicine for three decades. Dr. Bob joined the U.S. Department of State’s Foreign Services in 2011 to serve as a diplomat and Regional Medical Officer. The Lorinsers served the United States for ten years, with tours in Pakistan, South Korea, Afghanistan, Morocco, and Iraq.
When he returned to the states in 2020, Dr. Bob offered his services as Medical Director of Marquette County Health Department, where he is currently employed. For more information, visit [VoteDrBob.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110433/327381687/-1488711019?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=&emci=b0d4a77e-7d7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6359f74b-7f7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=15167427). [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110434/327381693/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=) [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110435/327381698/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110436/327381709/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41110437/327381743/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=) [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b0d4a77e-7d7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/6359f74b-7f7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzU5Zjc0Yi03ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTDo0F5IwhFsQHmzoyZEnEiquk5gHvFf-loZqVIselM=&id=116937387) PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Being “woke” is making us broke
body:
Schools should be a place for learning, but the Left is using schools as a testing ground for their radical propaganda.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CZCSj4RjefT4NESa1vi1PufC3KB4g_x2QIzru7QPgY34nEs0c01fhjolie0YLOVu3vUI3P-9w77HEq4Scb1flhPgRSJRCre4-LLg09S-GS3es6hszpW8oNtRoVgaUF4EEN2EsJs9mnxoDJA-OdJWZFFuqJUPirZBYeZXbInaL3qJ3rL-6RYgVg==&c=vVaWQcuj03-uGVbm_6u1AW_BV8Hmg4ngE1ufO-d_F7iV_J7NZxsFpw==&ch=026xS4Z6H3pmY70X-eD-VzIZ9un6hXXzLXPUGBKUT0iYsUB3fK4LYQ==)
---
| Peter,
Schools should be a place for learning, but the Left is using schools as a testing ground for their radical propaganda.
Our children are being subject to government meddling in their education in the name of "diversity." Instead of gaining the knowledge and skills they need to succeed, the government wants to make sure our children are "woke." They deserve an education without indoctrination.
[You can help me shut down the divisive Marxist-based curriculum being taught in public schools. Click here to donate to our campaign and help me stop wokeness in school >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CZCSj4RjefT4NESa1vi1PufC3KB4g_x2QIzru7QPgY34nEs0c01fhjolie0YLOVu3vUI3P-9w77HEq4Scb1flhPgRSJRCre4-LLg09S-GS3es6hszpW8oNtRoVgaUF4EEN2EsJs9mnxoDJA-OdJWZFFuqJUPirZBYeZXbInaL3qJ3rL-6RYgVg==&c=vVaWQcuj03-uGVbm_6u1AW_BV8Hmg4ngE1ufO-d_F7iV_J7NZxsFpw==&ch=026xS4Z6H3pmY70X-eD-VzIZ9un6hXXzLXPUGBKUT0iYsUB3fK4LYQ==)
Not only is it a waste of time, but it is also an incredible waste of taxpayer money.
The Biden administration already spent nearly $2,000,000 on this nonsense and he is preparing to spend millions more. Do you really want your tax dollars going towards Critical Race Theory programs?
Peter, this is another example of why we cannot afford two more years of Biden's agenda. Luckily, you can put a stop to his agenda this year.
All you have to do is help me win this election.
This Senate race is the most important one in the country. When I win, conservatives will take back the Senate and can stop Biden's radical agenda.
Will you donate to our campaign and put an end to his tyranny? Click below to show your support.

name: Rushern Baker
subject: A different approach
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
Running a grassroots campaign requires a fundamentally different fundraising approach. Instead of the bulk of our money coming from corporations and political organizations, it’s ALL coming from the people of Maryland.
While I am beyond thrilled with the level of support we’ve received so far, there is still a long road ahead of us. Both Nancy and I are cautiously optimistic, but we won’t let our guard down.
Which is why I’m reaching out with a very specific request today – recurring donations.
Knowing in advance what resources we’ll have available for things like yard signs, digital ads, bumper stickers etc. allows us to be strategic and smart. You’d be surprised how much of a difference a $5, $10, or $25 monthly recurring donation can make towards our efforts. Will you help us out? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

name: Team Nikki
subject: DeSantis won’t protect our environment
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
But Nikki will

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41114295/327398350/-1987745334?refcode=eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjFlOGFlMy04MzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tF0-ZL2kiSFuAg-X0WsQNxbE3HU90jt0DajGag4fPQ=) Peter, This week, in the lead-up to our January fundraising deadline, the Gainesville Sun published an op-ed that says it all — laying out _clear_ (and damning) differences between Nikki and Ron DeSantis on climate action. Here’s what the column had to say: **** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41114296/327398351/-1987745334?refcode=eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjFlOGFlMy04MzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9tF0-ZL2kiSFuAg-X0WsQNxbE3HU90jt0DajGag4fPQ=) In other words, DeSantis and his GOP allies aren’t willing to take the bold action needed to prevent the climate crisis — to protect our communities, create a sustainable economy, ensure access to clean drinking water, and keep Floridians safe. Instead, they’ll stick with half measures until it’s too late. Nikki is ready to take aggressive action _on day one_ to protect our state from climate change. She’s ready to pursue climate policies that boost our economy, help small businesses, protect Florida workers and families, and preserve our environment for generations to come. **But first, she needs your help, Peter. name: Nan Whaley
subject: A request for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
The way I’m going to win is with the support of people like you who want the same change in Ohio as I do.

Team,
I got into the race for governor because Ohio deserves better than the corrupt crew who has been in charge of our state for the past 30 years. In the nine months I’ve been running, I’ve seen our governor favor his political cronies over his constituents more times than I can count.
We CAN take back this state. We can make it work for all of us. But we need to work hard to turn our vision for Ohio into a reality.
**[We’ve set a goal to raise $25,000 before our reporting deadline on January 31st. Chip in $5 towards our goal today and become a Founding 2022 Donor to our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41114465/327399106/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220127_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTA5ZTEyZC04NDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N0eiwEOfMdejmW0JV201gjDi46CME5RVKFdsBKjKWYM=)**
I learned the importance of hard work from an early age. My dad was a union auto worker, and when he lost his job, my mom went to work at the laundromat behind our house to help make ends meet.
I fell in love with my adopted home city of Dayton in college. I met my husband there, and we made Dayton our home. I had the honor of serving as mayor for eight years.
We’ve had our challenges in Dayton. We’ve faced down disgusting KKK rallies, devastating tornadoes, and a mass shooting. But we did it together, and if we can tackle those hardships and come out the other side of them, then rooting out corruption in Columbus will be a breeze.
**But, I don’t have personal wealth I can pour into this race like my opponents. I’m the only candidate who isn’t a millionaire. The way I’m going to win is with the support of people like you who want the same change in Ohio as I do.**
**[We have to report how much we raise by January 1. Contribute $5 this week to become a Founding 2022 donor and reach our $25,000 goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41114466/327399114/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220127_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTA5ZTEyZC04NDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N0eiwEOfMdejmW0JV201gjDi46CME5RVKFdsBKjKWYM=)**
Onward,
Nan

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41114467/327399122/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220127_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTA5ZTEyZC04NDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N0eiwEOfMdejmW0JV201gjDi46CME5RVKFdsBKjKWYM=)**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
---

PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401

| When we meet adversity, we have two choices: We can choose to lay down and give in OR we can choose to FIGHT. Peter, it's imperative that we face our obstacles head-on and never, ever back down. Despite the liberal machine constantly attacking Florida and the Governor, there's too much on the line for us to ever give an inch. Our friends, families, children and the future of our state depend on us standing strong and fighting back. [To showcase our message of standing strong and fighting back, I am proud to announce the launch of our "Never. Ever. Back. name: Mary Vought
subject: Two Votes Away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats tried to blow up
the Senate to pass their absurd, unconstitutional takeover of
America's elections. Thankfully, they fell two votes short.
President Biden stumped for the bill by accusing
everyone who disagreed with him of supporting "Jim Crow 2.0." Now
he's saying that without passing this law, the 2022 elections
won't be legitimate!
For a year, Democrats and the media have said it's
treason to question an election, but now Joe Biden is saying the
rules of the 2020 election were unfair - just as Donald Trump has
been saying all along!
Even the Democrats admit now: the system is broken!
The question now is: who will reform our election
laws? Liberals, who want to throw open the doors to even more
fraud? Or conservatives who seek to close the dangerous gaps in
our election laws?
Please join us in electing strong conservatives who
won't stop fighting until we secure our elections!
If we want free, fair, and credible elections, we
need:
✓ A requirement that voters be citizens;✓ A
requirement that voters provide ID and proof of residency;✓
Clean voter rolls;✓ A ban on ballot drop boxes and voter
harvesting; and,✓ To allow absentee voting only for those who
truly need it.
If we do that, our elections will immediately have

will corrode the foundations of our constitutional system.

These conservatives will be there for every fight -

name: Haley
subject: Maryland employees deserve better
body:
Good jobs are a justice issue – they're the key to securing a brighter future for all working families. That's why Tom wanted me to make sure you were able to see his job's plan as the next Governor of Maryland.
#

Team,

Good jobs are a justice issue – they're the key to securing a brighter future for all working families. That's why Tom wanted me to make sure you were able to see his job's plan as the next Governor of Maryland.

All over the country, workers are leaving jobs because the companies and agencies they work for refuse to adapt and make them a priority. Maryland needs to lead by example – **and if we can't do it in the public sector, then we can't do it at all.**

Tom has spent his career as a civil rights attorney, an active participant in the labor movement, and a champion for worker's rights in Maryland and in President Obama's cabinet. He'll continue to fight for workers as Maryland's next Governor, **but he can't get there without your support.**

**_[Will you donate $3 or more to help him create jobs and fight for worker's rights in Annapolis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41115505/327403627/-934731961?refcode=bpi-em-20220126-employment-kicker-ND&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDRlYzBmZC04NTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ao7qK9-5wKvHP2YG0I-QKc59B647Beq7GGa20U9snq0=)_**
******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41115507/327403629/-934731961?refcode=bpi-em-20220126-employment-kicker-ND&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDRlYzBmZC04NTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ao7qK9-5wKvHP2YG0I-QKc59B647Beq7GGa20U9snq0=)******
Thank you, and please keep reading if you want to learn more about Tom's job plan.

– Haley
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Tom Perez
Date: January 26, 2022
Subject: Team, workers need to get paid. PERIOD.

Team,

America's workforce is changing significantly across the country, and Maryland is no exception.

Last week, a member of Maryland's own Governor’s Council confessed during a public hearing that his agency is critically understaffed, affecting their ability to do their jobs. This is not the first time we've heard something like this from Annapolis.**For the past _seven years_ , the vital services that protect Maryland's environment, economy, and the health and safety of our residents have been compromised because of inadequate staffing and underpayment.**

Maryland workers inside the government and out deserve to have competitive salaries and adequate support to do their jobs, and right now **executive leadership in Annapolis just isn't getting the job done.**

I've fought for workers my entire career – first, as Maryland Labor Secretary where we passed the nation's first living wage law, and again as U.S. Labor Secretary. **I know what it takes to make government work for the hardworking people of Maryland, and I have a plan to get us there.**

**_[Click here to read my plan to ensure Maryland’s workers not only have access to good-paying, secure jobs but the in-demand skills and resources they need to thrive.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41115509/327403631/-1759000473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDRlYzBmZC04NTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ao7qK9-5wKvHP2YG0I-QKc59B647Beq7GGa20U9snq0=&emci=c9ce4688-e57e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=844ec0fd-857f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)_**
******[READ MY JOBS PLAN HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41115511/327403633/-1759000473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDRlYzBmZC04NTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ao7qK9-5wKvHP2YG0I-QKc59B647Beq7GGa20U9snq0=&emci=c9ce4688-e57e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=844ec0fd-857f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)******
Team, I've stood shoulder to shoulder with the labor movement, fighting for worker's rights my entire career in public service. I can tell you that creating jobs, ensuring our government prioritizes workers inside and out of public service, and strengthening Maryland's economy won't happen overnight.

I'm running for governor because I believe Maryland has a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build a future where workers know they have a voice and the government finally works for the people it serves.

**_[Take a look at my plan to learn more about how we’ll get there – together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41115513/327403635/-1759000473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDRlYzBmZC04NTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ao7qK9-5wKvHP2YG0I-QKc59B647Beq7GGa20U9snq0=&emci=c9ce4688-e57e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=844ec0fd-857f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=14684837)_**
Thank you,

Tom

P.S. We can shape our emerging workforce into one that listens to workers and creates good paying jobs that actually allow folks to provide for their families – but I can only do it with your help. **_[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can to ensure we bring sustainable, good paying jobs to Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41115514/327403637/-934731961?refcode=bpi-em-20220126-employment-kicker-ND&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDRlYzBmZC04NTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ao7qK9-5wKvHP2YG0I-QKc59B647Beq7GGa20U9snq0=)_**
******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41115515/327403638/-934731961?refcode=bpi-em-20220126-employment-kicker-ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDRlYzBmZC04NTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ao7qK9-5wKvHP2YG0I-QKc59B647Beq7GGa20U9snq0=)******

Tom Perez for Maryland

clean_body: Good jobs are a justice issue – they're the key to securing a brighter future for all working families. That's why Tom wanted me to make sure you were able to see his job's plan as the next Governor of Maryland. Team, Good jobs are a justice issue – they're the key to securing a brighter future for all working families. That's why Tom wanted me to make sure you were able to see his job's plan as the next Governor of Maryland. All over the country, workers are leaving jobs because the companies and agencies they work for refuse to adapt and make them a priority. Maryland needs to lead by example – and if we can't do it in the public sector, then we can't do it at all. Tom has spent his career as a civil rights attorney, an active participant in the labor movement, and a champion for worker's rights in Maryland and in President Obama's cabinet. He'll continue to fight for workers as Maryland's next Governor, but he can't get there without your support. = ****=** Thank you, and please keep reading if you want to learn more about Tom's job plan. – Haley \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Tom Perez Date: January 26, 2022 Subject: Team, workers need to get paid. PERIOD. Team, America's workforce is changing significantly across the country, and Maryland is no exception. Last week, a member of Maryland's own Governor’s Council confessed during a public hearing that his agency is critically understaffed, affecting their ability to do their jobs. This is not the first time we've heard something like this from Annapolis.For the past seven years , the vital services that protect Maryland's environment, economy, and the health and safety of our residents have been compromised because of inadequate staffing and underpayment. Maryland workers inside the government and out deserve to have competitive salaries and adequate support to do their jobs, and right now executive leadership in Annapolis just isn't getting the job done. I've fought for workers my entire career – first, as Maryland Labor Secretary where we passed the nation's first living wage law, and again as U.S. Labor Secretary. I know what it takes to make government work for the hardworking people of Maryland, and I have a plan to get us there. **** Team, I've stood shoulder to shoulder with the labor movement, fighting for worker's rights my entire career in public service. I can tell you that creating jobs, ensuring our government prioritizes workers inside and out of public service, and strengthening Maryland's economy won't happen overnight. I'm running for governor because I believe Maryland has a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build a future where workers know they have a voice and the government finally works for the people it serves. Thank you, Tom P.S. We can shape our emerging workforce into one that listens to workers and creates good paying jobs that actually allow folks to provide for their families – but I can only do it with your help. = **=** Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

body:
Supreme Court Justice Stephen Beyer to Retire

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41116605/327408849/1300596418?refcode=220127_FR_supremecourtopening
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjYzQxNTBjLTg5N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WzXVifQv-cD2U-EOsrnLJJhoK3a5vAv7j-Gt6doeEA4=)
---
Big news, Peter.

Supreme Court Justice Stephen Beyer officially announced his retirement yesterday, giving President Biden the opportunity to fill this liberal seat with another democrat for the next few decades.

We know that Biden vowed to nominate a Black woman if there was ever an open seat. History is about to be made.

Nothing compares to the feeling of defeat that followed the passing of RBG. Watching Trump fill three seats in his presidency was a loss for this country. Nothing motivated Republicans more than that opportunity.

But now we have hope.

And this will give democrats a fighting chance to hold strong on so many battles that will likely face the Supreme Court – the biggest being the overturning of Roe v. Wade. **It reminds us that we have to head into our primaries strong and hold our seats come November.**

We have to be real with you. This year is going to be tough. Republicans are ready to fight back and they have huge bank accounts and large corporations backing them up. Our grassroots campaigns need to prove them wrong.

2022 is our year to hold blue and to prove to our country that our voices have been heard. We did it 2020 – Republicans saw what we could do and now they are preparing to counteract. Let’s make it our mission to stop them. ******[Help us by supporting Barrier To Entry candidates who are going to hold our seats and create change. Friends — Today, Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer announced he is planning to retire after 27 years on the Supreme Court. Justice Breyer has served our country well, helping secure important victories for First Amendment rights, reproductive care, and access to quality health care. Thanks to the hard work of the thousands of you who donated to help us flip the Senate in 2020, we now have an opportunity to confirm President Biden’s next Supreme Court nominee. That means President Biden now has the ability to appoint a nominee who will be a champion for reproductive rights, voting rights, and so much more. **We cannot squander this opportunity, friends.** We must confirm President Biden’s nominee to the Supreme Court. However, it is CRITICALLY important that we stay focused on our efforts to defend and expand our Senate majority. Because maintaining the majority is the only thing standing between us and a packed right-wing Supreme Court. [_**So if you are able, will you make a $10 donation to Defend the Senate today? clean_body: | = Friends — Today, Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer announced he is planning to retire after 27 years on the Supreme Court. Justice Breyer has served our country well, helping secure important victories for First Amendment rights, reproductive care, and access to quality health care. Thanks to the hard work of the thousands of you who donated to help us flip the Senate in 2020, we now have an opportunity to confirm President Biden’s next Supreme Court nominee. That means President Biden now has the ability to appoint a nominee who will be a champion for reproductive rights, voting rights, and so much more. We cannot squander this opportunity, friends. We must confirm President Biden’s nominee to the Supreme Court. However, it is CRITICALLY important that we stay focused on our efforts to defend and expand our Senate majority. Because maintaining the majority is the only thing standing between us and a packed right-wing Supreme Court. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for all you do to support our Democratic majority, Defend the Senate Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
To elect Nina to Congress to take on the establishment, we will need your support
#

Hello Somebody!
We’ve been absolutely _blown away_ by the response to yesterday’s announcement that Nina is running for Congress.
Lots and lots of people like you have already chipped in with contributions of $5 or $10 to help us win this race and represent our movement in Congress.
But this is going to be a tough campaign, so if we are going to win, we will need to keep up this momentum. So we are once again asking:
**[If you can afford it, please make a donation to Nina’s campaign today. We would not ask if it wasn’t so important that we start strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41117348/327413286/1798563261?refcode2=14299c9e-8a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220127-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDI5OWM5ZS04YTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xZL_aP0tM0VcGD_ss1WfL3GyW6RazWhnSLKbjZAoOmA=)**
Nina is running to take on the political establishment that says what we stand for is radical — that we can’t have Medicare for All, a living wage, quality and debt-free education, and a criminal justice system that holds police accountable for violence and misconduct against Black people.
But if we are going to elect Nina to Congress to take on the establishment, we will need your support — because we aren’t beholden to corporate lobbyists or big donors. This is a campaign for you, but that also means we need your support to power our movement.
**[So, if you believe that NOW is the time for radical change, please make a donation to get our campaign off the ground.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41117350/327413289/1798563261?refcode2=14299c9e-8a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220127-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDI5OWM5ZS04YTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xZL_aP0tM0VcGD_ss1WfL3GyW6RazWhnSLKbjZAoOmA=)**
Thank you! When we win this race and send Nina Turner to Congress, it will be because people like you got involved.
With these hands,
\- Team Turner

Hi there,

It feels so long ago since we've sent out one of these newsletters, but Ann had a lovely holiday season with her family, and we hope that you did as well.

Ann is well-rested and has hit the ground running just a few weeks into 2022. First, we thought we'd share with you what the last few days of 2021 looked like for Ann and our campaign!

* * *
**Events Roundup:**

**December 23rd, IBEW Conference**

Ann was invited to join the IBEW State conference in Janesville where she had the opportunity to join union workers at the table and listen to their ideas on the work that is needed to be done to defend our union workers and continue the right for better wages and benefits.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41118266/327417546/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220127_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2YyN2QwZC04YzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9bteo8Ee-dSeiDoq3UH5TM5jmWiLvqRr68jckdtC-nY=)
---

**December 25th, Holiday game night with the Roe fam!**

Every year during Christmas, the Roe family loves to spend some quality family time together by playing games. This night consisted of UNO, Qwirkle, and Sorry! Can you guess who won all three games?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41118267/327417547/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220127_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2YyN2QwZC04YzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9bteo8Ee-dSeiDoq3UH5TM5jmWiLvqRr68jckdtC-nY=)
---

**January 21st, End Gerrymandering Rally**

Ann attended the 'End Gerrymandering Rally' last Friday. Redistricting in Wisconsin has gotten out of control, and we won't stop talking about it until every voting district map reflects electoral reality. All Wisconsinites should have a fair and equal voice in their elections no matter where they live.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41118269/327417549/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220127_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2YyN2QwZC04YzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9bteo8Ee-dSeiDoq3UH5TM5jmWiLvqRr68jckdtC-nY=)
---

**Max Update**

We've been so busy talking to voters all across the district and keeping up with community engagement, it's been hard to squeeze in a nap! But that's never stopped our campaign mascot from finding the time to take a rest.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41118274/327417579/-1425244157?refcode=em22_220127_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2YyN2QwZC04YzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9bteo8Ee-dSeiDoq3UH5TM5jmWiLvqRr68jckdtC-nY=)

| January 2022 Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Friends,
I hope that your 2022 is off to a great start! I would like to extend my gratitude to all of those who wished me a happy birthday last week! I appreciate your kindness in helping me celebrate my birthday!
"Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere." - Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., Letter from Birmingham City Jail.
In concert with the Martin Luther King, Jr. Day observance last week, I hope you have been able to participate in service and been able to recommit to "be the solution" with respect to helping Dr. King's dream of justice come to fruition. If you have not had the opportunity to review Dr. King's Letter from a Birmingham, City Jail, please take a look [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k1VC4gMnbBIklNxUqdpFovnFago7bUtL4MpYql0cKP8Ymtgjjd4UufLB0grmTRirHZQWrD6eqU-6WIWGuN1aMl04YDYiw5wShqgaK_SjLILuML-rkio4LPmCnHrmYw_nlKgl9BCnKFn4eOfaofPDWaF8UzA5FAO0oAagSt92WXim3bM1oPVdT4zr0NpvI3G9Lf6HO1YqZtxNAGXKq2n2bSAk-KwIHwzHwfpFhnDwsx4ao9JA4dAfH4qMMHym54LoUIG2OiicJ7ykq051o9HJf8zeooi4qbdZIzgYQRG4r0Y=&c=85SSxQvMotW2dC_y3Q9CfydF90WiR9CAaj-UxO32trSzaJhx-2bYAg==&ch=KkiU7PoUAW8ZYEQ8kazfgiT0dITAh9ify2asBRb1cpXNkFxQq7bhVg==).
Finally, please remember to get vaccinated and mask up during this critical juncture of the pandemic and continue to remind your friends, family and community to do the same.

| | | The Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women ([BEAMW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k1VC4gMnbBIklNxUqdpFovnFago7bUtL4MpYql0cKP8Ymtgjjd4UuXAMRfh5RFqs_YkgZv_hvp_4EcNkVIPFYQpHjuBPO8wYBjLCIqtRggHifn6jkgVYieCA6RibpkhKTtLs7rzLf0I=&c=85SSxQvMotW2dC_y3Q9CfydF90WiR9CAaj-UxO32trSzaJhx-2bYAg==&ch=KkiU7PoUAW8ZYEQ8kazfgiT0dITAh9ify2asBRb1cpXNkFxQq7bhVg==)) is off to a stellar start with its work to support women and minority owned small businesses! With a mission to reduce disparities in accessing capital and scaling businesses that many women and minority small business owners face, we have commenced our call for small businesses to sign up for one-on-one financial preparedness counseling [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k1VC4gMnbBIklNxUqdpFovnFago7bUtL4MpYql0cKP8Ymtgjjd4UuQsZd42r4t8cbDkdO_pSV_xLZ290VEwxt32Lu5UTtxUkFTIPogQX2mXDia3Do_W-GXXoRbHGDIyoHteKaPeNXI3OvTNYSYMBUw==&c=85SSxQvMotW2dC_y3Q9CfydF90WiR9CAaj-UxO32trSzaJhx-2bYAg==&ch=KkiU7PoUAW8ZYEQ8kazfgiT0dITAh9ify2asBRb1cpXNkFxQq7bhVg==). Make sure to sign up today!
---
| | |
---
---
CALL FOR VOLUNTEERS TO REBUILD MR. BROWN'S HOME
---
Four years after sustaining damage caused by Harvey, the devastation remaining in 85-year-old Mr. Brown is heartbreaking. I came to know of Mr. Brown because of his plumbing needs stemming from the Texas Winter Storm (Uri) & power outages. His neighbors reached out to me about Mr. Brown because of the work Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization was doing for seniors. In partnership with another non-profit partner (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me to outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced in his home.
We have since removed Mr. Brown from the home, but are excited to announce that Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is teaming up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he may return to a safe, decent home! We need volunteers to sign up to assist with the repairs. Please sign up using this [link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k1VC4gMnbBIklNxUqdpFovnFago7bUtL4MpYql0cKP8Ymtgjjd4Uubpfw25v1CMb22n7hWO6l8wGt-S73O2Stmmi1uO8GI_Ib83Gi9yXPBoau1x5q4rbFZ8MJRTb33cTlMj8CWqCP8J8-aRqndsCPXffgoXMSHOMR6BixGNAJUsyBgsbEViftOdZKt-lveN014CInbtdzhU=&c=85SSxQvMotW2dC_y3Q9CfydF90WiR9CAaj-UxO32trSzaJhx-2bYAg==&ch=KkiU7PoUAW8ZYEQ8kazfgiT0dITAh9ify2asBRb1cpXNkFxQq7bhVg==) to volunteer. We need volunteers to assist with rebuilding Mr. Brown's home on Mondays through Saturdays. We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Please sign up to help today!

name: Team Gearing
subject: Charlie will fight for our community, like he always has
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -
Over the last few months we have been block walking, knocking doors, and having conversations with our neighbors about the future we want for Texas.

Our volunteers are out having these crucial conversations every day, can you help power our outreach efforts by chipping in $12 or more today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Texans are tired of the political games, misplaced priorities, and senseless bullying they see from extremists like Greg Abbott, Dan Patrick, and Ken Paxton.

Texans know that we have the opportunity to elect strong leaders like Charlie who will fight for our community and focus on the issues that matter most – like restoring reproductive and voting rights, fully funding our public schools, and fixing our power grid.

This campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you. Can you donate today to help us reach more voters ahead of early voting? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]
Charlie is running to build a better Texas for everyone - where all of our neighbors are welcomed, loved, and included.

Together we can send him to Austin to fight for our values.

- Team Gearing

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90675/images/Gearing_SHLogo_blueonlightblueDEM.png]Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas

name: Leader Kevin McCarthy
subject: Humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority. A record 29 Democrats have retired so far. This cycle, we have some of the best
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zifbdo96ri02fgc868kpf80vknqvhluikm9vcdjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg68o34cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1hccomcojnmgr30tbks5ge9cdjchibcpdgedi3eppjm3h7adliesob0odjm1g6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aoljcorrcob66hib6p9nm2qmash5u)

|
---
| | | This is Leader Kevin McCarthy. I'm humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.
* Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority.
* A record 29 Democrats have retired so far.
* This cycle, we have some of the best GOP candidates I've ever seen.

I want to introduce you to 8 of the best:

Esther Joy King (IL-17)
Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
Wesley Hunt (TX-38)
Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk5kppjou9p9fcotoj8s2r6letut3m38feui6gv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg68o34cth2bs)
---

* 5 seats to take back the house
* 29 Dem retirements
* 8 tier 1 candidates who will crush their competition.

**The numbers are good.**

But we have one problem: These candidates need resources to go up against the liberal money machine.

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfgaj6n31egukovtn4dm8o77p177qdddof0kqks8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg68o34cth2bs)
---

As Republican Leader of the House, I am begging- will you chip in $10, $20, or anything you can give to help us ensure victory in the 2022 midterms? I will personally match every dollar you give for the next hour:

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3tv661kf9p1u6t7qr83006ub07hjcbcohausn48_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg68o34cth2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi1c6h8amikrfs45ooafjsa72phioghnubne9330_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg68o34cth2bs)
---
Leader Kevin McCarthy

---
**A note from Kevin:**
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrlphnrcaouuk5ot4ri9kndihqpt170uetuc5978_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg68o34cth2bs)
---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I'm committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I'm incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I'm doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. clean_body: Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority. A record 29 Democrats have retired so far. This cycle, we have some of the best | | | | This is Leader Kevin McCarthy. I'm humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers. Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority. A record 29 Democrats have retired so far. This cycle, we have some of the best GOP candidates I've ever seen. I want to introduce you to 8 of the best: Esther Joy King (IL-17) Amanda Adkins (KS-03) Bruce Poliquin (ME-02) Ryan Zinke (MT-01) Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07) Monica De La Cruz (TX-15) Wesley Hunt (TX-38) Derrick Van Orden (WI-03) | | 5 seats to take back the house 29 Dem retirements 8 tier 1 candidates who will crush their competition. The numbers are good. But we have one problem: These candidates need resources to go up against the liberal money machine. | | As Republican Leader of the House, I am begging- will you chip in $10, $20, or anything you can give to help us ensure victory in the 2022 midterms? body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CNrUqPJfkaoTm1MOdrohbGo0HHssMPOCMK3AyA4pithvx45v_oMTCm81keTpavM3oejqhfJZEZO4gs9KQoyCyAXo1-uv7YsV8v4_zycHfmpzw_GS1grezDWq4pgVxeXlpPCRghLamuZrEDc3EuiyKq5BO5AvAGKLohZ0-E-L6alay4rcuOGunXpomODoTTVJPUmUA40WfyZMOYzlsIAjNTbmVBxRSAo-TQRUlOkMZ_ZBrcpXLBvJ-aH2QenL2eqfqjSqec6jIMQTEYvDhltOdOKe4o95df20&c=efLIowVus2BhlDa301cS-f3G9vRY2N_-8QwyFQpKP9nHo8pxXDUQMA==&ch=A8j5qOaQbzfd3Ts3nQWjahLuDwLSFGW898svoOM11aqcfaZFgZOVRA==)

| When we meet adversity, we have two choices: We can choose to lay down and give in OR we can choose to FIGHT. Peter, it's imperative that we face our obstacles head-on and never, ever back down. Despite the liberal machine constantly attacking Florida and the Governor, there's too much on the line for us to ever give an inch. Our friends, families, children and the future of our state depend on us standing strong and fighting back. [To showcase our message of standing strong and fighting back, I am proud to announce the launch of our "Never. Ever. Back. name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: The Bus Tour Headed to Southern Ohio
body:
Check out our weekly newsletter
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDJFLQ752g7MLRP4sTFxnIYMOJmgWxC89uqAyGumMYhvVdN3vAyoglxwoY3uIlLNzRBd6a57B4B4CmjXK3IN378CdnEaaPVFIWLwCPqSr1i4jF-4biCAd3jlmb5D9_zgWeXxVSvrH_rlI6lzMti46XCiBH33vzBg7ITZuttI10pLto4ACuEWGg==&c=Ld1bMm7pg--BNkywyWx1245W6TQ8x2JQl5szc17Dr7gZqXkr_NsysQ==&ch=BAkTCuFNI__8DCl-LLIrB6gVLngLdYy1lGGC-Zi2sMQRUAvJ8vc_2g==)
---
| Greetings!

What a week it has been on the Gibbons campaign bus tour!
We had an eventful weekend traveling the southeast region of Ohio to meet with local voters. Our bus made several stops in Vinton, Jackson and Gallipolis where I spoke with hard-working Ohioans at meet & greet events and participated in the March for Life walk in Chillicothe.
We even hosted a Bengals watch party event in Marietta which ended with a big WIN for our team!
---

As a mother, businesswoman, community leader, and a patriot, Laurel knows what it takes to drain the swamp and clean up Washington DC! I am proud to support Laurel in this race and I encourage you to do the same."
\-- Joy Villa Actress, Singer-Songwriter, and Outspoken Supporter of President Trump
With your support today our mission to take back Colorado, CD7, and the US House in 2022 can become a reality!
Can I continue to count on you in this mission Friend?
Sincerely,

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Justice Breyer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Republicans are trying to entrench themselves in power, and it is powerfully important we don’t allow that to happen. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41120608/327428610/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3C_EOM_20210127_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWM3OTcwNS05MzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8jNZdS3rO5AKDvbrlpTduQfMHvrBFvXB831toIdtBI=&emci=7ad7c4b0-8e7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=25c79705-937f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908)
---
I can think of about 9,000 reasons why Democrats need to hold onto — and grow — our majority in the U.S. Senate. But we just got a reminder of a really, really, really big one: the Supreme Court. With Justice Breyer retiring, President Biden only knows he’ll have his nominee considered because Democrats took back the Senate in 2020 and 2021. We’ve also got to protect and expand our House majority. This week, our grassroots movement endorsed three terrific congressional candidates who are fighting to put power in the hands of the people: Rep. Andy Levin in Michigan, Greg Casar in Texas, and Rep. Lucy McBath in Georgia. **I’m going to do everything I can to support Democrats across the country in 2022 and beyond. But we’re up against our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year, and whether or not we hit our goal will help set our outreach and organizing plans for this election.** [_**If it makes sense for you right now, can you pitch in $3 before Monday’s end-of-month deadline? Your donation would help support our re-election campaign, elect more Warren Democrats, and grow our grassroots movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41120609/327428611/-237140144?refcode=EMZ3C_EOM_20210127_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWM3OTcwNS05MzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8jNZdS3rO5AKDvbrlpTduQfMHvrBFvXB831toIdtBI=&emci=7ad7c4b0-8e7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=25c79705-937f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: Republicans are trying to entrench themselves in power, and it is powerfully important we don’t allow that to happen. | | | I can think of about 9,000 reasons why Democrats need to hold onto — and grow — our majority in the U.S. Senate. But we just got a reminder of a really, really, really big one: the Supreme Court. With Justice Breyer retiring, President Biden only knows he’ll have his nominee considered because Democrats took back the Senate in 2020 and 2021. We’ve also got to protect and expand our House majority. This week, our grassroots movement endorsed three terrific congressional candidates who are fighting to put power in the hands of the people: Rep. Andy Levin in Michigan, Greg Casar in Texas, and Rep. Lucy McBath in Georgia. I’m going to do everything I can to support Democrats across the country in 2022 and beyond. But we’re up against our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year, and whether or not we hit our goal will help set our outreach and organizing plans for this election. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | Together, we need to get more Democrats in Washington so we can make more big, structural change — like rebalancing the Supreme Court by expanding it. President Biden has committed to naming the first Black woman to the Supreme Court. I agree that it’s long past time to make that history, and she should get to serve alongside at least four other new justices too. And we must elect fighters for working people up and down the ticket — in state and local positions that have so much power over so many issues that touch people’s lives. We know what’s at stake. We know what lies ahead of us. And if we work together, we can win together. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:
Frank LaRose neglected his obligation to protect Ohioans.
The assault on voting rights is well underway, and we have to act before it’s too late
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41121451/327432516/-182240488?refcode=EM_FR_220127EOM_EOM_TC_TC_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2FhOTkxNC05NTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0HpBs65EBAt9FXPcFCsTc_L08ZeKy20Io63LRO1rYo=)
---
A true leader does what’s right regardless of who’s watching, team. As Republican lawmakers jammed through gerrymandered maps that robbed voters of their right to fair representation, **Frank LaRose** refused to fight for us. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Returning Minnesota to normal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Your participation matters | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0b7223652624/returning-minnesota-to-normal?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Aren't you tired? Aren't you tired of the lawlessness, the lockdowns, the stopping and starting of life because of our lack of leadership in our state? Governor Walz has to go, and you can make that happen [b](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=14fae056fd&e=33b11688c1)[y caucusing February 1st](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=8285f4d161&e=33b11688c1). Please, for the sake of making our state better, show up, and get engaged.
**We have built a movement that can beat Tim Walz and help return sanity to Minnesota. The media won't cover it; the pundits won't talk about it, but the people of Minnesota feel it.**
When you raise your hand to be a Scott Jensen delegate [Tuesday night](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=4dc0e44fd9&e=33b11688c1), you're participating in far more than just a popularity contest. You're participating in an active take-back of our state. __The difference between our administration and a Walz administration will be dramatic:__

## Putting an end to the lawlessness
I will do everything in my direct and indirect power as governor to restore order to our streets. Governor Walz has been silent as his party demonized our law enforcement officers and put criminals back on the streets. I will send the state patrol to engage in extra patrols in St. Paul and Minneapolis. Repeat offenders will be under extra scrutiny. We will appoint a Minnesota Department of Corrections commissioner who will exercise the department's full power to keep violent criminals LOCKED up. I will use my power as governor to request that a new attorney general bring to bear the full force of the state to prosecute and detain violent offenders. Minnesota will no longer be a destination for criminals.

## Restoring health freedom and privacy
I will restore order and normalcy to our lives. I will end vaccine passports and mandates. I will not tolerate your lives and your children's lives being disrupted by the whims of government. We will change emergency powers on day 1, so that the governor no longer has the powers of a king. Most importantly, Minnesota will become a [health freedom sanctuary state](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=ee3663b290&e=33b11688c1). Your kids will not be masked; you will not be asked about your vaccination status; we will not take orders from the federal government about our health policies. You deserve freedom and privacy. You'll get it if I'm governor. I will fight for you like I have fought for my patients for the past 40 years. I will use the full power of the state of Minnesota FOR you and not against you like Tim Walz and his administration have done.
##
## Fixing our broken education system and prioritizing students
Education is not a political payoff. Tim Walz has been beholden to bureaucrats who've harmed our children. We need to fund our KIDS, not failed institutions. We must give parents and families the ability to pick the best school for their kids. Bureaucratic waste and burdensome administrative costs have put our students last. Minnesota on average spends nearly $13,000 per pupil. We do not have the results to show for it. We must uplift our kids in public school and empower parents with the finances to make a CHOICE for their kids. As governor, I will fully implement school choice and end the scourge of Critical Race Theory in the classrooms - just like they're doing in Virginia under a Republican governor.
[**See every issue we're running on here.** ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=280f91254a&e=33b11688c1)It's time to return to normal and restore the hope of our glorious state. Far-left politicians like Tim Walz have done everything they can to mess it up.
With your participation on Tuesday, we can take the first step in returning to normal and getting back on the right path. If Tim Walz remains governor, I fear we will not have a state worth leaving to our kids and grandkids. I've fought for my patients, even when the medical establishment threatened my medical license... now I want to fight for you. [Will you join me Tuesday?](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=a601ba4e91&e=33b11688c1)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---
|
---
---

name: John King
subject: I got a second chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
After my parents passed away, I was kicked out of high school for acting out.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41121790/327434469/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220127-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220127-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220127&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=104a87c1-967f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDRhODdjMS05NjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xd8F4wfsFT2UHEYHDKhv1NMQ7B4P0wT7Ze0hZKKczPs=)
---
| Peter,

The difference between me and someone who is sitting in prison today... is luck. I was extraordinarily lucky to have a set of amazing public school educators who gave me a second chance when I needed it most, and **if I hadn't, I wouldn't be here today.** If you have a moment, I’d like to tell you a bit more about how public servants and institutions saved me and gave me real opportunities in life. After my parents passed away when I was a kid, I felt a great deal of anger towards life’s circumstances. Like so many young people who experience trauma, I channeled this frustration by acting out and eventually got in so much trouble that I was kicked out of high school. While many could have seen a young Black and Puerto Rican kid whose life was in crisis and wrote me off, phenomenal public school teachers, mentors, and a school counselor believed in me and gave me a second chance. **Because of their investment in me, I became the first U.S. Secretary of Education to get kicked out of high school. Now, I’m running for governor of Maryland to ensure others get the same opportunity to succeed. ** _**[If you think that’s a message voters should hear, please contribute whatever you can today. Your investment will ensure we have the resources to run ads, build a strong team, and share my story with as many voters as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41121791/327434470/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220127-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220127-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220127&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=104a87c1-967f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDRhODdjMS05NjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xd8F4wfsFT2UHEYHDKhv1NMQ7B4P0wT7Ze0hZKKczPs=)**_
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41121792/327434471/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220127-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220127-b1_fr_actives-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220127&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=104a87c1-967f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDRhODdjMS05NjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xd8F4wfsFT2UHEYHDKhv1NMQ7B4P0wT7Ze0hZKKczPs=)

My story is not unique. clean_body: After my parents passed away, I was kicked out of high school for acting out. | = | Peter, The difference between me and someone who is sitting in prison today... is luck. I was extraordinarily lucky to have a set of amazing public school educators who gave me a second chance when I needed it most, and if I hadn't, I wouldn't be here today. If you have a moment, I’d like to tell you a bit more about how public servants and institutions saved me and gave me real opportunities in life. After my parents passed away when I was a kid, I felt a great deal of anger towards life’s circumstances. Like so many young people who experience trauma, I channeled this frustration by acting out and eventually got in so much trouble that I was kicked out of high school. While many could have seen a young Black and Puerto Rican kid whose life was in crisis and wrote me off, phenomenal public school teachers, mentors, and a school counselor believed in me and gave me a second chance. Because of their investment in me, I became the first U.S. Secretary of Education to get kicked out of high school. Now, I’m running for governor of Maryland to ensure others get the same opportunity to succeed. = | = My story is not unique. There are thousands of struggling students here in Maryland who are in need of second chances — and as governor, I will work to make it happen. Everyone deserves to be seen, heard, and given a chance to reach their full potential — like I was as a young man — and I will fight for this to become a reality for all Marylanders. body:

They share a last name, but the two couldn’t be more different. **Sheriff Scott Jones is called the “mini-Trump” of Sacramento** , and the worst sheriff the county has had in three decades. He’s known for refusing to equip his officers with body cameras, being aggressively anti-immigrant, __and working with a hate group whose mission is to preserve America’s white-majority.__ Dr. Kermit Jones is a Navy veteran who served in Iraq and on the frontlines of the COVID pandemic. clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- Peter, did you see the news? Justice Stephen Breyer announced he plans to retire after the current Supreme Court session is over. This means Joe Biden will have the chance to appoint a new liberal Justice to the bench before the midterms... | | | Given how the last year went for this administration, I don’t expect Joe Biden to make a responsible nor competent choice. The President’s responsibility is to appoint a Justice who will uphold and interpret the Constitution–not push an agenda. This is just another critical reason we need a Republican majority in Washington. We need to check the left... Whether it be trillion-dollar spending bills in the House or Supreme Court appointees in the Senate, the Washington Democrats need to be kept in line. While I hope President Biden makes a responsible choice, the long-term solution is taking back the majority in the House and Senate... and the House majority runs through Virginia’s 2nd District! Thank you for your continued support, Jen | | | | Jen Kiggans is a veteran of the US Navy. name: Brent Bozell
subject: Who is fact-checking the fake news “fact-checkers”, Peter?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59376718:6xF8OiEFN:m:1:3298722022:B1D07B93907E894A3281F345872EE462:r)
Peter,

The Associated Press tried to downplay the terrorist attack in Texas.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59376718:6xF8OiEFN:m:1:3298722022:B1D07B93907E894A3281F345872EE462:r)
**But don 't worry. The press and the FBI are quick to call parents terrorists for protesting at their local school board meetings.**

Fortunately, after intense backlash, the Associated Press deleted the tweet and corrected the information.

This is how we hold the media accountable.

My name is Brent Bozell, I am the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical Left-wing agenda in the media.

_When the MRC was founded in 1987 over 75% of Americans trusted the Leftwing media ... now 90% DO NOT trust the Fake News media_.

[_**I am asking for your immediate support for 2022. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, or more to help hold the fake news media accountable? Click here to donate >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59376718:6xF8OiEFN:m:1:3298722022:B1D07B93907E894A3281F345872EE462:r)

With 2022 being an election year, the fake news "fact-checkers" are working extra hard to silence conservative voices.

Here's how "fact-checkers" work with big tech to silence conservatives.
1. Big Tech social media companies outsource their "fact-checkers" to liberal-biased news media outlets like the Associated Press.
2. Whenever conservatives mention facts or a narrative outside of the liberal orthodoxy, then the fact-checkers go to work, oftentimes labeling TRUE information as "out of context."
3. Then, Big Tech social media companies use these "fact-checkers" as an excuse to ban conservatives online.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59376718:6xF8OiEFN:m:1:3298722022:B1D07B93907E894A3281F345872EE462:r)

And the irony is the ones screaming the loudest about disinformation are the ones pushing it out to the public the most: NPR, MSNBC, Associated Press, ABC, NBC, and all those other corporate media outlets.

We cannot let them lie to the public. Do you remember what they did to the Hunter Biden laptop story? We cannot let them do that again in 2022 before the elections.

It is my mission to destroy the liberal bias in the media and their collusion with Big Tech.

**I am looking to raise $24,000 in the next 48 hours to gear up for 2022. **

Help me hold them accountable.
[_**Donate $10 >>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $5,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59376718:6xF8OiEFN:m:1:3298722022:B1D07B93907E894A3281F345872EE462:r)
The fight for liberty is underway. No one can stand on the sidelines anymore. We have to expose the corruption working together to take away our freedom.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
President & Founder of MRC

name: Team Bass
subject: First end-of-month deadline of the election year is here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Team —

**FIRST:** Karen rolled out her comprehensive policy plan to tackle the homelessness crisis in Los Angeles. She stands ready to house 15,000 people by the end of year one of her administration, dramatically reduce street homelessness, end street encampments, and lead on mental health and substance abuse treatment.

**BUT:** This is still anyone's race. And it's shaping up to be competitive and expensive. At any moment an onslaught of campaign spending from our opponents could drown out Karen's message.

**SO:** We have a plan to break through the noise. The first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the election year is only days away, and we're working to raise $25,000 in grassroots donations before then.

**[Karen has the experience and the plans to move our city forward, and she needs our help making her vision for L.A. a reality. Will you chip in to help our campaign get a head start on our end-of-month goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41122303/327436682/-772923769?ms=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hrJxvWi%2Byutjoi1Ejh6YnX1u%2BNaRpuAz00f9kkUmLX4V7CD1SNKYqt7LzWeCsaA0GnuOXG7qf14H0OY2qlIr604dvlOBV5vtDxIEdMe7EcK7aSJ81zAVbTwm7PCxFT76h1JJqaxr0wBkSne5MfM0iw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJlNjlhOC05OTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eus5nA1RzgD4wZc040Tr4n1nN2pqDELR1XprpBfQJ1s=&emci=beb91cf0-cb7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=712e69a8-997f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2429742)**

Our goal might seem ambitious, but history isn't made by playing small. This campaign has what it takes to elect Karen as L.A.'s next mayor. And with L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from L.A. residents could be matched 6-to-1, creating a larger impact.

Anyone who is serious about being our city's next mayor should have solving homelessness as their top priority, and Karen is ready to take decisive action to lead the city through this crisis. But to do that, we have to raise the funds necessary to run a successful, winning campaign.

**[Your donation could help us show anyone who is watching that Karen's campaign has the infrastructure to win. Contribute $3, $15, or even $100, to help our campaign kickstart our end-of-month fundraising.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41122304/327436683/-772923769?ms=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hrJxvWi%2Byutjoi1Ejh6YnX1u%2BNaRpuAz00f9kkUmLX4V7CD1SNKYqt7LzWeCsaA0GnuOXG7qf14H0OY2qlIr604dvlOBV5vtDxIEdMe7EcK7aSJ81zAVbTwm7PCxFT76h1JJqaxr0wBkSne5MfM0iw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJlNjlhOC05OTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eus5nA1RzgD4wZc040Tr4n1nN2pqDELR1XprpBfQJ1s=&emci=beb91cf0-cb7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=712e69a8-997f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2429742)**

In solidarity,

Team Bass

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41122305/327436684/-772923769?ms=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220126_eom1_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hrJxvWi%2Byutjoi1Ejh6YnX1u%2BNaRpuAz00f9kkUmLX4V7CD1SNKYqt7LzWeCsaA0GnuOXG7qf14H0OY2qlIr604dvlOBV5vtDxIEdMe7EcK7aSJ81zAVbTwm7PCxFT76h1JJqaxr0wBkSne5MfM0iw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTJlNjlhOC05OTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eus5nA1RzgD4wZc040Tr4n1nN2pqDELR1XprpBfQJ1s=&emci=beb91cf0-cb7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=712e69a8-997f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2429742)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm Mitch McConnell's number one target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I'm Mitch McConnell's number one target, folks. In a minute, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign. But first, let me explain what it really means to be at the top of the GOP's list. It means that New Hampshire's airwaves are being flooded with attack ads in an attempt to smear my record and rally the GOP's far-right base. It means that Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are spending more against my campaign than other top Senate Democrats–over $7 million and counting. It means that we must meet every single fundraising goal, just to try to break through the negative ads and let voters know about the ways I’ve delivered for them. And it means that Mitch McConnell knows what we all recognize, that **if we lose here in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our razor-thin Senate majority.** In a deeply purple state like New Hampshire, we can't afford to be outraised and outspent. If we're going to hold this seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority, it's going to take all of us working together. So I have to ask: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help my team stand up to the GOP's attacks? Piece by piece, one dollar at a time, we can keep this seat and our Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41122284/327436577/-1281091919?refcode=e20220127_mwh-outraised&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZiZjgzOS05OTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEkBlSy7MH1uu--0qx674rXCxOHml26YNbs0Q3vvwpc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41122286/327436579/-1281091919?refcode=e20220127_mwh-outraised&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGZiZjgzOS05OTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEkBlSy7MH1uu--0qx674rXCxOHml26YNbs0Q3vvwpc=)

clean_body: | | | I'm Mitch McConnell's number one target, folks. In a minute, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign. But first, let me explain what it really means to be at the top of the GOP's list. It means that New Hampshire's airwaves are being flooded with attack ads in an attempt to smear my record and rally the GOP's far-right base. It means that Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are spending more against my campaign than other top Senate Democrats–over $7 million and counting. It means that we must meet every single fundraising goal, just to try to break through the negative ads and let voters know about the ways I’ve delivered for them. And it means that Mitch McConnell knows what we all recognize, that if we lose here in New Hampshire, we have no chance of holding our razor-thin Senate majority. In a deeply purple state like New Hampshire, we can't afford to be outraised and outspent. If we're going to hold this seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority, it's going to take all of us working together. So I have to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Thank you for your time. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hi friend,
This is Tucson Mayor Regina Romero, and I'm proud to announce my support for Kirsten Engel for U.S. Congress. Here's why:
The people of Arizona’s 6th Congressional District deserve a Representative who will prioritize acting on climate change, investing in clean energy, and creating the jobs of the future.
**Kirsten is hands down _the_ environmental candidate in this race, with a proven record and experience as both a professor and a state legislator in combatting the climate crisis.**
