name: John Cranley
subject: I’m done with the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
Ohioans deserve so much better. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41122560/327438206/-460900770?amount=25&refcode=ea.7ff6c5f0-9a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.7ff6c5f0-9a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY2YzVmMC05YTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gCa6KP_WVPEZzFFw17as2XL656OoEwMixqC_EX2J24=) **I’m sick and tired of the state of Ohio politics, folks.** I’m sick and tired of corrupt GOP politicians abusing the power of their offices to send kickbacks and favors to their donors. I’m sick and tired of their ultra-partisan gerrymandering tactics designed to make some of our votes _count less_ than others. I’m sick and tired of a tax system that benefits massive corporations and the ultra-rich at the expense of middle-class families. I’m sick and tired of Republican attacks on civil rights and our environment. **I’m sick and tired. And frankly, I’m pissed off.** **[Ohioans deserve better than corrupt, one-party GOP rule — and our state needs a comeback. If you’re with me in the fight for Ohio’s future, chip in whatever you can today — we have a couple of critical deadlines coming up in about a week, and we could really use your help>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41122561/327438207/-460900770?amount=25&refcode=ea.7ff6c5f0-9a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.7ff6c5f0-9a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY2YzVmMC05YTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gCa6KP_WVPEZzFFw17as2XL656OoEwMixqC_EX2J24=)** Together, we can bring back jobs and rebuild communities. We can protect our environment for future generations while growing the economy. We can legalize marijuana and end the cruel, unjust war on drugs. We can defend and secure voting rights and ensure that our democracy survives and thrives. _We can — and must — do better._ **But it will take your help, team.** We have a HUGE financial deadline on the 31st and need to see a massive surge of donations before then. Meanwhile, our deadline to qualify for the ballot is on February 2nd, and it’ll take significant resources to meet Ohioans from every part of this state at their doors, in coffee shops, and wherever else they are to gather the signatures we need to qualify. **In other words, raising money _fast_ has never been more important to this campaign.** **[Please, if you’re ready to end the GOP’s stranglehold on Ohio, chip in anything you can right here, right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41122562/327438208/-460900770?amount=25&refcode=ea.7ff6c5f0-9a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.7ff6c5f0-9a7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY2YzVmMC05YTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gCa6KP_WVPEZzFFw17as2XL656OoEwMixqC_EX2J24=)** clean_body: Ohioans deserve so much better. | = I’m sick and tired of the state of Ohio politics, folks. I’m sick and tired of corrupt GOP politicians abusing the power of their offices to send kickbacks and favors to their donors. I’m sick and tired of their ultra-partisan gerrymandering tactics designed to make some of our votes count less than others. I’m sick and tired of a tax system that benefits massive corporations and the ultra-rich at the expense of middle-class families. I’m sick and tired of Republican attacks on civil rights and our environment. I’m sick and tired. And frankly, I’m pissed off. = Together, we can bring back jobs and rebuild communities. We can protect our environment for future generations while growing the economy. We can legalize marijuana and end the cruel, unjust war on drugs. We can defend and secure voting rights and ensure that our democracy survives and thrives. We can — and must — do better. But it will take your help, team. We have a HUGE financial deadline on the 31st and need to see a massive surge of donations before then. Meanwhile, our deadline to qualify for the ballot is on February 2nd, and it’ll take significant resources to meet Ohioans from every part of this state at their doors, in coffee shops, and wherever else they are to gather the signatures we need to qualify. In other words, raising money fast has never been more important to this campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for all your support so far. name: SUPREME COURT ALERT (via Unite the Country)
subject: We owe Justice Breyer a debt of gratitude.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:
Sign the card before 11:59 pm tonight. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41122810/327438885/1582314273?refcode=utc_em_logoT_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI1NjIyYzcyLTliN2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMi1rQAzU3GLLmdbZtmBJeWQXa722gRSWG4elgKGRbU=) **BREAKING:** **Justice Stephen Breyer to retire from the Supreme Court** Peter, after more than 27 years of devoted service to our nation, Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer will step down. President Bill Clinton chose Breyer in 1994, and he’s played an integral part in our court’s history since. We will always remember his work and decisions on the Affordable Care Act, voting rights, and women’s reproductive freedom. name: Team Greitens
subject: Eric Greitens Statement on Bloodthirsty Washington Elites Obsessed With Warmongering In Ukraine Conflict
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ERIC GREITENS STATEMENT ON BLOODTHIRSY WASHINGTON ELITES OBSESSED WITH WARMONGERING IN UKRAINE CONFLICT
---
| St. Louis, MO -- Former Missouri governor & Navy SEAL Eric Greitens released the following statement on bloodthirsty Washington elites obsessed with warmongering in Ukraine-Russia conflict:
"After a year of increased COVID restrictions, out-of-control inflation, and sinking approval numbers, it is no surprise that Joe Biden and his administration are diverting attention from their disastrous record by putting America's national security at risk. We have also seen Democrats, RINOs, neo-cons, and the media establishment baying for bloodshed by supporting U.S. military intervention in Ukraine.
"As a Navy SEAL who has been deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, the Horn of Africa, and Southeast Asia during the Global War on Terror, I have seen first-hand the horrors of war. If we continue to risk millions of lives and waste billions of taxpayer dollars on another endless quagmire, we will have learned nothing from the last 20 years.
"America's patriotic sons and daughters should not be sacrificed to benefit our enemies and to line the pockets of the military-industrial complex.
"The D.C. elites who want war, should volunteer to lay down their lives first. Of course they won't. It is time for leaders to stand up and fight against those who would continue to push America into endless wars.
When I am a U.S. Senator, I will always protect our courageous men and women in uniform from the war mongering of the D.C. elites."
---
| | | | FOLLOW US
---

Fellow Conservative,

If someone asked you to guess who the top fundraiser among Senate Democrats is right now, how would you answer?

Would you guess Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer?

Perhaps a senator who has run for president like Bernie Sanders or Elizabeth Warren?

**If you guessed any of the three senators above, you'd be wrong.**

The top fundraiser in the Senate - not just among Democrats but ALL candidates for either party - is our opponent in Georgia, Senator Raphael Warnock.

In his first campaign in 2020, our opponent raised more than $150 MILLION dollars. He has an army of out-of-state donors that he has enlisted to help him raise millions once again this year.

If this Senate contest is anything like the last one - **which we fully expect it to be** - our opponent will see an EVEN LARGER _**"avalanche of cash"**_ headed his way.

[**HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THE SENATE RED
CHIP IN $2.50 TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=722e67207b0f454a88010f2848920a48&_e=xBb4Pvsraop8w3uu9lSs-XwdgvkaLb77sb8swrbv8WpjZwO4Sh_WBb8D9ggl0tuxm0css6YWDpv2gnSV8RlTIJBrCYZmfKlUGFQIbfnCXS0lkrzS02fIP5knfDiwi-6hXjjcSx68dpoBXzyhf_lOyEJYnaua4-XomfP3RkyRxWqtZvrZF0wAAur-3jXyXEbUeD1xqZDLzTlSU3BkVJLQKoxRMIE6UqshIfpgMBPl21ZvEhgviAixxqjfaKXulbWKI0VxCrE3ocfkXZSET-o33byHZpPh4Hty1lry1azoEnqimu4CKmglrzrwVe_2e2_VQ_VPqNBf7ue4fMZNkz5G-u00ZJUvARRvqcaygLK2xToockrm2cji_1RMSsKxrPvMabskdPFemVWPu9QWPGU-mu4VMU2nkGAsOyheACfYLkjhiwYrF3Pe4xOdU7i7t8GzsglZaBh__Bsnw3WWOY1yjA%3D%3D)

name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr71373timjbghqdad58c08fk4538f99u59956h8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg66ob6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttncqpn8olh6hr61phim2rj1p75c1g64tdgeeqj0sjj6lqbcd9imhq70s70m9jrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aoljcorrcpj66lhb6ob7m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5fiqp7d8rcsmrrp7lgiku43ob7vkj84nv14s5g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg66ob6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7mn3s50iji5ceufipe3giujg83c6bfkjccgamug_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg66ob6c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcmir8e2klbre1d35grott07ptheklvtd8c73quo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpg66ob6c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

This is one of the closest races in both Iowa – and the country. Flipping this seat could be the deciding factor in whether or not Democrats maintain the majority in the House. _**And holding the majority in the House means more victories being delivered for Iowans.**_

Our team has set this ambitious goal because after crunching numbers, this is the amount of money needed to keep up with Liz’s opponent. It’s also the number needed for Liz to continue to do things like traveling around the district and canvassing to speak to voters.

clean_body: An ambitious goal = Hi Peter, We’re in the final days of January, and we have an end-of-month goal of $16,000 that we must hit by midnight on Monday. Meeting this goal will help us continue to fund and expand our campaign. = | = This is one of the closest races in both Iowa – and the country. Flipping this seat could be the deciding factor in whether or not Democrats maintain the majority in the House. And holding the majority in the House means more victories being delivered for Iowans. Our team has set this ambitious goal because after crunching numbers, this is the amount of money needed to keep up with Liz’s opponent. **I know you’ve heard from me a lot, friend,****but I had to reach out as soon as I saw that I'm falling $7,893 short of my daily fundraising goal.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41123386/327441466/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2256-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzYxODlhNS05YjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s98rJ7lfOFdI2WCzcIH49jmwpDD_SK-3BW4IriR-rSg=)
In a race this close – with expanding Senate control riding on Florida – I simply cannot afford to fall short. **Polling has me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, and CNN analysts say Florida is one of the states most likely to flip blue. **
If I win, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend and expand our Senate majority, which is why **national Republicans have already poured $10 MILLION into on-the-ground organizing to stop me from flipping Florida blue in November.**
**Experts say my biggest barrier to winning is resources. Every dollar will matter in my race because Florida's last Senate race was decided by less than one percentage point. So I'm worried that if I don't hit my grassroots fundraising goal, I won't have the resources I need to surge ahead.**
**[Please, friend, I'm on the cusp of overcoming Rubio and on a trajectory to win in Florida, but I can't expand our Senate majority without your help. Polling has me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, and CNN analysts say Florida is one of the states most likely to flip blue. If I win, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend and expand our Senate majority, which is why national Republicans have already poured $10 MILLION into on-the-ground organizing to stop me from flipping Florida blue in November. Experts say my biggest barrier to winning is resources. Every dollar will matter in my race because Florida's last Senate race was decided by less than one percentage point. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: put him under oath
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz** __
body:
Peter --

Just who is Ray Epps?

The phony congressional select committee thanked Ray Epps despite video capturing him urging people to enter the Capitol!

**This makes Epps involvement even more suspicious**.

**When Republicans take control, we 'll put Epps under oath in front of America and ask the real questions.**
Not keep him locked behind closed doors with Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and their Democrat comrades to cover up the truth.

**But to get the truth, America First conservatives must fire Nancy Pelosi to win and win a majority in November**.
**[Will you help me elect a pro-Trump majority that will ask real questions about January 6th by chipping in a contribution of $10 right now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r)**? [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r) I've been saying for MONTHS that we need a real investigation into what happened on January 6th.

What we don't need is a sham witch hunt spearheaded by Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney with only one goal: **to target Donald Trump and his supporters**.

_I want to find out what role the Federal government, and specifically the FBI and DOJ, had in fomenting the events that occurred that day_.

And the strange case of Ray Epps and others like him leads me to believe that **FEDERAL AGENTS** were involved with, conspired in, or even instigated **VIOLENCE** that day at the Capitol. . .

. . .in fact, this is something the FBI wouldn't even deny at a recent hearing!

**[DEMAND REAL ANSWERS ABOUT 1/6: CHIP IN TO HELP ME LEAD THE FIGHT FOR TRUTH](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r)**
[**EMERGENCY DONATE $17.76**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r) **[EMERGENCY DONATE $20.22](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r)** **[EMERGENCY DONATE $50](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r)** **[EMERGENCY DONATE $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r)** **[EMERGENCY DONATE MORE](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r)** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r) Peter, the silence from the Deep State and their puppets in Congress is deafening. More and more, this grossly misnamed "insurrection" the mainstream media and Big Tech titans tried to gaslight us about for months is looking more like a "**FEDSURRECTION**."
_And what 's truly frightening is that the DOJ is so openly carrying out political prosecutions against a select group of people_. . . . . .Trump supporters, and conservatives. Of course, the DOJ has been doing this for years without most people noticing. **But now, at least, it has been brought into the light**. And for the sham congressional select committee to be doing the same thing and using the power of Congress to target political opponents is sickening.

That's why sell-out RINOs like Adam Kinzinger is doing damage control right now and trying to sweep the Epps story under the rug before more folks like you and me keep asking questions.

**You and I know there 's more to this story - and even as the enemies of Trump and of our movement try to use January 6th to attack us, and I, for one, am not going to shut up until we get the TRUTH**!

But I can't do it alone.
**[So I hope you will join me in this all-important fight with a contribution right away of $5, $10, $25, $50, !00, $250, $500 $1,000, or even $2,900](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r)**. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59552736:swZrJiHNI:m:1:2365227053:2451ACBF55CC120758D712FE2A724511:r) KEEP UP THE FIGHT!

Thanks for not backing down,

Matt Gaetz
---

name: Catherine Cortez Masto (D)
subject: What Nate Silver is saying
body:
BREAKING : 3 consecutive polls show me BEHIND my far-right opponent in the race that the Senate majority is hinging on.

Please split a donation of $25 between my campaign and CommonGood right now to help me keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220127_CGVA_CCM]

Derek,

GOP outside groups have already spent over $4 MILLION to defeat me — and these polling numbers indicate their attacks are working!

I’ll be blunt: Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is warning that I’m in severe danger of losing Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority.

I need an immediate surge of grassroots donations to help me overcome these vicious GOP attacks. We need 3,000 grassroots Democrats to make an immediate donation before tonight’s deadline, or the Senate majority could be lost!

Please, will you split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood before midnight to help me win this seat and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Your donation has NEVER mattered more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220127_CGVA_CCM]

¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!

Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto, Nevada

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: “A Masterclass in Election Rigging”
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Peter,

“A MASTERCLASS IN ELECTION RIGGING.”

This is what The Guardian [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/ng-interactive/2022/jan/25/nashville-tennessee-gerrymandering-congress-republicans] wrote about what Tennessee Republicans have done by carving up Nashville.

“The new districts crack the concentration of Democratic voters in Nashville and cram them into three districts that stretch across the state and are filled with reliable Republican voters. Donald Trump would have easily carried all three of the proposed districts in 2020. The plan is one of the clearest, and most brazen, efforts to dismantle a Democratic district to benefit Republicans.”

Representative Jim Cooper (D-05) has decided to retire after 32 years in Congress, stating he will not seek reelection in the mangled area that is now the 5th district.

Even though Republicans have rigged the game, we still plan on winning. We’re taking them to court over these maps, and regardless we plan to out-organize them to ensure the 5th remains in Democratic hands.

We are suing TNGOP over their rigged maps. Can I count on you to chip in now to help us mount a successful lawsuit against them? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We will not allow Republicans to stop progress. The money machine powering Tennessee Republicans is strong, but we are stronger because we have everyday people on our side. Democracy is worth fighting for, and we won’t stop until we get equal representation for everyone in this state.

Can you chip in now to help us fight back? We can’t do this without you! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Yours in the fight,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: My plan for rural Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Folks —

As I travel across Wisconsin, one of the concerns I hear about most is that for too many Washington politicians, everything goes in one ear and out the other. The second they get elected, they forget about the folks who put them there, let alone deliver for them.

The way I see it, a good U.S. Senator is supposed to look out for all of our communities, but Ron Johnson has written most of them off — particularly our rural communities.

That’s why I have spent the past few months crisscrossing the state, sitting down with rural Wisconsinites, and learning more about the challenges they’re facing. Every conversation has informed our campaign agenda, and it’s why we’ve rolled out our rural policy plan — the most comprehensive rural agenda of any candidate in this race.

**Having grown up in western Wisconsin, I know that no matter where folks live in our state, they should have access to jobs, education, health care, and the overall quality of life they want and deserve. But they also need a clear sense of where I stand on the issues impacting them most.**

So, as we get back on the road to talk about my plan across rural Wisconsin, here’s what I believe we need to do for our communities:
1. **Make the internet a public utility**. Everywhere I go, broadband comes up constantly. We have got to stop treating high-speed internet as a nice-to-have — it’s a need-to-have. Unreliable access has left so many of our communities behind, and it’s about damn time we provide all Wisconsinites with quality, affordable broadband service.

2. **Broaden access to quality health care.** Too many rural Wisconsinites can’t find a doctor, access quality medical coverage, find a mental health professional, or afford the prescription drugs they need — and it often means life or death. It’s time to finally expand Medicaid in Wisconsin and provide new federal investments to keep rural hospitals open, protect tele-health access, reduce medical provider shortages, support local economies, and save lives.

3. **Expand education and job opportunities.** No one should have to leave their community to obtain a good education, get a job, or raise a family, but that’s exactly what’s happening in rural Wisconsin. If we want young people to stay in our small towns, then we need to give them more options by making common sense investments in rural public schools and colleges, apprenticeship programs, farmers and small business owners, teachers’ salaries and school resources — and yes, fixing the childcare deserts in these communities so parents can get back to work.

4. **Tackle the climate crisis and protect natural resources.** As I travel rural Wisconsin, concerns about climate change and threats to our natural resources have been a recurring theme. Working directly with rural communities to combat the climate crisis, keep public lands in public hands, and conserve our state’s natural resources will create good-paying jobs, help preserve our outdoor heritage, and protect fragile ecosystems.

5. **Invest in family farms.** The consolidation of agribusinesses threatens many family farms — I’ll stand firm against anti-competitive agriculture practices, and support the next generation of farmers with financial support by way of federal investment. Our farming communities also face unique challenges when it comes to mental health, which is why I’ll work to expand access to affordable mental health care, crisis hotlines, and support programs all across rural Wisconsin.

Our campaign is creating an agenda for all Wisconsinites by meeting folks where they’re at across the state, particularly in places Democrats don’t always go, because that’s how it should be. And it’s what people should expect from their U.S. Senator — someone who shows up, listens, asks how they can help, and delivers results.

[**We’re starting to roll out comprehensive policy plans based on the issues impacting our communities, and the conversations we’re having on the ground are critical to this effort. Can you make a contribution to help us keep it going?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41124431/327445611/-959429831?refcode=em22_220127_eom3_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220127_eom3_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjNmYWNkMy05ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_pC7Nfbp3m5EZxZeBgFV13nzqiW9m9XripFriikimL0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41124432/327445612/-959429831?refcode=em22_220127_eom3_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220127_eom3_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjNmYWNkMy05ZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_pC7Nfbp3m5EZxZeBgFV13nzqiW9m9XripFriikimL0=)

If we want to defeat Ron Johnson in November, we’ve got to show up, listen, earn trust, and follow through on our word to rural Wisconsinites. That’s why this week, we kicked off our statewide rural tour, where we’re going to talk to community leaders and discuss my plan.

We have the opportunity to send someone to Washington who actually hears the rural voices of our state and who will deliver on the issues that matter most to them. As U.S. Senator, that is exactly what I will do, and it’s what sets us apart in this race.

I’m genuinely proud of what we’re building here, and I’m even more proud of the support we have earned from so many rural leaders in our state — from elected officials to small business owners to community advocates to grassroots supporters. And I want you to know that none of this would be possible without you.

I can’t thank you enough for your support, and I’ll be in touch again real soon with some photos and stories from the road. Stay tuned!

— Sarah Godlewski

body:
Oklahoma DOES NOT have a Democrat problem. Oklahoma has a Republican problem, specifically RINOs. The OKGOP Chairman, John Bennett, has worked incred

Oklahoma **DOES NOT** have a Democrat problem. Oklahoma has a Republican problem, _specifically RINOs_.
The [OKGOP](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3312671.2326.1.17a92368730b79414ffd77c1a0080abb) Chairman, **John Bennett** , has worked incredibly hard at cleaning up the corruption within the Republican party of Oklahoma.
**[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3312671.2327.1.7504636080700b18013ddd78c45315a7)** is the _epitome_ of what an Oklahoma Establishment Politician looks like.
This is why _I knew_ that I had to run against him.
I am beyond grateful for the **courage** and **integrity** that **John Bennett** possesses to do the **RIGHT** thing.
Not only has **John Bennett** endorsed me for the US Senate but recently _he penned_ a **brilliant[letter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3312671.2328.1.de543df81cc7d78f0439fedf923cb66a) to President Trump** about what is at stake in Oklahoma. Read the letter [here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3312671.2329.1.914009cce2d7e97269c2e322a293349d).
We need more men and women like **John Bennett**.
I promise to be a courageous fighter like Chairman Bennett for Oklahoma values in Washington D.C.
Please consider:
1\. Praying for me.
2\. Hosting a meet and greet.
3\. [Donating](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3312671.2330.1.b12d213d577e48f795034db658fe9e8c) to the campaign.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: A Stop the Steal funder is trying to bring a gun show to Newtown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41124593/327446409/305027293?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220127jw_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTc3MzdhMS1hMTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7Ik8eFKCSa-tATSxRVWgbsgf0oSDgqn7agVtr1M4vA=)
---
Friend, Yesterday, I found out that a far-right supporter of the January 6 insurrection is trying to bring a gun show to Newtown. Jim Worthington — owner of the Newtown Athletic Club and major donor to Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick — **spent thousands of dollars and organized busloads of Trump supporters to attend the “Stop the Steal” rally that turned into a violent insurrection at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.** The FBI even showed up at his house, and afterward he bragged on the radio that his girlfriend grabbed a gun before talking to the FBI. He later called his “friend” Fitzpatrick for legal advice. Now, this guy is trying to bring a gun show to Newtown. Worthington wants to host this gun show using the company Eagle Shows, which is known for selling the same type of tactical gear that rioters on January 6th used, in addition to guns. We witnessed violent insurrectionists storm the Capitol wearing tactical gear meant to look like military fatigues (imitating the kind I wore when serving in combat overseas with the U.S. Army) and carrying military-style weapons. **An event like this put on by a major funder of this attack on our democracy is the last thing our community needs.** In order to hold this event, Worthington will need a variance from the Zoning Hearing Board, so a Board of Supervisors meeting was held last night, and I attended to speak out against it. **[Watch my statement against this gun show, then pitch in $10 or more to help me defeat Fitzpatrick and his extremist party in November so I can defend our democracy in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41124594/327446410/305027293?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220127jw_ae_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTc3MzdhMS1hMTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7Ik8eFKCSa-tATSxRVWgbsgf0oSDgqn7agVtr1M4vA=)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41124595/327446411/305027293?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220127jw_ae_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTc3MzdhMS1hMTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7Ik8eFKCSa-tATSxRVWgbsgf0oSDgqn7agVtr1M4vA=)
---
We can’t let far-right extremists continue to infiltrate our communities here in PA-01, and when I’m in Congress, I will do everything in my power to stop them.
— Ashley

| Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them.

name: Josh Harder
subject: it’s been a whirlwind
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/DpukgSqbnlS95s6hIdknv2rVfIV7u_ES_oJ6No6b_M8=/kAxmEfir7HO2CNtsavwZaB1u9Mz8xZlg-7JQONE-wzY=?refcode=E13658-20220127-EOM3-header-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) | Peter, With all the craziness that happened with redistricting combined with Pam and I getting ready to welcome our new little one, I'll admit that the last thing I've been focused on is fundraising. Even my Campaign Manager Camille is cutting me some slack (thank you!). **However, I also know how important it is that we win this toss-up seat because it 's critical to protecting our House majority. That's why I'm reaching out to you with an update about our goal for the month and what we need to do in order to reach it.** I just spoke to Camille and she told me we need to raise over $20,000 more in order to hit our goal for January heading into our biggest election yet. And you know I'm a numbers guy, so I did that math. If everyone reading this email gave $19 dollars we'd be well on our way to hitting our goal. And you also know I don't take corporate PAC money - I rely on our grassroots team 100%. I hope you can help me out today by sending in a donation before our first fundraising deadline of the year so we can show we have the support to beat the GOP extremists and corporate PACs who desperately want to flip our district red. Here is a personal link where you can donate: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Jan2022-FR-January?refcode=Peter**](https://act.myngp.com/el/DpukgSqbnlS95s6hIdknv2rVfIV7u_ES_oJ6No6b_M8=/kAxmEfir7HO2CNtsavwZaB1u9Mz8xZlg-7JQONE-wzY=?refcode=E13658-20220127-EOM3-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=19) Thank you so much for the support. We can do this! \- Josh
---

Here is a personal link where you can donate: Thank you so much for the support. We can do this! \- Josh * = =

body:
He literally led the charge to overturn Pennsylvania’s presidential elections and spread Trump’s Big Lie.

Folks — Right-wing Republican Doug Mastriano is running to be Pennsylvania’s next Governor. Mastriano doesn’t just support banning abortion, restricting workers' rights, and keeping the minimum wage at poverty level — he also literally led the charge to overturn Pennsylvania’s presidential elections and spread Trump’s Big Lie. Somehow, it gets worse (we know). Mastriano himself was present at the Jan. 6, 2021 insurrection at the U.S. Capitol and passed police barricades set up to keep the rioters at bay. Mastriano also spent thousands to bus in rioters who later stormed the Capitol. Folks, the worst part is that Mastriano could become the next Governor of Pennsylvania if we don’t mobilize to stop him. Races here are often decided by a percentage point or less — so we’ve got to step up now. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: A long email about how we can protect and strengthen our democracy (HR1)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
The For the People Act

| | | Friends: Have you heard of the For the People Act? It's a bold, forward-thinking and expansive legislative package that protects and strengthens our democracy. This bill takes aim at government corruption, bolsters and expands voting rights, and makes huge strides toward getting money out of politics. I’d like to take a few moments to talk you through this transformative legislation. **[I’m also going to ask you to sign on as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the bill—because it’s going to take _all_ of us raising our voices together to pass this bill in the Senate and rebuild our democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41125685/327451332/578962582?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTllMzNmZi1hMzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WAfAQ0ZN1lrTiL2x8LPTWYf4P4VP_ZsqkvaT3OAtn9Q=&emci=2c044911-6786-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=aa9e33ff-a37f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7659029)** There are three major parts to the For the People Act:
1. **VOTING RIGHTS**

**I’m particularly proud that the Voter Empowerment Act—the bill I introduced with the late Congressman John Lewis—is a key component of this reform package. ** It’s based on the simple premise that we should be making it _easier_ for Americans to vote. That means expanding early and absentee voting; restoring voting rights to formerly incarcerated individuals; prohibiting voter roll purges (like what we saw last year in Georgia and Ohio); requiring 15 days of early voting for federal elections nationwide; and more funding for election security.
2. **CLEAN ELECTIONS**

When the NRA wants to prevent gun reform, they funnel money into the campaigns of candidates nationwide to make sure they don’t vote for common sense gun reform. Insurance companies do the same to block Medicare for All and prevent us from guaranteeing health care as a right, not a privilege. The story is the same with polluters. And drug companies. And oil companies. The list goes on. **The solution? Get money out of politics.** The For the People Act requires Super PACs and dark money groups to disclose their donors, establishes public funding for federal election campaigns, and supports a constitutional amendment to end _Citizens United_.
3. **ETHICS REFORM**

The Trump administration offered a masterclass in abuse of power—our legislation strengthens ethics laws across all branches of government. The For the People Act obligates presidents and vice presidents to release their tax returns, tightens disclosure requirements for lobbyists, and puts a stop to the revolving door between industry and government. **[Become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the For the People Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41125687/327451334/578962582?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTllMzNmZi1hMzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WAfAQ0ZN1lrTiL2x8LPTWYf4P4VP_ZsqkvaT3OAtn9Q=&emci=2c044911-6786-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=aa9e33ff-a37f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7659029)** **After historic turnout and increased mail-in voting in 2020, GOP lawmakers have introduced 253 bills with provisions that restrict voting access in 43 states.** It’s on Congress to fight back, protect our democracy and dismantle the systems of voter suppression that have silenced too many Americans for far too long. But while the For the People Act passed the House, it’s going to be an uphill battle to ensure its passage in the Senate. **[That’s why it’s so critical that you add your voice and become a Citizen Co-Sponsor today. We need to come together and demand government accountability, ethics and transparency.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41125690/327451337/578962582?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTllMzNmZi1hMzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WAfAQ0ZN1lrTiL2x8LPTWYf4P4VP_ZsqkvaT3OAtn9Q=&emci=2c044911-6786-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=aa9e33ff-a37f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=7659029)** Thank you for standing with us in the fight for democracy,
Kirsten **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41125692/327451339/-1453645006?refcode=2021_ForThePeople_Welcome&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTllMzNmZi1hMzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WAfAQ0ZN1lrTiL2x8LPTWYf4P4VP_ZsqkvaT3OAtn9Q=)**
---

Gillibrand for Senate does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs._ Please mail checks to Verdolino & Lowey, 124 Washington St., Ste. 101, Foxboro, MA 02035.
To contribute by PERSONAL check, please make your contribution payable to “Gillibrand for Senate."

We’d hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Kirsten altogether, you can unsubscribe here: [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2c044911-6786-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992/aa9e33ff-a37f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTllMzNmZi1hMzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WAfAQ0ZN1lrTiL2x8LPTWYf4P4VP_ZsqkvaT3OAtn9Q=&id=108267856)

name: Gabby Seay
subject: FWD: We need 3 people from your area
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
We couldn't believe how quickly the responses came flooding in after Letitia's email, Peter.
Hundreds of fearless fighters have risen to the occasion and taken Letitia's short 2022 Priorities Survey. Because of the overwhelming response we have received, Letitia is now even more prepared for her long fight ahead to hold the powerful accountable, defend the vulnerable, and win re-election as your attorney general.
**Peter, we can't afford to fall short of our goal now and let all of this momentum go to waste. We only need three more responses from your area by midnight to hit our goal, and it looks like we're still missing your invaluable input. **
**Will you take a moment now to let Letitia know what your top priorities are for 2022? She's counting on your voice. ****Here's****the best link to take the survey:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/tj-0122-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41125788/327451580/-1862592387?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk277-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgxODYwNS1hNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QxwnQqdeTVXgJgJZ8Ybi77XLV3rnjJi3BgjxNEjDLdA=&emci=de250266-337a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b6818605-a47f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)**
Thanks for your unwavering support.
Gabby
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Wed, Jan 26, 2022
Subject: What are your 2022 priorities?
|
| | |
---
Peter, as this year begins and I plan my 2022 goals, I need to know: **What priorities are most important to you and your loved ones this year?**
My mission as the People’s Lawyer has always been to defend the concerns of every last New Yorker – but I can’t effectively accomplish that without understanding what issues you consider most urgent. That’s why we created this quick priorities survey so we can gain your valuable insight.
**[Will you take a moment now to complete my 2022 Priorities Survey and let me know what matters most to you this year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41125789/327451581/-1862592387?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk277-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgxODYwNS1hNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QxwnQqdeTVXgJgJZ8Ybi77XLV3rnjJi3BgjxNEjDLdA=&emci=de250266-337a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b6818605-a47f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41125790/327451582/-1862592387?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk277-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjgxODYwNS1hNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QxwnQqdeTVXgJgJZ8Ybi77XLV3rnjJi3BgjxNEjDLdA=&emci=de250266-337a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b6818605-a47f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25369504)
I won’t sugarcoat this: We're going to have to put up a hard fight in 2022. With COVID-19 continuing into another year and the influence of the powerful and wealthy continuing to run rampant in New York, healing our state is going to take every last one of us.
**But I know that, together, we _can_ turn things around in 2022. Our circumstances may be tough, but New Yorkers are tougher. **
**And to win this difficult fight, I need your help – including your unique and irreplaceable voice – every step of the way.[_So please, take 60 seconds to complete my 2022 Priorities Survey. clean_body: | | | We couldn't believe how quickly the responses came flooding in after Letitia's email, Peter. Hundreds of fearless fighters have risen to the occasion and taken Letitia's short 2022 Priorities Survey. Because of the overwhelming response we have received, Letitia is now even more prepared for her long fight ahead to hold the powerful accountable, defend the vulnerable, and win re-election as your attorney general. Peter, we can't afford to fall short of our goal now and let all of this momentum go to waste. We only need three more responses from your area by midnight to hit our goal, and it looks like we're still missing your invaluable input. Will you take a moment now to let Letitia know what your top priorities are for 2022? She's counting on your voice. Here'sthe best link to take the survey: Thanks for your unwavering support. Gabby \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Wed, Jan 26, 2022 Subject: What are your 2022 priorities? | | | | Peter, as this year begins and I plan my 2022 goals, I need to know: What priorities are most important to you and your loved ones this year? My mission as the People’s Lawyer has always been to defend the concerns of every last New Yorker – but I can’t effectively accomplish that without understanding what issues you consider most urgent. That’s why we created this quick priorities survey so we can gain your valuable insight. I won’t sugarcoat this: We're going to have to put up a hard fight in 2022. With COVID-19 continuing into another year and the influence of the powerful and wealthy continuing to run rampant in New York, healing our state is going to take every last one of us. But I know that, together, we can turn things around in 2022. Our circumstances may be tough, but New Yorkers are tougher. And to win this difficult fight, I need your help – including your unique and irreplaceable voice – every step of the way. | | Thanks for supporting me this year. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

name: Jake Evans
subject: Defend our children
body:
The Democrats will not stop until they have total control...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friend,
The Democrats will not stop until they have total control of the education system.
One of the biggest mistakes we've ever made as a country was allowing the government to indoctrinate our children.
The radical left has already gained momentum by implementing Common Core, Critical Race Theory (CRT), and their far-left propaganda.
Now, they're trying to force all schools to allow biological boys who now "identify" as female to use the the girls bathroom.
In Congress, I will FIGHT back against these ridiculous and sometimes dangerous measures. It's time to kick political agendas out of classrooms!

name: Never Again PAC
subject: Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe freeFive years ago today, Donald Trump, with the support of members of the Treason Caucus, signed an executive order that banned Muslims from entering the United States for 90 days and suspended the entry of all Syrian refugees immediately. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41126303/327453817/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTRmMWY3LWE0N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8VMj2sSNzxhM63SWHlpjVOSMiwsmA3L7eCzy-trM8G8=&emci=83b78dbc-e87e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=5394f1f7-a47f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=16335001) Team,

**Five years ago today, Donald Trump, with the support of members of the Treason Caucus, signed an executive order that banned Muslims from entering the United States for 90 days and suspended the entry of all Syrian refugees immediately.**

When the Statue of Liberty was erected to welcome all those passing through Ellis Island and onto the promises of America, a poignant message was embedded into the bronze of the lower pedestal: **"Give me your tired, your poor,
Your huddled masses yearning to breathe free,”**

By enacting the Muslim travel ban, Trump trashed one of the core ideals of the American dream. It's time to fight back against the elected officials who backed him.

**[Help us defeat the racist, anti-American Treason Caucus by chipping in $5 or more to elect leaders who will fight for commonsense immigration reform. Chip in now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41126305/327453820/516199846?refcode=em22_220127_EOM2TB_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220127_EOM2TB_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTRmMWY3LWE0N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8VMj2sSNzxhM63SWHlpjVOSMiwsmA3L7eCzy-trM8G8=)**

**Never Again PAC began as an answer to the events of January 6, but we all know that the Trump administration's four years were full of lies, deceit, and injustice.**

Generations of people risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence we witnessed at the U.S. Capitol on January 6. Yet every day, members of the Treason Caucus are fighting for America to stop being a land of opportunity, and they are fighting for our democracy to be less diverse.

The United States was founded and made great by the voices of our immigrants. We must protect our democracy and make sure that another racially and religiously motivated travel ban never happens again by voting the members of the Treason Caucus out of office this November.

**[So today, on the anniversary of the Muslim travel ban, will you chip in $5, or whatever your budget allows, and help us defeat the Treason Caucus?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41126306/327453822/516199846?refcode=em22_220127_EOM2TB_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220127_EOM2TB_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTRmMWY3LWE0N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8VMj2sSNzxhM63SWHlpjVOSMiwsmA3L7eCzy-trM8G8=)**

Thank you,

Team Never Again
Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41126309/327453823/1971668985?refcode=em22_220127_EOM2TB_fnd_gq_control___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220127_EOM2TB_fnd_gq_control___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzOTRmMWY3LWE0N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8VMj2sSNzxhM63SWHlpjVOSMiwsmA3L7eCzy-trM8G8=)

| Dear Peter ,
---
| I took a big step in my candidacy for US Senate and signed the Term Limits Pledge to state that I will not seek office after two terms.
Dying shouldn't be the only way we get someone out of Washington. We don't need any more people making a career out of running for office (and many getting rich while doing it).
But I didn't run because I needed a career. [I'm running to fight for you](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HHpaKX_mC0lH_zhHfjvtK0CphYk5sxbr9iCb1VSdVPHRA5GSIfVKZ8UYKOAC0dr_fJGl6q8GIVP-Bpvx94UCeUY0dhw6s2iBFvRgTE7uOLOcfndFmgo_UQ2pLmByVlBR8VeE0hIZSpKaell86BKlyCeqQpoii6g1zBka2z10n-02AUO4yCHXt1GDvyB-up30&c=GelptynY5AET1wnPvt7zxr2cZxASbfXguSem6qeMI2lveJEpCv8UOg==&ch=PqP2qbbQ62YpSklxZoPoiUYuSKa4n2x3IW7h1F4iPpu24TpnaluPUw==).

| I'm very proud to have signed this pledge, and I'm asking that you [join this campaign and help us reach new levels](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HHpaKX_mC0lH_zhHfjvtK0CphYk5sxbr9iCb1VSdVPHRA5GSIfVKZ8UYKOAC0dr_fJGl6q8GIVP-Bpvx94UCeUY0dhw6s2iBFvRgTE7uOLOcfndFmgo_UQ2pLmByVlBR8VeE0hIZSpKaell86BKlyCeqQpoii6g1zBka2z10n-02AUO4yCHXt1GDvyB-up30&c=GelptynY5AET1wnPvt7zxr2cZxASbfXguSem6qeMI2lveJEpCv8UOg==&ch=PqP2qbbQ62YpSklxZoPoiUYuSKa4n2x3IW7h1F4iPpu24TpnaluPUw==). We have been hitting the trail and reaching out to real Pennsylvanians about their issues - but we have our work cut out.
This election is going to be won by actual Pennsylvanians who want their elected officials to listen and serve them. By signing this term limits pledge, you have my word that I will work for YOU!

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | | | Dear Peter , | I took a big step in my candidacy for US Senate and signed the Term Limits Pledge to state that I will not seek office after two terms. Dying shouldn't be the only way we get someone out of Washington. We don't need any more people making a career out of running for office (and many getting rich while doing it). But I didn't run because I needed a career. ==. | == | | | == | I'm very proud to have signed this pledge, and I'm asking that you ==. We have been hitting the trail and reaching out to real Pennsylvanians about their issues - but we have our work cut out. This election is going to be won by actual Pennsylvanians who want their elected officials to listen and serve them. By signing this term limits pledge, you have my word that I will work for YOU! | | | == | | | == | For Pennsylvania, | == | Kathy Barnette | | | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | == | == == == | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | P.O. Hey there, You’re a valuable member of this grassroots team, so it’s important that you see this: [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41127370/327457959/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzIzMTEzMS1hYTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lPrzJBL13h9llaGymPOmhrffbYfZ8hKh-DHW6BohMvo=) The national GOP group tasked with flipping seats like Michael’s raised an off-year record-breaking total of $104.8 million. They have a warchest ready to target Michael by distorting his record through targeted ads and by funneling money to the winner of the GOP primary. **$104.8 million may seem daunting, but we can compete.** We don’t have to outraise the national GOP or Michael’s opponents that are bankrolling their own campaigns. But we do need to meet our fundraising goals each month so we can invest in the tools and programs it will take to win in November. Michael doesn’t take a cent from big corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so we’re counting on folks like you to chip in what you can to help him win this race. We’re facing the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of this midterm election year. clean_body: | = Hey there, You’re a valuable member of this grassroots team, so it’s important that you see this: = The national GOP group tasked with flipping seats like Michael’s raised an off-year record-breaking total of $104.8 million. They have a warchest ready to target Michael by distorting his record through targeted ads and by funneling money to the winner of the GOP primary. $104.8 million may seem daunting, but we can compete. We don’t have to outraise the national GOP or Michael’s opponents that are bankrolling their own campaigns. But we do need to meet our fundraising goals each month so we can invest in the tools and programs it will take to win in November. Michael doesn’t take a cent from big corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so we’re counting on folks like you to chip in what you can to help him win this race. We’re facing the first end-of-month fundraising deadline of this midterm election year. With Michael’s seat and our slim Senate majority on the line, your support is critical. | | Dear Friend,
I wish to invite you to enroll in an eight-lecture course that I prepared with the help and under the auspices of Hillsdale College. It is called **“American Citizenship and Its Decline,”** and the online course is based on my latest book, the recently released _The Dying Citizen_.

**[Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a4237da377e94c7d9be5901165c65770&_e=xzqmqGVTiB__8Q9tajsuDUIWxRTBG0vnrl4xRj3yINyhvezsP0xClO7lTfElciUslSLgV3jYwtoDHW0o3k7elWG1iHBjHOQ85TL4HPoi2y4Qu5i2H9Swewz38YlaLuNAXRUOtspXCGo6otm5giKjDYZjGcTeiNZWfthrATDX42oU-VpVR9sg_o5oF4CDspCuWCziKRIQXPLd5iV-bA55jBUqxMHXhUDzQI6XNt8BGIROy6ZgXgx-i9_kBojdTffQ4XyITau3r9QD3SvF1_PHe7FLdRsXQJs0cXbs_C2Xqj8Y6p8slOnQ8L_vk6OJ_NW5Su9JhzP7qiwCbK68ISx7Ruadr1frNxCiqHaCDe5OeoMz02vXAZJPmzuHpl0jhK4Mcbe2_OPHxG-732M_dgEqzVPNsaChvhT6DyCYan9yI_STsWd3-uoqfz6GpB4mATDwwYc062HyNHwUx9LKLSKr5daQW_rgobJLI2ogc3SgrCs%3D)**

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class—currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism—identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values—is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new changing and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

**“American Citizenship and Its Decline”** is free to enroll in, and you can begin the course today by clicking on the secure link below.

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/american-citizenship-and-its-decline**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a4237da377e94c7d9be5901165c65770&_e=xzqmqGVTiB__8Q9tajsuDUIWxRTBG0vnrl4xRj3yINyhvezsP0xClO7lTfElciUslSLgV3jYwtoDHW0o3k7elWG1iHBjHOQ85TL4HPoi2y4Qu5i2H9Swewz38YlaLuNAXRUOtspXCGo6otm5giKjDYZjGcTeiNZWfthrATDX42oU-VpVR9sg_o5oF4CDspCuWCziKRIQXPLd5iV-bA55jBUqxMHXhUDzQI6XNt8BGIROy6ZgXgx-i9_kBojdTffQ4XyITau3r9QD3SvF1_PHe4yPKxvIfirbdHboNbNovo1oIOklDKY5c6JSXNZ4P7vt3l1OeHu8nmRCBB3jXISFJYfrtHDgL0ucjzm2lt0vlXsKemmS025vit4dT2BXxKzS5kMKycsXHDcSNZFqF4xBtPynGvyQwC8Hm6xN5REu_qytYV58RLHH58uCxNl9vDI3NSmQAFzugZ2lKShZJMvb8wHmkJXNCoyd6vVdgIZO9TQ%3D)

Best wishes,

Victor Davis Hanson
Wayne & Marcia Buske Distinguished Fellow in History
Hillsdale College

The third 2022 Republican Gubernatorial Debate will take place tonight, Thursday, January 27th at 7pm at the Blair County Convention Center in Altoona, PA. This Debate will be broadcast live or **[streaming on PCN](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=808b69ec19&e=fe97fe84cf)**. Some tickets may still be available online by clicking **[HERE](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=68b7b17dd5&e=fe97fe84cf)**. This debate is sponsored by the Blair County Republican Committee and moderated by PA Republican State Chairman Lawrence Tabas.
| [ ](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=b0efb1cf0b&e=fe97fe84cf)
---
We need to collect over 2,000 signatures of registered Republicans across PA in order to get on the ballot. We also need to have a minimum of 100 signatures from 10 different counties. Petition circulation period runs for 3 weeks beginning on Tuesday, February 15th. We need your help to collect those signatures. Sign up to be a petition circulator **[HERE](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=d9c735b31e&e=fe97fe84cf)**
| [ ](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=1fa2778777&e=fe97fe84cf)
---
I arrived in the United States with just $20 in my pocket...and became a Harvard-trained heart surgeon.

name: Team Pascrell
subject: New Jersey’s progressive warrior
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pascrell for Congress, Inc
body:
| | | Team, Since he took office, Bill Pascrell has been a tireless advocate for the people of Northern New Jersey. Aggressively promoting critical Democratic priorities, he’s taken the lead on supporting a public option to make health care more accessible and addressing the threat of climate change by supporting the Green New Deal. Bill is a champion in the fight to restore voting rights and protect our democracy. And during the Trump era, Bill emerged as a leader for truth and accountability from our nation’s highest offices. **With a new administration, Bill Pascrell continues to be an outspoken and bold voice for issues that are important to the families of New Jersey.** From his post as New Jersey's only member of the powerful tax-writing House Ways and Means Committee, Pascrell has dedicated his career to creating a tax system that is fair to all Americans, not just powerful special interests. He leads legislation to restore the state and local tax deduction that middle-class New Jerseyans have relied on for generations. Bill also helped write the Affordable Care Act, which helped New Jersey reach its lowest level of uninsured residents. And throughout his entire career, Bill Pascrell has fought for the preservation of our air, land, and water to ensure a safe and healthy environment for generations to come. **[Bill’s been fighting for the people of New Jersey’s 9th since day one. Will you stand with Bill and his progressive agenda for a better future?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xI0wDj-JnjVLM-OBK7JZuXq2PBKyTr5CNh-po1eqbqw_dehltdYstc8yRz8BFkMtndX5roR4cPuo5Y_oUmVpdb78to7uR5v9duWpLFkz3an5lpqvVU-OgXUxzrN1JUSiGEnHwTtf1KvWoZ5eswaXkiFeHy53vLJdxY13Bn2j9zXlUL8r9pYEj5VJtZHJ_Klhaia8gkzcBQmhMxnu-N3ZSV10DWNPDVXa8ozSFlwEd7XbWiBpvMN7EBYblAloAyI2969g3WLKBPw5Ee6083JdyQrZI12ZQie8zqgoCQc9xPK1fUAYgfqQ9PDBhtduNtRtdKUFKr6op2nB5vgj_S1cMm/3j2/MZ__pVLAR8ifc7v9JoERgQ/h0/rEzw1DYSsO3sE-JtYRhxgRU21BtnUW8XX59Hw6rZVYU)** Aggressively promoting critical Democratic priorities, he’s taken the lead on supporting a public option to make health care more accessible and addressing the threat of climate change by supporting the Green New Deal. Bill is a champion in the fight to restore voting rights and protect our democracy. And during the Trump era, Bill emerged as a leader for truth and accountability from our nation’s highest offices. With a new administration, Bill Pascrell continues to be an outspoken and bold voice for issues that are important to the families of New Jersey. From his post as New Jersey's only member of the powerful tax-writing House Ways and Means Committee, Pascrell has dedicated his career to creating a tax system that is fair to all Americans, not just powerful special interests. He leads legislation to restore the state and local tax deduction that middle-class New Jerseyans have relied on for generations. Bill also helped write the Affordable Care Act, which helped New Jersey reach its lowest level of uninsured residents. And throughout his entire career, Bill Pascrell has fought for the preservation of our air, land, and water to ensure a safe and healthy environment for generations to come. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: . Thank you, team. Your contribution supports Bill’s fight to protect what matters most to the people. Curious about Bill’s record on your voting issue? Visit to read more about where Bill stands on the issues that matter to you. — Team Pascrell The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families. Thanks for having Bill's back! Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Pascrell for Congress P.O. Box 100 Teaneck, NJ 07666

name: Doug Hoelscher (via AFPI)
subject: [1] video message from President Trump
body:
Find out how to take ON Big TECH >>>
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znigolol8lnqt027el3ri2dclq1i01op79p5ctbg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulo7adb1e5oe0pr3c6qj6pjkm9h7dddnmph7aplm61gecdr2ecrb6s9gc9in8s77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchjcoo79cr66up74phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cpj68pj3c9h649fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo5dl3romd89k0tq89631gcc33815uaj0act53no_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi6cor2c9h2bs) **“The survival of our nation is at stake.”** **-President Trump** Friend, President Trump has issued an URGENT warning about the dangerous powers of Big Tech. Check out his message below: [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc7qpuf35rb7iqig5j686ln43cv5b7dojk6uuqmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi6cor2c9h2bs) Our country’s founding fathers knew free press was essential to the foundation of our Democracy, but they recognized the importance of **holding media outlets accountable**. One of AFPI’s mission statements is to**“explore the effects media imbalances and current practices have on the American people and our system of government.”** YOU can be a part of our mission of accountability by joining our ongoing lawsuit against Big Tech with a _**_tax-deductible_**_ donation! [**TAKE A STAND**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo8l8i10n6hnja5aahgkmfhve0h8rbgljqd1sd8g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi6cor2c9h2bs) Friend, this is the biggest fight of our life. It’s time to TAKE ON media bias and TAKE DOWN the insidious, authoritarian powers of Big Tech. Thank you, Doug Hoelscher _COO, America First Policy Institute_ Follow Us | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjpf9f35u1tvs2setei6s0uilj7d26nl9o1rnim0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi6cor2c9h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0rif7qdn4g6siba54eustrrk1v26m3vv5p3a4q8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi6cor2c9h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq2r3flrs87c2hegbj6a2rbese01qfenpqrbdff0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi6cor2c9h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbvvkvbn8sodtram76o962daga5i51hmcukbbmvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi6cor2c9h2bs)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Another reign of Nancy Pelosi?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vZYc77W0Femw4cAYeD52K44laxZrCOg6a_f-O1KUSJ3XPU6zDPLN_WGfmgOql2ZTQHSU5pNkpaKdycqOExyjV5h1ERAmQ6uoxLWniEKZDAD1e9VppqiiViGrbuBhjiATISylgsuGk8uRtIzyaaCg-RHJ2cG4ajgvZQf4jW24DMQ=&c=kUNDLaC72JZcXdNDbbq_I0yVejQLdzGfCyNhmfRN2QdX23H5wdtKBA==&ch=YmT68mywUpnFGzykLyz2Kx8ZZlflOpImpTCo--myLYEMBArL224C_A==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Did you see this breaking news? Nancy Pelosi just announced she is running for re-election this year.
After 34 years of failure in office, you think she would finally step aside. She would rather keep America hostage for another two years, but [I'll be fighting to stop her from ever becoming Speaker again.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vZYc77W0Femw4cAYeD52K44laxZrCOg6a_f-O1KUSJ3XPU6zDPLN_WGfmgOql2ZTQHSU5pNkpaKdycqOExyjV5h1ERAmQ6uoxLWniEKZDAD1e9VppqiiViGrbuBhjiATISylgsuGk8uRtIzyaaCg-RHJ2cG4ajgvZQf4jW24DMQ=&c=kUNDLaC72JZcXdNDbbq_I0yVejQLdzGfCyNhmfRN2QdX23H5wdtKBA==&ch=YmT68mywUpnFGzykLyz2Kx8ZZlflOpImpTCo--myLYEMBArL224C_A==)
---
| | | [STOP PELOSI](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vZYc77W0Femw4cAYeD52K44laxZrCOg6a_f-O1KUSJ3XPU6zDPLN_WGfmgOql2ZTQHSU5pNkpaKdycqOExyjV5h1ERAmQ6uoxLWniEKZDAD1e9VppqiiViGrbuBhjiATISylgsuGk8uRtIzyaaCg-RHJ2cG4ajgvZQf4jW24DMQ=&c=kUNDLaC72JZcXdNDbbq_I0yVejQLdzGfCyNhmfRN2QdX23H5wdtKBA==&ch=YmT68mywUpnFGzykLyz2Kx8ZZlflOpImpTCo--myLYEMBArL224C_A==)

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vZYc77W0Femw4cAYeD52K44laxZrCOg6a_f-O1KUSJ3XPU6zDPLN_WGfmgOql2ZTQHSU5pNkpaKdycqOExyjV5h1ERAmQ6uoxLWniEKZDAD1e9VppqiiViGrbuBhjiATISylgsuGk8uRtIzyaaCg-RHJ2cG4ajgvZQf4jW24DMQ=&c=kUNDLaC72JZcXdNDbbq_I0yVejQLdzGfCyNhmfRN2QdX23H5wdtKBA==&ch=YmT68mywUpnFGzykLyz2Kx8ZZlflOpImpTCo--myLYEMBArL224C_A==)

| | |
---
| I was 5 years old when Nancy Pelosi was first elected to the House of Representatives. Dirty Dancing was in theaters and "Here I Go Again" by Whitesnake was at the top of the music charts.
She is the definition of the Washington Swamp.

clean_body: | | | | No more opportunities after tonight. | Peter, We are reaching out to warn you that all sweepstakes entries to meet President Trump and future United States Senator of Alaska, Kelly Tshibaka, at Mar-a-Lago ends tonight at 11:59 p.m.! Only a few hours remain and we are offering you this one final chance! Don’t miss out on a campaign dinner event, hotel accommodations, round-trip flight, ground transportation, and a photograph with President Trump! Use your private link to enter and be moved to the top of our entry list: We hope to see you in Palm Beach, Florida at President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago club. Where the weather is a warm 70 degrees and you aren’t forced to wear a mask. Team Tshibaka | | | | ==

name: MarkKelly.com
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As of this morning we still have some work to do, but we’re confident that with your support we can hit our goals.
#

Friends — can you please make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today?
Sorry to be so blunt about it, but our first fundraising deadline of the election year comes to an end on Monday at midnight and we need a big last minute push to hit our contribution goals.
As of this morning, we still have some work to do, but we’re confident that with your support we can hit our goals.
So, as we approach our first fundraising deadline of the election year, we have to ask:
[**If you are able, can you please make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take A LOT of people chipping in to reach our goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220127-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2001_6688874_CeNMIW&akid=2001%2E6688874%2ECeNMIW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220127-1-7&t=20&refcode2=2001_6688874_CeNMIW&akid=2001%2E6688874%2ECeNMIW)**

| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220127-1-7&t=25&refcode2=2001_6688874_CeNMIW&akid=2001%2E6688874%2ECeNMIW)**

What we’re able to do before this first deadline will set the tone for what we can accomplish through the rest of the year.
We can’t thank you enough for being part of this team, this campaign, and this mission for our shared values.
Full speed ahead,
Team Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220127-1-7&t=26&refcode2=2001_6688874_CeNMIW&akid=2001%2E6688874%2ECeNMIW)**

body:
|
#
---
Team — I am about to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign to unseat the worst Lieutenant Governor in history. Our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year is fast approaching, and I want to explain why I’m making this important request. Texas deserves a leader who understands the issues hardworking families are facing and who's ready to get to work for real solutions. But that’s not what we’ve seen from Dan Patrick. Since the day he stepped into office, Patrick has done the bidding of shadowy players who fill his campaign coffers. For eight years, he has manufactured crisis after crisis, refusing to solve the very real problems facing our state. And there is a cost to that negligence: From a failed power grid to a failed COVID response, Texans are paying with their lives and livelihoods. For too long, elected leaders like Patrick and the corrupt special interests trying to buy our elections have worked to stifle progress instead of moving us forward into a better future. **Well, I’ve had enough of it****, folks****— and so have the people of Texas. ** So today, while we have the momentum, we cannot afford to take our foot off the gas. It’s critical we have the resources to match Patrick’s war chest and the army of corporate super PACs that are going to attack me in the coming months. Now, here comes the part where I ask for your help: **[Can I rely on you to make a contribution of any amount to our campaign as a way of showing Dan Patrick and his special-interest allies that we’re ready to win this election? Anything you can give before our first monthly deadline of 2022 will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41128715/327466477/134239794?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220127_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjJkOTI3ZS1hZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNzByID8003TJVesuTPkbPdenqmz9yKm6uFugip-pgs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41128716/327466478/-839969798?express_lane=true&amount=5&&refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220127_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjJkOTI3ZS1hZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNzByID8003TJVesuTPkbPdenqmz9yKm6uFugip-pgs=)
