clean_body: | Team — I am about to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign to unseat the worst Lieutenant Governor in history. Our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year is fast approaching, and I want to explain why I’m making this important request. Texas deserves a leader who understands the issues hardworking families are facing and who's ready to get to work for real solutions. But that’s not what we’ve seen from Dan Patrick. Since the day he stepped into office, Patrick has done the bidding of shadowy players who fill his campaign coffers. For eight years, he has manufactured crisis after crisis, refusing to solve the very real problems facing our state. And there is a cost to that negligence: From a failed power grid to a failed COVID response, Texans are paying with their lives and livelihoods. For too long, elected leaders like Patrick and the corrupt special interests trying to buy our elections have worked to stifle progress instead of moving us forward into a better future. Well, I’ve had enough of it, folks— and so have the people of Texas. So today, while we have the momentum, we cannot afford to take our foot off the gas. It’s critical we have the resources to match Patrick’s war chest and the army of corporate super PACs that are going to attack me in the coming months. Now, here comes the part where I ask for your help: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks y’all for everything you do. Fighting for you, Mike = The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Casey DeSantis
subject: What We're Up Against
body:
Florida’s incredible governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, spends every waking hour protecting the Sunshine State from the Bi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7hvc89n8thvt9kiell7fda9jdpjhelvmek75vv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi62o70cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmcgom7d70msoeatljmlj6fcpieuprcspgsphm1o3je9j7ctj36pi34ojmcpi70puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4cr661qb6oj7mtg6cc9gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

Florida's incredible governor and my husband, Ron DeSantis, spends every waking hour protecting the Sunshine State from the Biden Administration's relentless attacks on our freedom.
Just this week, Joe Biden announced that each state will get federal funding to improve bridges and infrastructure, which is important to keep our families safe. **But in a move that many are calling spiteful, the administration is only giving Florida a fraction of the funds they 're giving blue states. **
[**HELP US CONTINUE THE FIGHT TO PROTECT FREEDOM IN FLORIDA - CHIP IN $20.22 NOW >>> **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za2gi1ps8acc1ac9l6gnpkbqvak6dctbuq6qoal8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi62o70cdh2bs)
Governor DeSantis has been very vocal that this is just another example of the Biden Administration short-changing Florida because he will not conform to their expectations. Friend, that is what real leadership looks like: **_to lead and do what is right, despite the lockdown, and the radical Democrats' intimidation attempts. _**
Under Governor DeSantis' leadership, the state of Florida has flourished despite challenging circumstances. He has kept our kids in school, kept businesses open, and ensured that our personal freedoms are NOT infringed.
Looking back, had the governor lost the election, Florida would have fallen to the whims of the Democrats in 2018, our state would just be another California, New York, or Michigan.
We cannot let this happen in 2022, friend. **_This is not the time to back down or sit on the sidelines._**
[**HELP KEEP FLORIDA FREE**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcokb4c82ih7db28squdkki09grkormn63r7tps0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi62o70cdh2bs)
[**CHIP IN $20.22, $40, OR $75**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgc6o09ob5e6f2b9nt2l4lmjb2kfiiclkctv0160_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi62o70cdh2bs)
Governor DeSantis will continue fighting for our liberties and what is right every day, so we must meet him halfway. **Help us ensure that he is re-elected -** **we need him now more than ever.**
**__**[**Friend, can we count on you to chip in $50, $40, or $20.22 to help us continue the fight for freedom in Florida? **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zgfbpd3gg8pginbbrej9t2uqohdnd0aapcl90n2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi62o70cdh2bs)[** **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zev5n99jbksv4gnisn0d2mdoh4fak4umv9e5ub60_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi62o70cdh2bs)
Sincerely
Casey DeSantis

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zuci2pj3pu53ni79gv0u72q1u93rr2gdqkv3c2a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi62o70cdh2bs "CHIP IN NOW") [CHIP IN NOW](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5heoaalbfst73926mtt40kjpa7obbihj6nm5idg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi62o70cdh2bs)

body:
| | | Justice Breyer is retiring from the Supreme Court after more than _27 years_ on the bench, and we want to thank him for his service!

Justice Breyer has fought to defend our constitutional rights and make progress on critical issues like reproductive rights, health care access, voting rights, and so much more.

We want to gather 100,000 signatures on our card to thank Justice Breyer for his tenure on the Court, but **our records indicate that you have NOT YET signed on.**

name: Team King
subject: FWD: You’re Invited: Countdown Kickoff Event!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Friend,

We want to make sure you saw our note about our virtual happy hour with John and Michelle tomorrow at 6PM. This is your chance to hear directly from John and Michelle and to celebrate their new ticket (plus, enjoy a few Maryland themed cocktails). We hope to see you there!

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team King <info@johnkingforgovernor.com>
Date: Wed, Jan 26, 2022 at 1:26 PM
Subject: You’re Invited: Countdown Kickoff Event!

Hi friends,

This Friday, January 28th at 6:00 PM our campaign is hosting a virtual happy hour celebration with John and Michelle to kick off the 5-month countdown to the June Democratic primary!

This will be a great opportunity to hear from the candidates themselves and learn more about how crucial your support will be over the next 5 months as we work to build a Maryland where everyone has a seat at the table of opportunity.

Be sure to reserve your spot today so our team can send you a few recipes for Maryland themed cocktails to enjoy during the event!

Corey is running against never Trumper Congressman Dan Newhouse who was one of and handful of Republicans that voted to impeach President Trump.

**So, I’m taking the fight to Dan’s doorstep**. From Jan 28th to 29th I’ll be at **[5 separate events](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145936&L=78290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuZGNvcmV5MjAyMi5jb20vZXZlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT13YXJkJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGVybT1KdXN0aWZpZWQ=)** in Benton and Yakima counties supporting rising GOP star and entrepreneur Corey Gibson.
[Event Details](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145936&L=78290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuZGNvcmV5MjAyMi5jb20vZXZlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT13YXJkJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGVybT1KdXN0aWZpZWQ=)
If you’re like me and believe that Washington’s 4th district deserves better representation than a has-been establishment RINO, come to one of **[five events](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145936&L=78290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuZGNvcmV5MjAyMi5jb20vZXZlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT13YXJkJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGVybT1KdXN0aWZpZWQ=)** supporting this up and coming MAGA Candidate.

I hope to see you there!

Sincerely,

Dr. Kelli Ward

P.S. **[Join me in Washington and together, let's Make Congress Great Again. ](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145936&L=78290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuZGNvcmV5MjAyMi5jb20vZXZlbnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT13YXJkJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fdGVybT1KdXN0aWZpZWQ=)**

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129090/327468304/224193491?refcode=jtk411-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDYzOTU5OS1iMDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5BBS3IGMV6CDp8guOtEONyqZt237cl5W_wV5UlYhTo=&emci=df4b72ac-d67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=54639599-b07f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6085109)

**I need to ask for your help with something absolutely critical, friend, but let me quickly explain why.**
I'm running for governor because democracy isn't a toy, and we can't afford to let the Arizona GOP keep playing with it. We can't afford another failed Republican governor like Doug Ducey repeating the same old mistakes – and I'm committed to undoing them, committed to actually listening to voters like you and making the change you need.
**But I can't win if I'm not on the ballot – and Arizona law requires anyone running for governor to submit a nominating petition with signatures from voters like you. That's why I need your help:**
**[If you're ready for change in our state, will you sign my nominating petition right now, and encourage any other Arizona voters you know to sign as well?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129091/327468305/224193491?refcode=jtk411-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDYzOTU5OS1iMDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5BBS3IGMV6CDp8guOtEONyqZt237cl5W_wV5UlYhTo=&emci=df4b72ac-d67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=54639599-b07f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6085109) **
| | [GET MARCO ON THE BALLOT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129092/327468306/224193491?refcode=jtk411-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDYzOTU5OS1iMDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5BBS3IGMV6CDp8guOtEONyqZt237cl5W_wV5UlYhTo=&emci=df4b72ac-d67e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=54639599-b07f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6085109)
---
Thank you for having this direct impact on all of our futures. It means the world.

– Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129093/327468307/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk411-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDYzOTU5OS1iMDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5BBS3IGMV6CDp8guOtEONyqZt237cl5W_wV5UlYhTo=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129094/327468308/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk411-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDYzOTU5OS1iMDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5BBS3IGMV6CDp8guOtEONyqZt237cl5W_wV5UlYhTo=)

**After nearly half a century in Washington, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) is running for an EIGHTH term.
Now, Democrat Abby Finkenauer, the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue, is running to defeat him and protect our Senate majority. **

body:
Peter, Russia’s aggression not only threatens Ukraine’s democracy - it threatens world stability. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129472/327469805/1035481494?refcode=ea.e53cf0ca-b27f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.e53cf0ca-b27f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTNjZjBjYS1iMjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_RnazSfaCld4UikldFrBS2wC-_4tZA5iYgkSXFq9p5s=&emci=63464b0e-9f7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=e53cf0ca-b27f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5944225)
---
| | Democracies here in the U.S. and across the globe face real threats. Peter, during my career overseas helping to protect America from those that wish us harm, I have seen firsthand how democracies can be threatened from without - and how they can fail from within.

Russia has sought to divide Americans, to support dictators in Syria, Venezuela, and Cuba, and is now prepared to invade Ukraine, a democratic neighbor that poses no threat. We have learned that appeasing dictators only increases their ambition. Too many leaders of the Republican party have parroted Russian propaganda, undermined our NATO allies, and ignored cyber attacks on our government and businesses. No wonder Putin thinks he can get away with it.

The American people need leaders who understand the threats we face and how we must unite to defend Democracy, both here and overseas. That is why I am running for Congress and asking for your support.

**If we work together, we can win this critical open seat and bring my leadership, experience, and discipline to Congress. We can steer our democracy safely through this storm.** _But first, I need your help to meet our January end-of-month goal to reach voters with our message._

**[Please give $25, or whatever you can right away, to make sure we meet our $5,000 goal in time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129473/327469806/-936389862?amount=25&refcode=ea.e53cf0ca-b27f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.e53cf0ca-b27f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTNjZjBjYS1iMjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_RnazSfaCld4UikldFrBS2wC-_4tZA5iYgkSXFq9p5s=)** | **[DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129474/327469807/-936389862?amount=25&refcode=ea.e53cf0ca-b27f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ms=ea.e53cf0ca-b27f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTNjZjBjYS1iMjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_RnazSfaCld4UikldFrBS2wC-_4tZA5iYgkSXFq9p5s=)**

We can, and we must work together to defend our democracy from all threats, both foreign and domestic.

Thank you for standing with me,

Deb McGrath

| **Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity.**

Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0p4i9j1g3g0fqvmuf9uhonmk82vj7f43sfl4puo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi66or1c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6ctnc4o76s70shqj2s5medqm9c9ge1j3edpmmuojas5le9qn8ddksjhr6pjicsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8pmcc3kmdhmfcjkcoqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6ke6ehjo4347b3v869q42blhoftmqv47tu31558_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi66or1c9h2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4da032pc5ednfcj5v2gsnbn2db3u0rnrsl46eqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi66or1c9h2bs)
---

---

[**RUSH $250**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zts74bc57hlqeiu273i2ojskre3ned7lvaocibng_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi66or1c9h2bs)
---
[**RUSH $500**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmce1f2c7ep7367gt5lchmk7vkhkq0mjala9roug_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi66or1c9h2bs)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqefgjdqjfr7b9umgo4ev65p4mvvug5m5tmlolto_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cpi66or1c9h2bs)

Here’s the deal, Derek. We’re a few months away until the primary election, and Chris is working hard to build a government that puts people first and invests in our region. That’s why Chris doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs. We count on everyday Pennsylvanians chipping in $5, $10, or $20 here and there to fuel our campaign. Our district is one of the most competitive races in the country. The only way we can keep PA-17 blue and protect our slim House majority is if we have the resources to beat the radical right in November. [**Monthly donations are recurring gifts that we can rely on each month. Will you become a monthly donor to help support our grassroots team and build a long-term, sustainable movement?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129644/327470845/54677820?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220127recurring_C4PA17_90da_SLA_l1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjhlOTMxNC1iNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f_4vik4Yxtl-rvYLo7o0r4wY7bx13-zpvvNtRQVi8KU=) | [Donate Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129647/327470848/54677820?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220127recurring_C4PA17_90da_SLA_btn&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjhlOTMxNC1iNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f_4vik4Yxtl-rvYLo7o0r4wY7bx13-zpvvNtRQVi8KU=)

clean_body: We’re a few months away from the primary election, and Chris is working hard to build a government that puts people first and invests in our region. | = Here’s the deal, Derek. We’re a few months away until the primary election, and Chris is working hard to build a government that puts people first and invests in our region. That’s why Chris doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs. We count on everyday Pennsylvanians chipping in $5, $10, or $20 here and there to fuel our campaign. Our district is one of the most competitive races in the country. The only way we can keep PA-17 blue and protect our slim House majority is if we have the resources to beat the radical right in November. = | = Together, we can deliver a better future for Western PA — one with good-paying union jobs, affordable healthcare for everybody, world class infrastructure, and so much more. Thanks for chipping in. Every dollar makes a difference in the fight for our common good. Chris for PA-17 | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. name: Team MTO
subject: They falsified official election documents…just in case?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
Or were they banking on overturning the election?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129686/327471203/651272630?refcode=EM_C_220127GOPElectors_EOM_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzhlOTMxNC1iNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=acrIISa0fDdac3DU-1s57aPptIP8MbB2x6BO1qDrXj0=&emci=618b7b40-fe7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ac8e9314-b47f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)
We can’t say we're surprised.
Last week, Attorney General Hector Balderas notified federal law enforcement of allegations that Republicans in New Mexico submitted a bogus election certificate to the national archives certifying Trump as president. This was after Trump decidedly lost the state by almost _100,000 votes_. Their excuse? They wanted to make sure it was filed JUST IN CASE Trump was eventually declared the electoral winner of the state. 🤔
**Honestly, we're sick and tired of the blatant disregard for democracy by extremists.**
It’s clear their priority is keeping their champion in power instead of upholding the will of the people. We all know how it feels to watch your side lose -- it’s part of life. But trying to overturn results, change the rules, and straight up lie about the outcome is simply destructive.
We’re fighting every day to make sure your vote stays safe. Because this is your country, your state, your town. And your voice should always be heard.
Thank you for fighting with us,

Team MTO
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy!**_ _**______[FIND OUT MORE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41129687/327471204/1198618133?refcode=EM_C_220127GOPElectors_EOM_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_N_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzhlOTMxNC1iNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=acrIISa0fDdac3DU-1s57aPptIP8MbB2x6BO1qDrXj0=&emci=618b7b40-fe7a-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=ac8e9314-b47f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=3583156)**_

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Will you help us combat destructive anti-American ideologies?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| |
Fellow American, Earlier this year, President Biden's Ambassador to the United Nations told her fellow ambassadors from around the world that "white supremacy" is "weaved into [America's] founding documents and principles." I couldn't believe what she said when I read it.

As my boss and mentor, Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, has mentioned, a person has to be totally blinded by anti-American ideology to believe that America's glorious founding principle-the principle that "all men are created equal," endowed by God with "unalienable rights"-embodies the idea of white supremacy!

Still, that's what our children are learning in far too many K-12 schools, colleges, and universities-not to mention Hollywood and our popular culture.

Perhaps it's fitting then that the January image of our calendar is our statue of Thomas Jefferson (a very different sort of ambassador!) dusted with frost.

After all, he's the one who penned the words of the Declaration of Independence, and now there's a cold wind blowing in our nation.

Education is where this attack on America began-and it is the battlefield where we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government.

That's why I hope you'll support our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions today with a tax-deductible gift.

We'll send you our FREE 2022 Hillsdale College calendar as a "thank-you" for your gift of any amount.

Your tax-deductible gift will support expanding educational outreach efforts that combat destructive anti-American ideologies like critical race theory and socialism.

And your giving will help the College remain proudly INDEPENDENT of all federal and state funding-even of indirect aid such as student grants and loans.

When you look at your calendar to check appointments, birthdays, or family events, I hope you'll remember how your faithful giving is supporting the cause of liberty through education.

You can easily and securely give a gift and reserve your calendar using this link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/reserve-2022-calendar](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**

However, I checked with my staff, and there are only a limited number of calendars remaining. So, I hope you will get your calendar before they're gone.

The Jefferson statue is one of my favorites on the Hillsdale College campus. It sits right next to Central Hall by the cornerstone dated July 4, 1853.

At the base of the statue is a quote from Abraham Lincoln. It says:

_"All honor to Jefferson-to the man who, in the concrete pressure of a struggle for national independence by a single people, had the coolness, forecast, and capacity to introduce into a merely revolutionary document, an abstract truth, applicable to all men and all times, and so to embalm it there, that today, and in all coming days, it shall be a rebuke and a stumbling-block to the very harbingers of re-appearing tyranny and oppression."_

Even though the news gets me down sometimes, the "abstract truth" Jefferson wrote in the Declaration fills me with hope. I hope Lincoln's words do the same for you.

To close, thank you again for reaching and teaching millions of Americans about our nation's history and heritage of liberty.

With thanks,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | | Fellow American, Earlier this year, President Biden's Ambassador to the United Nations told her fellow ambassadors from around the world that "white supremacy" is "weaved into [America's] founding documents and principles." I couldn't believe what she said when I read it. As my boss and mentor, Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, has mentioned, a person has to be totally blinded by anti-American ideology to believe that America's glorious founding principle-the principle that "all men are created equal," endowed by God with "unalienable rights"-embodies the idea of white supremacy! Still, that's what our children are learning in far too many K-12 schools, colleges, and universities-not to mention Hollywood and our popular culture. Perhaps it's fitting then that the January image of our calendar is our statue of Thomas Jefferson (a very different sort of ambassador!) dusted with frost. After all, he's the one who penned the words of the Declaration of Independence, and now there's a cold wind blowing in our nation. Education is where this attack on America began-and it is the battlefield where we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government. That's why I hope you'll support our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions today with a tax-deductible gift. We'll send you our FREE 2022 Hillsdale College calendar as a "thank-you" for your gift of any amount. Your tax-deductible gift will support expanding educational outreach efforts that combat destructive anti-American ideologies like critical race theory and socialism. And your giving will help the College remain proudly INDEPENDENT of all federal and state funding-even of indirect aid such as student grants and loans. When you look at your calendar to check appointments, birthdays, or family events, I hope you'll remember how your faithful giving is supporting the cause of liberty through education. You can easily and securely give a gift and reserve your calendar using this link: However, I checked with my staff, and there are only a limited number of calendars remaining. So, I hope you will get your calendar before they're gone. The Jefferson statue is one of my favorites on the Hillsdale College campus. It sits right next to Central Hall by the cornerstone dated July 4, 1853. At the base of the statue is a quote from Abraham Lincoln. It says: "All honor to Jefferson-to the man who, in the concrete pressure of a struggle for national independence by a single people, had the coolness, forecast, and capacity to introduce into a merely revolutionary document, an abstract truth, applicable to all men and all times, and so to embalm it there, that today, and in all coming days, it shall be a rebuke and a stumbling-block to the very harbingers of re-appearing tyranny and oppression." Even though the news gets me down sometimes, the "abstract truth" Jefferson wrote in the Declaration fills me with hope. I hope Lincoln's words do the same for you. To close, thank you again for reaching and teaching millions of Americans about our nation's history and heritage of liberty. With thanks, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach P.O. ## "The right of the citizen to keep and bear arms cannot be infringed if liberty in America is to survive."
## \- Ronald Reagan

## A Peek at the Past Week
---
| | |
---
|
### Donnelly, ID - January 22

America is a nation founded by young patriots with a bold vision. We need that spirit now!
---
| | |
---
|
### Rexburg, ID - January 21

Ronald Reagan said it best: "The only experience you get in politics is how to be political."
---
| | |
---
|
### Star, ID - January 17

We have to change course and promote free market principles and the American dream again.

---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---

### JOIN THE MOVEMENT

If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

We need that spirit now! | | | | Rexburg, ID - January 21 Ronald Reagan said it best: "The only experience you get in politics is how to be political." | | | | Star, ID - January 17 We have to change course and promote free market principles and the American dream again. | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | == | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. subject: YOU’RE INVITED— Jessica Mason for Congress
body:
Join our upcoming virtual event!

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41129997/327472085/1300596418?refcode=220127_FR_jessicamasonevent
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YWJmOTVkLWI0N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=srk5GZBkz-jcQW6WKLBAxUinlNPVZgQE-Sa1anqla8Q=)
---
Peter,

It’s been a while since we updated you on Jessica Mason, our endorsed candidate running for Congress in TX-30. With less than FIVE WEEKS until her election, we wanted to fill you in on where things are and how you can help Jessica get across the finish line on top, and we hope you will join us on Feb. 8th for a virtual event to get to know her: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41129999/327472086/1615796118?refcode=220127_FR_jessicamasonevent_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YWJmOTVkLWI0N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=srk5GZBkz-jcQW6WKLBAxUinlNPVZgQE-Sa1anqla8Q=) A lot has happened since we endorsed her back in early November. Her opponent and 25-year incumbent, Rep. Eddie Bernice Johnson, announced her retirement. This meant a lot of Democrats were eagerly entering the race.

Jessica is the only candidate in the race who went in with guns blazing ready to primary EBJ and bring a new voice for her community. This speaks volumes to her courage and commitment to the fight for universal healthcare and increasing the minimum wage.

Then, Jessica earned three huge endorsements from **New Politics, VoteVets, and Amy McGrath’s organization called Honor Bound.**

It is no surprise that people are ready to get behind a strong leader who will be the first Black female veteran in Congress.

Now, Jessica’s team is putting on virtual grassroots events to boost support and raise money despite the challenges that COVID presents to help expand her network. Barrier To Entry PAC is signed up to host one of these events, and you’re invited!

Despite the great news, we can’t take anything for granted. It will take everything her team has in the next month and half to make sure she wins this primary.

Jessica is born and raised in her district. She is an affordable housing coordinator to serve her community. Her father is a Teamster truck driver and her mom was an administrative assistant. Jessica joined the Navy because she couldn’t afford community college and became the first person in her family to graduate college.

**Jessica understands her district and has more courage to fight for South Dallas than any other candidate in this race.**

Working-class people like Jessica face barriers that often prevent them from running for congress. As a result, many elected officials are not representative of the people in their districts.

We are tired of this. We know you are tired of it too.

**[This is why we’d love for you to join us for an upcoming Jessica Mason Virtual Fundraising Event on February 8th. Can’t make it? Consider donating a few dollars to help Jessica reach her goal and win her primary. We need all the help we can get!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41130000/327472087/214728439?refcode=220127_FR_jessicamasonevent_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YWJmOTVkLWI0N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=srk5GZBkz-jcQW6WKLBAxUinlNPVZgQE-Sa1anqla8Q=)** **______[JOIN THE EVENT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41130001/327472088/1615796118?refcode=220127_FR_jessicamasonevent_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YWJmOTVkLWI0N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=srk5GZBkz-jcQW6WKLBAxUinlNPVZgQE-Sa1anqla8Q=)** **______[DONATE TO JESSICA](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41130004/327472089/214728439?refcode=220127_FR_jessicamasonevent

clean_body: Join our upcoming virtual event! | | | logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4YWJmOTVkLWI0N2YtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=srk5GZBkz-jcQW6WKLBAxUinlNPVZgQE-Sa1anqla8Q= Peter, It’s been a while since we updated you on Jessica Mason, our endorsed candidate running for Congress in TX-30. With less than FIVE WEEKS until her election, we wanted to fill you in on where things are and how you can help Jessica get across the finish line on top, and we hope you will join us on Feb. 8th for a virtual event to get to know her: = A lot has happened since we endorsed her back in early November. Her opponent and 25-year incumbent, Rep. Eddie Bernice Johnson, announced her retirement. This meant a lot of Democrats were eagerly entering the race. Jessica is the only candidate in the race who went in with guns blazing ready to primary EBJ and bring a new voice for her community. This speaks volumes to her courage and commitment to the fight for universal healthcare and increasing the minimum wage. Then, Jessica earned three huge endorsements from New Politics, VoteVets, and Amy McGrath’s organization called Honor Bound. It is no surprise that people are ready to get behind a strong leader who will be the first Black female veteran in Congress. Now, Jessica’s team is putting on virtual grassroots events to boost support and raise money despite the challenges that COVID presents to help expand her network. Barrier To Entry PAC is signed up to host one of these events, and you’re invited! Despite the great news, we can’t take anything for granted. It will take everything her team has in the next month and half to make sure she wins this primary. Jessica is born and raised in her district. She is an affordable housing coordinator to serve her community. Her father is a Teamster truck driver and her mom was an administrative assistant. Jessica joined the Navy because she couldn’t afford community college and became the first person in her family to graduate college. Jessica understands her district and has more courage to fight for South Dallas than any other candidate in this race. Working-class people like Jessica face barriers that often prevent them from running for congress. As a result, many elected officials are not representative of the people in their districts. We are tired of this. We know you are tired of it too. = __= ____ body:
Don't forget to tune in to PCN tonight at 7pm! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/third-gop-gubernatorial-debate-tonight-at-7pm?e=b1ec95759b)

| |

| | **Third GOP Gubernatorial Debate - TONIGHT at 7pm! **
---
| Friend,

Don't forget to tune in tonight, **Thursday, January 27th at 7:00pm** , to the third GOP Gubernatorial Debate, hosted by the Blair County Republican Committee!

The debate will be broadcast LIVE on PCN and via Livestream on the PCN website. More information on how to watch via your TV or online is [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=721c6e14ea&e=b1ec95759b).

Can't watch live? Be on the lookout for videos and highlights in your inbox later this week.

Our campaign to restore Liberty to our great Commonwealth is growing every day because of supporters like you. This is only the beginning!

Yours in the fight,

Bill McSwain
_Republican Candidate for Governor
U.S. Marine Commander
U.S. Attorney appointed by President Trump_

name: Casey Wardynski
subject: Taking back the House in 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
We can’t afford to send weak representatives to Washington anymore. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/638203b0bc9acc16/b84b00a0cdab3dcfc3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from me and my team recently asking for donations to keep my campaign running. I’m so grateful for the support I’ve received, and want to thank every single person who has already sent their financial support. This is going to be an ongoing battle through to November. The Democrats are desperately trying to hold onto their narrow majority in the House, and they’ll do anything to win. We need a strong conservative leader in this seat, and I’m the person for the job. [**I was endorsed by General Michael Flynn last month, who called me a “true patriot.”**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/638203b0bc9acc16/dc287589e073d42bc3d6b838967d376c/36963) He also said we can’t afford to send “weak representatives” to Washington anymore. I’m ready to represent Alabamans in the 5th District, but I need your help to win this election. **[Will you please rush a donation right now to help raise critical funds we need to support out our grassroots operations?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/638203b0bc9acc16/1ef5dd98c2b6ea85c3d6b838967d376c/36963)**

Under President Biden and the rest of the DC Democrats, inflation is at record highs, crime is up in almost every major city in America, there’s a crisis at the border, we’ve lost our energy independence, and so much more. We need a conservative warrior in this seat to fight for Alabama and all Americans. name: Morgan Harper
subject: 3 things I hate about student loan debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220127-569-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=569%2E90090%2Emx7Slh ]Morgan Harper

I intimately know how inaccessible and expensive higher education can be,
especially if you’re low-income, first-generation, or a person of color.
The student loan crisis affects all of us, even if we don’t have our own
student loan debt, because it gatekeeps folks from freely pursuing
education. [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/23135?t=1028&akid=569%2E90090%2Emx7Slh ]If you agree and can afford it, can you rush a donation to
our campaign before our fundraising deadline on January 31?

Here are 3 things I hate about student loan debt:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

1️⃣ 45 million Americans are affected by the student loan debt crisis and
are being crushed under $1.8 trillion in student loan debt.

2️⃣ As a country, we’re allowing kids as young as 17 to take on hundreds
of thousands of dollars of debt and spend the rest of their lives paying
that debt off.

3️⃣ According to the Roosevelt Institute, even erasing $50,000 in student
loan debt per person would immediately increase Black wealth by 40%.^1
Now, imagine if we erased all student loan debt.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Now, I’m calling on you.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/23135?t=1029&akid=569%2E90090%2Emx7Slh ][IMG]

55% of voters, including 52% of Republicans, support cancelling all
current student debt and a majority of voters (51%) believe that student
debt cancellation should apply universally, to all borrowers, and not just
to certain groups such as low-wage workers.^2

But we’re a year into the Biden administration and we’ve seen only the
bare minimum when it comes to student loan debt. It took thousands of
activists and organizers to call on Biden to even see a pause in student
loan debt payments during a global pandemic.

We can’t just elect more Democrats, we’ve got to elect Democrats who
aren’t bankrolled by corporations and who are committed to fighting for
the everyday worker.

I’m committed to fighting the good fight, but I’ll be honest, too often our election
outcomes are determined by how much money a campaign has. Right now we are
barely hanging on. If we don’t meet our end-of-month goal of $8,002 we’ll
have to seriously cut back. [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/23135?t=1030&akid=569%2E90090%2Emx7Slh ]If you can, please donate $5
right now to send me to the Senate so I can fight for student loan debt
cancellation.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/23141?refcode=em20220127-569&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1049&akid=569%2E90090%2Emx7Slh ]Contribute $5

Many thanks,

Morgan

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

1 - [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/23144?t=1050&akid=569%2E90090%2Emx7Slh ]Bloomberg News

2 - [ https://act.morganharper.org/go/23145?t=1051&akid=569%2E90090%2Emx7Slh ]The Appeal

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1052&akid=569%2E90090%2Emx7Slh

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

clean_body: Hey everyone! I wanted to bring this email back to the top of your inbox. We’ve got a busy campaign season ahead of us and will need a robust grassroots support system on our side. Will you join us by donating any amount towards our $3,000 goal right now? [] Cheers, Elise McGovern, Campaign Manager -----Forwarded Message----- [, Goals and lists are two sure-fire ways to make sure we are working smarter and Harder for the folks in OR-06. Today, we’re announcing our first deadline of 2022. We need to raise $3,000 by the end of January to prepare for the months ahead. Can you donate $10 to help us get there? [] Representing Oregon will take passion, skill, and hard work. Here’s a list of 5 reasons why we know Dr. Harder is up to the job! 1. She’s a doctor - Dr. Harder has enjoyed a highly successful 30-year career as a medical professional, working as a clinical physician, outpatient primary care physician, inpatient hospitalist, and in 2017 the Governor appointed her to the Oregon Medical Board. 2. She walks the walk - As the product of public schools and the parent of three public school kids, she understands the challenges public schools are faced with. She’ll be a fierce advocate for every child’s right to a world-class public school and champion more pathways to a promising career. 3. She believes - Dr. Harder is passionate about ensuring her children (and their children) inherit a habitable planet. She’s frustrated by the actions of science deniers in Congress who continue to block meaningful climate change legislation. 4. She loves her state - Longer and hotter summers impact our state’s wine industry and small family farms. Orchards across the state have had massive crop failures due to extreme heat, costing our state jobs and millions of dollars in lost business. Dr. Harder knows that we need to protect Oregon families, prevent the devastation of future wildfires and ensure the survival of Oregon’s agricultural and wine industry. 5. She’s not afraid of hard work - Dr. Harder has been called to Congress to serve the hard-working people of Oregon and she just needs you to join her! Chip in $15 to send an experienced, no-nonsense, hard-working woman to Congress. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 >>> [] DONATE $25 >>> [] DONATE $50 >>> [] DONATE $100 >>> [] DONATE $250 >>> [] DONATE ANY AMOUNT [] Thank you, Dr. Harder for Congress Democrat Kathleen Harder is a doctor who's been on the frontlines to protect her community against COVID-19. Now, she's answering the call for service again, this time to fight for Oregonians in Congress. Donate today to send a science-driven leader to Congress. name: Greg Casar
subject: Update: Sexual assault survivors lawsuit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Peter,
Six years ago, a group of sexual assault survivors came forward to Austin City Council to share their stories. They told me about their traumatic experiences with sexual violence, as well as the extreme difficulty they faced seeking justice from their local police and government. The survivors had to resort to a lawsuit against the city to make change.
Finally, today, the Austin City Council voted to approve a court settlement with the survivors, committing to make serious improvements in our sexual assault response.
Leading up to today’s vote, I sat down with these survivors and advocates to hear about their experiences. Sexual assault is astonishingly common, while honest conversations about its destructive impact are not. We are sharing our conversations publicly to promote healing, listening, and continued change—you can watch our conversations here [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_hS1mCKos10] :
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_hS1mCKos10 [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_hS1mCKos10]Click here to watch our conversations [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_hS1mCKos10]
By listening to survivors, we cleared the backlog of rape evidence, hired more victim services counselors, and improved how we investigate sexual assault cases. But we have a long way to go.
Today’s settlement in and of itself is not a guarantee that Austin will do better. Instead, today’s vote is proof that a future does exist where sexual assault is less common and where justice is more within reach. That future only exists when survivors lead the way and are heard.
I am decidedly, defiantly, and permanently unsettled. I believe anyone who reads through this lawsuit, or really hears these stories, would be. To respect the sacrifice and work of these survivors, we must have these difficult conversations— and remain unsettled— until we create a better city.
Thank you,
-Greg
Greg Casar
Democratic candidate for Texas’s 35th Congressional District
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]
Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
Greg Casar for Congress
P.O. Box 301923
Austin, TX 78703
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: ShawnHyland.com
body:
I am still fighting for a Better America! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/shawnhyland.com/abetteramericastartstoday?e=5167ed8367)
---
| | | | | | _Peter,_ In our pursuit of a _Better America,_ my former congressional website is now a personal site to share my views on critical issues and my vision for this nation. Please encourage your friends to sign up for our email communications to receive the latest updates on this journey.Just like you and so many others, I am concerned about the polarizing narrative that is tearing our country apart. Our society is untethered from the values that once united our nation.America is facing a crisis. It is more than just a fiscal crisis, health crisis, national security crisis, border crisis, or a crime crisis. Though these challenges are real, America has overcome challenges before, and we will overcome them again. The crisis we face today is far more dangerous. We are facing an identity crisis.I believe America is better than how the Far Left has characterized us to be. They intentionally use hatred, animosity, and offense to undermine this country. I believe in a better America. I believe America’s existence has been a force for good in the world. I believe the American way of life, the American dream, and the American spirit of freedom must be defended.I also believe America can be better - one with **stronger families, safer neighborhoods, better schools, and more economic growth for all.** In opposition to these beliefs is the radical agenda of the Far Left. Their policies disrupt and destabilize society in four ways. They **dismantle the family, defund the police, demoralize students, and destroy the work ethic.** Americans will always disagree on the role government should have, but no matter our religious beliefs, our political affiliation, our cultural heritage, or our ethic identity, Americans must stand as one nation to resist the end game of those who seek to tear apart this country. We must rise above the anger of the political extremes. I believe our nation should be commended for the great things it has done and we need to find solutions to the problems that still impact our fellow citizens. Together, I believe we can make America a nation that honors God, loves our neighbors, respects our differences, and holds true to our founding principles.
---
| | | | | |
# A better America starts today!
Thank you, Shawn Hyland|
---
[www.ShawnHyland.com](https://shawnhyland.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=7432e78c7e&e=5167ed8367)
---

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Yesterday's news that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring is huge
#

Friends,
Yesterday's news that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring is huge.
First, I want to say that I'm grateful for Justice Breyer’s decades of service on the Supreme Court.
Second, President Biden made a promise he'd nominate the first Black woman to serve on the court if there was a vacancy. Once he does, the Senate must act swiftly to confirm her.
Third, even with Biden's pick on the bench, we must keep up our fight to expand the Supreme Court and restore its integrity. That means we absolutely cannot let the Senate fall back into Mitch McConnell's hands this November.
If we're going to protect the future of the Supreme Court, we must flip Pennsylvania's open Senate seat and expand on our Democratic majority. That's why I'm asking:
[Can you make a $3 contribution to keep up our momentum and hit our end-of-month fundraising goal? clean_body: Yesterday's news that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring is huge Friends, Yesterday's news that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring is huge. First, I want to say that I'm grateful for Justice Breyer’s decades of service on the Supreme Court. Second, President Biden made a promise he'd nominate the first Black woman to serve on the court if there was a vacancy. Once he does, the Senate must act swiftly to confirm her. Third, even with Biden's pick on the bench, we must keep up our fight to expand the Supreme Court and restore its integrity. That means we absolutely cannot let the Senate fall back into Mitch McConnell's hands this November. If we're going to protect the future of the Supreme Court, we must flip Pennsylvania's open Senate seat and expand on our Democratic majority. # De Gregorio: Josh Gottheimer & DCCC On the Run from Our “Unmatched” Campaign
---
| **FAIR LAWN –** Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, made the following statement in response to the [announcement](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=d2cc03b0d1&e=31104c58a7) that the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (“DCCC”) had added incumbent Josh Gottheimer to its endangered Democrats list: “Since our launch just a few short months ago, our campaign has demonstrated an unmatched ability to garner both grassroots support and resources in the Republican field. This announcement today shows that our movement has unnerved Josh and his allies in Washington because they know that our early success - coupled with Carter-era inflation and foreign policy mishaps - spells trouble for Nancy Pelosi’s favorite puppet.” - **Nick De Gregorio** De Gregorio had previously announced that his campaign would report $403,000 raised on its year-end report for 2021 with $360,000 cash on hand. He has also announced the support District 39 Assemblyman Robert Auth (R, Old Tappan) and Assemblywoman DeAnne DeFuccio (R, Upper Saddle River), along with an impressive showing from CD5 municipal chairs.
---

body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfwLrk~)
It's Adam Schiff. I'm reaching out for the first time this year on behalf of the DCCC with an urgent request:
****
****[The DCCC is just 96 hours away from their first and most important deadline of 2022. This first month of 2022 could set the pace for the election year. Will you help the DCCC start strong and donate $3 to help them meet their goal and defend our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)********
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 1/31, 11:59PM
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)

---

We're facing a pivotal moment.

Across the country, Republicans are attacking our democracy and undermining the right to vote.

And they are being rewarded by their mega donors. GOP war chests have been flooded with $140 million in advance of this contested midterm this November.

**I won 't sugarcoat it: Protecting our House Majority is going to be an uphill battle this year, and we must muster the strength to defend it.**
****
****[That's why I'm coming to you for the first time this year and asking for you to make a donation to the DCCC. We must protect our House Majority from Trump's House Republicans. Can you pitch in $3 before the DCCC's End of Month Deadline in just 96 hours? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hvK~)********
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)

Thank you,

Adam

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46310305&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2Mjk3MzcwNQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46310305&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2Mjk3MzcwNQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). subject: BORDER CRISIS
body:
This is an invasion |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=1cbce42bf1&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

The Biden Administration is now flying illegal aliens from the border straight to our communities. These illegal immigrants are being resettled unchecked and untested. This will have catastrophic effects on the already rampant drug and crime epidemic facing our country.

Since Joe Biden took office only one year ago, over two million illegal aliens have crossed into our homeland. This is the highest level in United States history. If the Republicans fail to take back the Majority and hold this Administration in check, this crisis could be the end of America as we know it.
[If you want to Finish The Wall and Secure The Border, I need your help today.>>>](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=3359eaad64&e=598f6aa24c)
When I am elected, I will ensure that we Finish the Border Wall and put an end to this crisis once and for all. Together, we can take this country back and end the invasion that is being encouraged by Joe Biden and the Radical Left Congress. **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=eb4306dfad&e=598f6aa24c)** Thank you,
David Curry

name: Donna Imam for Congress
subject: Justice Breyer’s Replacement
body:
Replacing Justice Breyer with President Biden’s nominee won’t be enough, here’s what we need to do. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132084/327481440/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTRhNzgwMy1iZDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nmtR5JVwTCtykm8N7RylHu25RfNoH-MF7hk8RK6QUIw=)
I often write to you about flipping Texas blue by winning statewide races. Why? Because Texans have no other choice if we want to ensure reproductive healthcare for our citizens. Last year, the GOP trifecta in Texas passed S.B. 8, which bans reproductive healthcare at the sixth week of pregnancy. **Cruelty is the point of this law. It has no exception for rape or incest, and it creates a bounty system for private individuals and neighbors to collect $10,000 in cold hard cash for enforcement.** If _Roe v. Wade_ is overturned, it would also automatically implement a law already passed by Texas that not only bans reproductive healthcare, but makes it a _felony_ without the need for any legislative intervention. We then also saw Trump’s partisan Supreme Court ruled 5-4 in the dead of night to allow the nation’s most restrictive women's reproductive law to remain in effect. **So, even if we confirm President Biden’s new Supreme Court nominee, SCOTUS remains stacked.** Winning brand-new Congressional seats and flipping Texas statewide is our only way to prevent this from becoming a reality for Texans. If we can win even one of these seats, we can start to reverse the damage and take action to repeal S.B. 8. **[The only way we get rid of the GOP’s ironclad rule over Texas is by getting out the vote and flipping Texas ... and we won’t stop until we do. clean_body: Replacing Justice Breyer with President Biden’s nominee won’t be enough, here’s what we need to do. | = I often write to you about flipping Texas blue by winning statewide races. Why? Because Texans have no other choice if we want to ensure reproductive healthcare for our citizens. Last year, the GOP trifecta in Texas passed S.B. 8, which bans reproductive healthcare at the sixth week of pregnancy. Cruelty is the point of this law. It has no exception for rape or incest, and it creates a bounty system for private individuals and neighbors to collect $10,000 in cold hard cash for enforcement. If Roe v. Wade is overturned, it would also automatically implement a law already passed by Texas that not only bans reproductive healthcare, but makes it a felony without the need for any legislative intervention. We then also saw Trump’s partisan Supreme Court ruled 5-4 in the dead of night to allow the nation’s most restrictive women's reproductive law to remain in effect. So, even if we confirm President Biden’s new Supreme Court nominee, SCOTUS remains stacked. Winning brand-new Congressional seats and flipping Texas statewide is our only way to prevent this from becoming a reality for Texans. If we can win even one of these seats, we can start to reverse the damage and take action to repeal S.B. 8. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = We won’t stop fighting the Texas GOP. Our campaign is doing the work on the ground, and we are determined to do what it takes to turn Texas blue. = Thanks, Donna | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Outside with our furry friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter – despite Marjorie Taylor Greene facing disciplinary action on all fronts, she continues to spew her hateful and treasonous rhetoric. I don’t know about you, but we’re sick and tired of it.
In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]
We are in this together,
Team Holly.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]

name: Gary Black
subject: My plan to secure the border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d076526bff3a6460/f4014d0d02579c99c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — Joe Biden’s terrible policies have created a crisis at the border, and Raphael Warnock’s silence has enabled it every step of the way.**

---
To change course, secure the border, and enforce the law, we MUST fire Warnock. But that’s not enough. Whoever replaces Warnock must take bold action from the start. That’s exactly what I’m offering. **We must put a stop to Biden’s open borders insanity, and I’ll proudly stand up as the enforcer. ** I’ve written an op-ed about what I’ll do to secure the border in the U.S. Senate. [**I hope you’ll read the full thing here, and if you’re able, I hope you’ll contribute to help us get the word out.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d076526bff3a6460/7a1c5ec7cd766727c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d076526bff3a6460/dd01be442429e1c0c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**READ MORE »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d076526bff3a6460/5039532d6c023085c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d076526bff3a6460/6bf8cb872f7c7acdc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d076526bff3a6460/a90f4fc056803da2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

name: Aaron Jacobs
subject: Your donation will have the biggest impact in NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Team, here's why your donation matters the most in New Hampshire.
* New Hampshire may be a small state, but we have **one of the most expensive media markets in the country**. Without your grassroots support, we'd have to take our ads off the air, missing the chance to reach crucial swing voters.
* Extreme GOP groups have spent more against Maggie Hassan than _any other Senate Democrat_ up for reelection – **over $7 million** and counting. If we don't respond to these attacks, it could tip the scales in the GOP's favor.
* In 2016, **New Hampshire was the closest Senate race in the country** , flipping a red seat to blue by just 1,017 votes, and 2022 is shaping up to be even closer.

Former Colorado State Representative is all in for Erik!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SFRnvSJmOJOcLRaI-JcgOyb00Zp-WQUPTydFr-Yp5OCbzYDiIAu9OYNUD8KTj2dq4NMapHMdjM7pIqv9YeWv4gPYTrhPzBVbqbDLxDjBg7NR9yg4ykP7zuh_gIpf8_rIYtYl7c_eGsrqIvABCdjkwS52huKHCenO&c=KcBc6JDGZQd7ntT8dyr0GU-fsNiIO0FLWbu-1DHxTgNY3EjaIFt0JQ==&ch=x64b4t21y2fQ5xVZF4TPgXvuOFCtyLtQOPVfgK0xFi4qAi6BGZubng==)

|
---
| Former Colorado State Rep Rob Fairbank endorses Erik for Congress
---
Former Colorado State Representative Rob Fairbank has announced his endorsement of Erik Aadland, Republican candidate for Congressional District 7.
Rob served in the Colorado legislature from 1999 to 2005, representing parts of Lakewood, Morrison and South Jefferson County. During that time, he was the Majority Caucus Chair, Vice Chairman of the House Finance Committee, and a member of the House Appropriations Committee. Prior to that, Fairbank was the Political Director of the Colorado Republican Party and he managed Bill Owens' successful campaign for Colorado State Treasurer.
"Erik's proven leadership qualities make him the right choice in representing Congressional District 7--part of which I once represented," said Rob. "Erik will work to find common sense solutions to the critical issues facing our country. He will represent Colorado well in Congress."
Rob, currently, is the Executive Director of Government Affairs for Stride Inc., a technology-based education company. 'I'm grateful to have Rob's endorsement," said Erik. "He served the people of Jefferson County well, and his support is important as my campaign continues to build a successful and winning organization."
---

name: V. Demings
subject: the reality is this, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'd rather over-communicate than miss an opportunity to strengthen the grassroots team that will flip this seat blue.
| | |
---
Friend, this may be one of the first emails you've gotten from me, or it very well may be the hundredth _. _

It's not lost on me that amazing supporters like you hear from me a lot over emails – perhaps even more than you hear from some friends and family.

But in a battleground race like this, with Senate control on the line, I'd rather over-communicate than miss an opportunity to strengthen the grassroots team that will flip this seat blue.
Because the reality is this, friend: This team is made up of hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors who are donating an average of just $27 after reading emails just like this one. Thousands of donors are helping make a meaningful difference in the race that can give us the 50th vote for real change in the Senate, like defending voting rights. Friend, it would mean the world to me if you joined that movement by making your first donation today.
The opportunity is right in front of us, friend. CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip blue. Experts at The Cook Political Report _increased_ my chances of winning. But with Mitch McConnell sitting on a massive war chest to protect Marco Rubio, I simply cannot win without your help.
**So please, ahead of my next $25,000 fundraising goal at midnight tonight, will you commit to making your first donation? [Rush a contribution of $5 or more now – or whatever you can spare to help me defeat Marco Rubio – to win in Florida and expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132723/327484108/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2279-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmQzODVmNC1iZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJfFhKd2gqB3eODJzGWKO92RlITPnfFqnpTssTbiz2E=)**

As a little Black girl who grew up poor in the segregated South, I never could have imagined I'd be writing to hundreds of thousands of you each day.

I never could have imagined I'd be running in one of the most important political races in the country.

I never could have imagined that the future of our Democratic Senate majority would come down to what a team of supporters did in moments like this.

But it has. And by now you might know my motto, friend: _Never tire._ I will never tire of the challenges before me. You have my word. That's why I'm so optimistic that, together, we will win. **[If you're with me, chip in a grassroots donation to make it possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132728/327484113/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2279-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmQzODVmNC1iZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJfFhKd2gqB3eODJzGWKO92RlITPnfFqnpTssTbiz2E=)**

With so much gratitude,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132729/327484114/1804727444?refcode=jtk2279-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmQzODVmNC1iZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJfFhKd2gqB3eODJzGWKO92RlITPnfFqnpTssTbiz2E=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132730/327484115/1804727444?refcode=jtk2279-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmQzODVmNC1iZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJfFhKd2gqB3eODJzGWKO92RlITPnfFqnpTssTbiz2E=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132731/327484116/-460395862?refcode=jtk2279-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmQzODVmNC1iZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJfFhKd2gqB3eODJzGWKO92RlITPnfFqnpTssTbiz2E=&emci=4aa2e7b3-8c7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f6d385f4-bf7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. clean_body: I'd rather over-communicate than miss an opportunity to strengthen the grassroots team that will flip this seat blue. | | | Friend, this may be one of the first emails you've gotten from me, or it very well may be the hundredth . It's not lost on me that amazing supporters like you hear from me a lot over emails – perhaps even more than you hear from some friends and family. But in a battleground race like this, with Senate control on the line, I'd rather over-communicate than miss an opportunity to strengthen the grassroots team that will flip this seat blue. Because the reality is this, friend: This team is made up of hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors who are donating an average of just $27 after reading emails just like this one. Thousands of donors are helping make a meaningful difference in the race that can give us the 50th vote for real change in the Senate, like defending voting rights. Friend, it would mean the world to me if you joined that movement by making your first donation today. The opportunity is right in front of us, friend. CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip blue. Experts at The Cook Political Report increased my chances of winning. But with Mitch McConnell sitting on a massive war chest to protect Marco Rubio, I simply cannot win without your help. So please, ahead of my next $25,000 fundraising goal at midnight tonight, will you commit to making your first donation? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = As a little Black girl who grew up poor in the segregated South, I never could have imagined I'd be writing to hundreds of thousands of you each day. I never could have imagined I'd be running in one of the most important political races in the country. I never could have imagined that the future of our Democratic Senate majority would come down to what a team of supporters did in moments like this. But it has. And by now you might know my motto, friend: Never tire. I will never tire of the challenges before me. You have my word. That's why I'm so optimistic that, together, we will win. = With so much gratitude, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team._ By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &
