| | | Great news! DirecTV recently dropped One America News Network from its lineup. This pro-Trump, right-wing network is even crazier than Fox News and has been spreading conspiracy theories about COVID-19 and the 2020 election to millions of households. DirecTV’s actions are a huge blow to OAN, but a number of smaller TV providers are still carrying the network. The spreading of right-wing misinformation is downright dangerous and has cost lives. We need to call on these other providers to drop OAN for good and put an end to their Trump propaganda. [Sign your name: Call on TV providers to drop right-wing network One America News >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f5615a1-4098-497e-a7fe-2cb3057c67cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Fellow Conservative, our dreams of FIRING Lame Duck Speaker Nancy Pelosi won’t come true unless you step up IMMEDIATELY and renew your membership.

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: The Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
It’s never been more clear that we need to do everything in our power to keep the Senate blue.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=88%2E61531%2En-nZnw)
Hello,
With the news of Justice Breyer retiring, it’s never been more clear that we need to do everything in our power to ensure Democrats control the Senate.
That means we have to do everything we can to elect Peter Welch in Vermont. [**Are you with us? Chip in $5 right away to our campaign.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1273?t=3&akid=88%2E61531%2En-nZnw)
Peter has deep roots serving Vermonters. He’s been a vocal, progressive member of the House for 15 years, and got his start in the Vermont state Senate. That’s why, this week, over 700 Vermonters publicly endorsed our campaign.
But if we’re going to elect Peter, we need the resources to fight back against the deep pockets of Mitch McConnell and national Republicans. With the Senate — and the Supreme Court — on the line, we know they’re going to spare no expense trying to buy this seat.
But we have something they don’t: this grassroots team. And since our campaign is taking no contributions from corporate PACs, your contribution goes that much further and means that much more.
[**We cannot afford to lose a single Senate seat, which is why we need to ensure we do everything we can to elect Peter Welch in Vermont. Can you chip in $5 — or whatever you can — right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1273?t=4&akid=88%2E61531%2En-nZnw)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

Thanks for being on our team,
Team Welch

---

name: Bruno Amato
subject: David going up against Goliath
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFE0uIjofAduQty9vNFY-fIJx01XUjbTm2D6OW3zxZqi8wMX-4s00wP75TvOj2Wd4ePWwmaz9mLcyPc1MFkdAPGEhabGZ-Z16Id9N7HtnbTB8yySIUSOpVX2UCUgaIBPOq0u8iP3xUW3vafNDoDDRrwtTvLTnuXD33_ME5M0e8szMCFdAh83CUySIM9iG3A0s0du1GXutfeo5wKpWa_GwoU4Fpq9FWBoqvBXqhtI8c5fZC2IWWrHCZ2lPMi4SzJ5yRIiWgJFsWMTeDFfw7Kby3KQ/3j2/T8KjemwEQdOY4TGTTp9F1A/h0/-mpgpMLIRGUFYWA5iOMAcqKB6eMFq1qcigvYRrRGHIc)
---
I’ve been thinking a lot about an analogy to describe this kind of campaign and I’ve landed on this particular one again and again: David vs. Goliath. We don’t have the power that Kevin McCarthy does, or the influence, or the money. But we make up for that in our grassroots energy and our collective power to finally push for someone in Washington that fights for the people of California’s 23rd District. We have a movement fighting for veterans to get the care they deserve. We have a movement fighting to end racial and economic disparities in our schools. We have a movement fighting to clean up the toxic water in Bakersfield and stop our communities from being poisoned. [**Long story short, we’re David. And in the end, David defeats Goliath despite the odds. We can build a better future for all of us here in California’s 23rd District. But to do that, it will take every single one of us. Chip in a few bucks and help us defeat our Goliath in November.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHY17ljuRoazIfabDUSolajdtxw61C5Lqwni4Y92TUELVfS2K5naxilh6hyazamZ8Is5q-IkHd9WLDzZGlrTDl5RuE8_Ahtdxc0A1HMAgS7kKGWHM8EHlvs2V8fkcxqPtvd0ahQs_F6W5jOxDL-PyiV5JduIDlXhLGd1mEIdFhqInjUas2gPuvEQYb8ycX4y19M9ZuwyZqSEZI-Fddi0T1ELhaiTDCdEttbouwnjdcCgMHYQFnKcV03UKHoKPZmGWsYoyiy3ZRfkjGsb4j8zTmI4FvCz84bhPggztqgAqWsPO/3j2/T8KjemwEQdOY4TGTTp9F1A/h1/ayddTnGIhunFL3E6ZsikxrsGGYsOIoDZwI1doNsFd98) [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHWfNLHZABDRWvYqxqh87ViuWGpI0q9bGLqX2Lej40K9P0ZutRrlrKr6Vokd71n5BUKOYEpKNMolMfikoYhRgrsWbCsFE0GXXqN9gUYQYNbrRrQk9xCPMnSNg4d8TMVHqUde9CBZqy_HCMcJA1g6QvyJAOVPfwNhBIh9pjOVFNUfI_RmpcxmLRmy6-u6XLo8jthsD2EFjtYiAyn-luoadwjy2R_2JCTXGNnULRtx-ab6Yg1EO0dWvgVXCJEqyJs0_YYWF_wrT1bAZI3yFI3izuKSYZaFij2_K4Pl3KjDyIO7b/3j2/T8KjemwEQdOY4TGTTp9F1A/h2/nZEfYuG9CCZYPZ2yBD_io5G0AzeYF5rWs6RUPQL50LU) We know we’re on the right side of history. We’re fighting for people all across the Central Valley and we’re doing it by presenting solutions to the long-lasting problems that Kevin McCarthy has failed to solve while he’s been in Washington for over ten years. Instead, he’s been fighting on behalf of his corporate donors and willfully letting his party get more and more extreme, bending to the will of people like Donald Trump, and forgetting about the people right here in our district. Here’s my promise. I will never forget our community. I will never stop fighting for us. And I know the only way we can get our movement to Congress is if all of us play a part in those efforts. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. clean_body: | | | I’ve been thinking a lot about an analogy to describe this kind of campaign and I’ve landed on this particular one again and again: David vs. Goliath. We don’t have the power that Kevin McCarthy does, or the influence, or the money. But we make up for that in our grassroots energy and our collective power to finally push for someone in Washington that fights for the people of California’s 23rd District. We have a movement fighting for veterans to get the care they deserve. We have a movement fighting to end racial and economic disparities in our schools. We have a movement fighting to clean up the toxic water in Bakersfield and stop our communities from being poisoned. We know we’re on the right side of history. We’re fighting for people all across the Central Valley and we’re doing it by presenting solutions to the long-lasting problems that Kevin McCarthy has failed to solve while he’s been in Washington for over ten years. Instead, he’s been fighting on behalf of his corporate donors and willfully letting his party get more and more extreme, bending to the will of people like Donald Trump, and forgetting about the people right here in our district. Here’s my promise. I will never forget our community. I will never stop fighting for us. And I know the only way we can get our movement to Congress is if all of us play a part in those efforts. In solidarity, Bruno | | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

subject: We want to know your opinion

body:
Team – Matt
and Cynthia are the leaders that Rhode Island deserves. Their plan to
build a Rhode Island for all includes a Green New Deal, a $19 minimum
wage, a tax on the richest 1%, and so much more.

But our opposition is doing everything they can to discredit our movement
and hold on to their power. We can’t afford another 4 years of
conservative control. With so much on the line this year, we must show
that people are demanding change.

That’s why we’re running a poll on Rhode Island’s leadership, and we’ve
hand picked you to share your opinion!

Let us know: Do you approve of Governor McKee and Lieutenant Governor
Matos’ leadership?

Friends, it's Sam, Brad Pfaff’s finance director.

I'm reaching out to give you an update on our end-of-month fundraising goal, **[and then ask for your first $5 donation before Monday’s end-of-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41133469/327486783/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.27_b1_EOM-sam_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.27_b1_eom-sam_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQ2NmFjMi1jMjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-CNUBqa7kFH8szIQ9u9o4AR3hBHpwszVFMwYEzDV3Y=)**

Every day, when Brad and I talk to our campaign's supporters, sometimes we get the question, "it's only winter- why should I donate now?"

Well, if you knew that the money you invested right now would make a huge difference in the fall and allow us to talk to more voters and make sure they know we are running against a dangerous Capitol Insurrectionist, **[would you donate $5 before you closed this email?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41133470/327486784/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.27_b1_EOM-sam_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.27_b1_eom-sam_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQ2NmFjMi1jMjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-CNUBqa7kFH8szIQ9u9o4AR3hBHpwszVFMwYEzDV3Y=)**

Because that's the truth. Every donation that comes in the door today allows us to plan bigger for this fall, and put more funding into our voter outreach programs.

And that's why it's so important that we beat our end-of-month fundraising goal of $5,500 -- thankfully, we're only $3,000 away!

**[Now, I took a look at your supporter record to see if you can help us cross the finish line on this important goal -- and taking a look below, I know that if you can spare your first $5 donation, we'll stay on track to beating this goal:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41133471/327486785/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.27_b1_EOM-sam_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.27_b1_eom-sam_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQ2NmFjMi1jMjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-CNUBqa7kFH8szIQ9u9o4AR3hBHpwszVFMwYEzDV3Y=)** | **[PFAFF FOR CONGRESS SUPPORTER RECORD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41133472/327486786/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.27_b1_EOM-sam_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.27_b1_eom-sam_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGQ2NmFjMi1jMjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z-CNUBqa7kFH8szIQ9u9o4AR3hBHpwszVFMwYEzDV3Y=)**

name: not looking good (6X match to fight back)
subject: The GOP only needs to flip four seats to win the House Majority -- in 2010, they flipped SIXTY-THREEi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
Here's how to stop a repeat in 2022:

|
---

| | [On November 3rd, 2010, the day after the 2010 midterms, we woke up to disaster... House Democrats had been shellacked -- we lost 63 seats to the GOP.

body:
You need more identification to grab a burger in Democrat-run cities than you do to vote. |
_No longer want to receive emails from Andy Barr for Congress? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=4de655e87ee240698251df75c4f86961&_t=CbDvhAYlgGkYjZWpDGXCzMHCqNVGwx5S0uR_wEXLjqhFCBsbX_9jFesIanqr_voNKwXiL3tTkzPJWTtd2tDQch_QnsMi6LMbP8DxYLpcXtSWM2Zw21WTTWNGLS4U1O6oJ_3ZC8L1dEhIpomySSzGcey1N2yG9XGn5xtpJD4p2KQ%3D)._

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4de655e87ee240698251df75c4f86961&_e=npE6UI1kf-tO5BZ2nQyxo03J9_cDmM7ELP9ErIHCa_nLz92miQJSgG6SbfEfJlNhPy74Lghc0_lP_o3wopyNDpM2FqCm0tebzlYEzT5kAwjkR-8kNd0OyoxxVUo9AuaU4rlvBcp3BnGmhYbOCDEbscu_CzR4CskaCMzcoyW5oha1QK0KpuqUNYvabfkjaIrT5ZW1trJ6AVTAMhSfFL92xZ3yzUhJUG6mLwxUQlwMqUHNIc3vjkRJrCzouz0wy5PIvOmT-nYFdJVuR3eRNXnp3nROiuFSVojriYYOA7mkv9qbbUnluakQ5TTjGtDFScjOrHHjhszqTAxF_O4dV8zzvcAyN3fq6teT1GCuy0DkL5wYzWHyZ9eoOF-ajBwx5GC1)

---
Fellow American,

**You need more identification to grab a burger in Democrat-run cities than you do to vote.**

Riddle me this: The Left has taken actions to let non-American’s vote in our elections (without ID) but mandate proof of vaccination and ID to get into restaurants and businesses in many major cities.

It’s ironic at best, but at the core - this policy is simply discriminatory. The same people mandating vaccine identification, called voter identification "racist". Fellow American - _where is the logic?_

It’s time to put some logic back into politics. Our country needs Voter ID laws and common-sense solutions to election reform - [**if you agree, will you chip in $10 to my campaign to send me to Congress to help reform voter ID laws?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4de655e87ee240698251df75c4f86961&_e=npE6UI1kf-tO5BZ2nQyxo03J9_cDmM7ELP9ErIHCa_nLz92miQJSgG6SbfEfJlNhPy74Lghc0_lP_o3wopyNDpM2FqCm0tebzlYEzT5kAwjkR-8kNd0OyoxxVUo9AuaU4rlvBcp3BnGmhYbOCDEbscu_CzR4CskaCMzcoyW5ohaagtE0-N7MhCV4wxZAWYKMa3A1MmBgKF1iiquWLKRER4S1e9iv_0z9oqJBuZNct6MSh9Al09rabmD_3Y2CTZt5sQwTO6PTWxzwiBDXlJkmH9rGew7C5SS_zoAby4xCwIxrA3UBIoO4jN1Q3r_f58LqRAfg8eWGC_80Ct3NyghLhHaNWA3vYIPVkIbcY4vL9FhFFCJtT_AfFMnFvBJzs8Gu)

[** _REFORM VOTER ID LAWS_ ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4de655e87ee240698251df75c4f86961&_e=npE6UI1kf-tO5BZ2nQyxo03J9_cDmM7ELP9ErIHCa_nLz92miQJSgG6SbfEfJlNhPy74Lghc0_lP_o3wopyNDpM2FqCm0tebzlYEzT5kAwjkR-8kNd0OyoxxVUo9AuaU4rlvBcp3BnGmhYbOCDEbscu_CzR4CskaCMzcoyW5ohbOvnfDn10w_L62lvCGywjz5Txdb75WP2yf-_aVIKvVVOY44lZwJMvEg9FEuzEugbkzwFZBnodSQZd--zqjVksSbacGRm2-vYQFHIyzmL74F6hWvVBAOEDUE0rSPvGmbXmaNc1um47lmeca_44yvGpBeTzmIORB0nbo0R33-KdxwwO8VwBXRvpfV4bXwEkvMlfSz2qvIQ8fewxRWblsGKhI)
Democrats have a long history of interfering with voting. The Left has always tried to manipulate the system when it comes to voting. From implementing poll taxes, frivolous reading requirements, and other bogus tests in the Jim Crow era - _they’ve always tried to bend the rules to swing elections in their favor._ Not requiring an ID is just the latest ploy.

Requiring an ID to vote is not racist. _To say so is pushing the soft bigotry of low expectations._

You need an ID to purchase a:
* Home
* Gun
* Alcohol
* Debit card
* Car

I’m calling for Republican’s to restore common-sense voting solutions to our Nation. [**_If you’re with me, please chip in to my campaign today._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4de655e87ee240698251df75c4f86961&_e=npE6UI1kf-tO5BZ2nQyxo03J9_cDmM7ELP9ErIHCa_nLz92miQJSgG6SbfEfJlNhPy74Lghc0_lP_o3wopyNDpM2FqCm0tebzlYEzT5kAwjkR-8kNd0OyoxxVUo9AuaU4rlvBcp3BnGmhYbOCDEbscu_CzR4CskaCMzcoyW5ohb-S_U3IxSxBbeKv8qGEQEHc0t27lnPKSuGRFZ1WwjoqaO2cdPqN-93neW1tnlYdYYZjFTqnIHLrt_xM3jHOuIcD4fHb2CBWVeGxDI9Hu1UAO2F5Ry7oZSu1HjJZ-pvvQvZ8F8z5v6xkWuHmBKfK8Q-L6O2WqCm06PpoCNLCfIDnpUc8QpXFow9pHIo730G_LUqaeCZP60jIrudLjalEA-o)

Thank you,
Andy Barr

[** _REFORM VOTER ID LAWS_ ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4de655e87ee240698251df75c4f86961&_e=npE6UI1kf-tO5BZ2nQyxo03J9_cDmM7ELP9ErIHCa_nLz92miQJSgG6SbfEfJlNhPy74Lghc0_lP_o3wopyNDpM2FqCm0tebzlYEzT5kAwjkR-8kNd0OyoxxVUo9AuaU4rlvBcp3BnGmhYbOCDEbscu_CzR4CskaCMzcoyW5oha0Wrs9TQ_JxfzjjK8_mNhBNArVYJsN7zRAub4-s_e1_sRY-SFKrIGcnCjiq30o3lBbL1TLrBKe12_bi8mKfQhBfj_Rgn7X1CzaaVKuBEVOuZHFDbg9_Xy7HkOguQza9aeCGwheqzai8YTrCMltu2Kq3k8DGXNZESQYGlPmuyzFzt6nAMMSLAB4SXgShT4BTX7FE1mnn3CxX8x45cK2gQv-)

| **MEET ANDY**

subject: What has changed?

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ef15fbc9af84/your-help-is-needed-6722634?e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| [ ](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=7ae752d0b0&e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | **Hello Friend,** **Last week marked a year into Biden’s administration and what can we say has changed? Student loans have not been forgiven. The minimum wage is still at $7.25 per hour. The rate at which our climate is changing can be seen in our very own state with our first snowfall in Denver not happening until last month. ** [**Can I count on you to make a donation today so that we can bring a new generation of leadership to Washington DC?**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=e4d70cb87c&e=e67cbb3f92) **The people in CD1 have been left behind by the empty promises of progress and change from politicians that continue to serve the wealthy and well connected. This is why I am running a grassroots campaign against an establishment corporate incumbent who has held the seat for over 25 years. ** [**Can I count on you to make a donation of $25, $50, $100, or $250 today to help me stand up to the corporate machine I am running against?**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=aa036a825a&e=e67cbb3f92) **The system is rigged against candidates like me who live the struggles of everyday people. We deserve a Representative who will fight to fix the problems our country is facing as if their lives depend on it, because mine does. Thank you for being in this fight with me.** In Solidarity,
Neal Walia
Candidate, CO First Congressional District
www.nealwaliaforcongress.com

Peter,

Yesterday, I announced my candidacy for Rhode Island’s 2nd Congressional district.

Congressman Jim Langevin has served our state with courage, determination, and expertise. When he announced his retirement, I knew we needed a new member of Congress who will continue to fight for the middle class and those struggling to join it. I'm ready to carry on this fight and cannot stand by and allow the possibility that Rhode Island might elect a Republican to Congress this year.

The fight to preserve democracy is the most sacred obligation of our generation. National Republicans like Donald Trump and Kevin McCarthy seek to divide America, undermine democracy, and appeal to the most chaotic, hateful and dangerous elements of their party. With our House majority on the line, it's so critical RI-02 stays blue.

I’m running for Congress because Democrats must keep the majority to maintain our democratic system of government, expand economic opportunity by making college and workforce training more affordable, ensure every child access to universal pre-K, and lower the cost of prescription drugs.

[**We need leaders in Washington who will defend our democratic system of government, unify Americans, and focus on creating jobs and making robust investments in our future. Will you chip in $10 or more to help me launch my campaign for Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41133889/327489086/1121428702?refcode=em22_220127_launch_fnd_gq_ndn___SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220127_launch_fnd_gq_ndn___SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGYxMzhkYi1jNDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPcSb3UJSURQoNNaAUeSd5CCPw59N75tnu1ueN2gd0Y=)

name: Conservative Direct
subject: BREAKING: Top 12 Options To Replace Justice Breyer
body:
Justice Breyer announced his retirement from the Supreme Court today. While speculation abounds on who Joe Biden might select for his replacement, the fact is that it will be extremely difficult to confirm a SCOTUS nominee with only a 51 vote majority in the Senate and two democratic Senators not getting along with the rest [...] -- Justice Breyer announced his retirement from the Supreme Court today. While speculation abounds on who Joe Biden might select for his replacement, the fact is that it will be extremely difficult to confirm a SCOTUS nominee with only a 51 vote majority in the Senate and two democratic Senators not getting along with the rest of the democrats (Senators Manchin and Sinema). This will not stop Biden and his cronies in the Senate from trying to ramrod some horrifying progressive through the confirmation process. As they’re making their nomination decisions, I invite the Biden team to review some of my totally sincere suggestions for the next Justice of the Supreme Court as I am certain they will be better than anyone they come up with: Dead Ruth Bader Ginsberg It would make their base so happy and what’s the difference really? Kim Kardashian She’s a lawyer now and she just divorced liberal enemy non-grata, Kanye West. Ideal candidate. Plus she’s a woman and an ethnic minority. She checks basically all their boxes. Ghislane Maxwell (pronounced Jizz-Lane not Gah-laine I will die on this hill) She just got convicted of sex trafficking and abusing minor girls with Jeffrey Epstein but she’s still alive so she definitely has some dirt. Might as well keep her close. Anthony Scaramucci Provided the best 11 days in American history as the White House Director of Communications, betrayed Trump so the left likes him and he is technically a lawyer (he actually went to Harvard law). His decisions would be like “honest f*ck you” and is that not what we all want? Furonda Brasfield Furonda was famously a contestant on America’s Next Top Model and is now a lawyer. Probably a really good one; I have no idea. What I do know is she was a no-nonsense finalist on one of the most iconic reality shows in the history of the world (don’t @ me on this). No one could be more prepared for SCOTUS. Judge Judy Is there anyone more balanced and fair? Judge Trudy The satirical version of Judge Judy as depicted by the iconic Amanda Bynes on the Teen Nick program The Amanda Show is equally as balanced and fair as Judge Judy but even more spirited. Bring in the dancing lobsters! Atticus Finch He’s a racist now (cannon: Go Set a Watchman) but the left tends to ignore that if it suits them re: Joe Biden. Just nominate the Gregory Peck version specifically and it should be fine. Stacey Abrams She went to Yale law school and is almost as qualified as Judge Trudy or Furonda so she should make the list. Simon Cowell Simon Cowell has a ton of experience serving on judicial panels with even higher stakes than that of the Supreme Court. The constitution actually does not require American citizenship or legal education to serve on SCOTUS. Brett Kavanaugh again They made so much money and had so much fun the last time, it really just makes sense to do it over again. Vladimir Putin Could resolve a few outstanding looming war type issues we have going on. With a roster this deep I don’t know how they could go wrong. |

clean_body: Justice Breyer announced his retirement from the Supreme Court today. While speculation abounds on who Joe Biden might select for his replacement, the fact is that it will be extremely difficult to confirm a SCOTUS nominee with only a 51 vote majority in the Senate and two democratic Senators not getting along with the rest [...] -- Justice Breyer announced his retirement from the Supreme Court today. While speculation abounds on who Joe Biden might select for his replacement, the fact is that it will be extremely difficult to confirm a SCOTUS nominee with only a 51 vote majority in the Senate and two democratic Senators not getting along with the rest of the democrats (Senators Manchin and Sinema). This will not stop Biden and his cronies in the Senate from trying to ramrod some horrifying progressive through the confirmation process. As they’re making their nomination decisions, I invite the Biden team to review some of my totally sincere suggestions for the next Justice of the Supreme Court as I am certain they will be better than anyone they come up with: Dead Ruth Bader Ginsberg It would make their base so happy and what’s the difference really? Kim Kardashian She’s a lawyer now and she just divorced liberal enemy non-grata, Kanye West. Ideal candidate. Plus she’s a woman and an ethnic minority. She checks basically all their boxes. Ghislane Maxwell (pronounced Jizz-Lane not Gah-laine I will die on this hill) She just got convicted of sex trafficking and abusing minor girls with Jeffrey Epstein but she’s still alive so she definitely has some dirt. Might as well keep her close. Anthony Scaramucci Provided the best 11 days in American history as the White House Director of Communications, betrayed Trump so the left likes him and he is technically a lawyer (he actually went to Harvard law). His decisions would be like “honest fck you” and is that not what we all want? Furonda Brasfield Furonda was famously a contestant on America’s Next Top Model and is now a lawyer. Probably a really good one; I have no idea. What I do know is she was a no-nonsense finalist on one of the most iconic reality shows in the history of the world (don’t @ me on this). No one could be more prepared for SCOTUS. Judge Judy Is there anyone more balanced and fair? Judge Trudy The satirical version of Judge Judy as depicted by the iconic Amanda Bynes on the Teen Nick program The Amanda Show is equally as balanced and fair as Judge Judy but even more spirited. Bring in the dancing lobsters! Atticus Finch He’s a racist now (cannon: Go Set a Watchman) but the left tends to ignore that if it suits them re: Joe Biden. Just nominate the Gregory Peck version specifically and it should be fine. Stacey Abrams She went to Yale law school and is almost as qualified as Judge Trudy or Furonda so she should make the list. Simon Cowell Simon Cowell has a ton of experience serving on judicial panels with even higher stakes than that of the Supreme Court. The constitution actually does not require American citizenship or legal education to serve on SCOTUS. Brett Kavanaugh again They made so much money and had so much fun the last time, it really just makes sense to do it over again. Vladimir Putin Could resolve a few outstanding looming war type issues we have going on. With a roster this deep I don’t know how they could go wrong. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dig Deeper... ---
| Friend,

Did you see Rob on Tucker Carlson last night?

It was ELECTRIC!

In August, Rob exposed the secret “midnight flights” that bring thousands of undocumented immigrants from the southern border into Westchester Aiport and then resettled into the New York suburbs.

Now Rob has secured bodycam footage with evidence that they never intended for the public to find out about this.

One government contractor even tells a police officer: “If this gets out....the government is betraying the American people.”

You need to see it for yourself!
[](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=db9eabfd1b&e=3ca66fc65a)

| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=3dd753eb18&e=3ca66fc65a)._

body:
My team is asking about you...
| Peter,
---
My Finance Director just alerted me that you still haven’t accepted your 2022 Election Year Membership with my campaign.
---
As one of my biggest supporters, you’ve fought by my side in the past...

_...but as one of Pelosi’s top targets, I’ll need your sustained support to defeat her._

When we’re celebrating our new House majority on election night, I’m going to be thinking about all the election year members who powered us to victory. I hope you’ll be one of them.

María,

I wanted to give you a quick update on our membership numbers. Right now, we still need another 403 members to hit our January target. Do you think you could follow up with anyone who hasn’t accepted their membership yet?

Thanks, and as always, let’s win this thing!

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: help me bring term limits to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – my opponent Sen. Grassley (R-IA) has spent decades in Washington, yet claims to support term limits. Now, nearly 47 years since we first sent him there, he's served three terms in the House and is running for his EIGHTH term in the Senate despite facing record-low approval ratings.
Forty-seven years is too damn long – no matter who you are. That's why you have my word on this: **If I'm elected as Iowa's next senator, I will limit my terms myself and serve no more than two terms. Period.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41134709/327492224/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk617-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzVjNzJmNC1jNjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0hppmXkLE45RUqtmRTKtKorYHo8SNJj9DX8YtGAACY0=)
**[If you're with me to fight for term limits and flip this seat blue, please, rush a $5 donation – or whatever you can spare – right now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41134710/327492230/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk617-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzVjNzJmNC1jNjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0hppmXkLE45RUqtmRTKtKorYHo8SNJj9DX8YtGAACY0=)**
You see, I don't need 47 years in Washington to get the job done – and I don't want it, either. Making life better for the people you serve doesn't take decades in Washington. It just takes hard work, dedication and the willpower to do it.
Sen. Grassley has proven he's just not up to that task. After nearly half a century in Washington, working families in Iowa and across the country are struggling to get by as the jobs their parents made a good life off of disappear one by one and protections for unions are placed on the chopping block again and again.
**It's no wonder that nearly two-thirds of Iowans want to elect someone new – they're sick and tired of Sen. Grassley's bogus support for term limits and his failed leadership.** That's why I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley, enact term limits on Congress and protect our Senate majority so that Democrats can keep on fighting for working families.
With Iowan voters turning against Grassley like never before, we've got a serious shot to flip this seat blue. But we'll only win with a powerful grassroots team. **That's why I need you with me, Peter.[Please, will you rush a $5 donation right now before my next critical midnight deadline? Every dollar gets us one step closer to defeating Sen. Grassley, protecting our Senate majority and finally bringing term limits to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41134711/327492237/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk617-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzVjNzJmNC1jNjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0hppmXkLE45RUqtmRTKtKorYHo8SNJj9DX8YtGAACY0=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41134712/327492238/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk617-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzVjNzJmNC1jNjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0hppmXkLE45RUqtmRTKtKorYHo8SNJj9DX8YtGAACY0=)
---
Thank you for standing with me.

– Abby

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: UPDATE: Cuellar still running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Even after the FBI raided his home and campaign office, Rep. Henry Cuellar
announced that he’s still running for re-election. We thought he might
drop out of the race, but now we know we have a real race on our hands.

Here’s the thing, though: the FBI raid and the ongoing investigation into
Cuellar is giving Jessica Cisneros a huge opportunity in this primary.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91403?refcode=em20220127-21697&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21697%2E1203867%2EDj_35I ]Politico headline reads Texas primary showdown bursts open agter FBI
raid

Jessica only lost her race against Cuellar in 2020 by 2,746 votes. Jessica
has the corporate-free, progressive policies that people in TX-28 want.
Now, she has the momentum while Cuellar deals with the FBI.

But Cuellar still has millions in campaign cash from the Kochs, Wall
Street, Big Oil, Big Pharma, and corporate PACs. We’re counting on you to
help keep Jessica’s momentum going with grassroots support right away.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91403?refcode=em20220127-21697&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21697%2E1203867%2EDj_35I ]Peter, can
you chip in and split a donation between Jessica’s campaign and Justice
Democrats so we can defeat Cuellar? In-person early voting starts in less
than 3 weeks, and this is a critical moment for Jessica’s campaign.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91403?refcode=em20220127-21697&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21697%2E1203867%2EDj_35I ]Contribute $3

As a reminder, the FBI raid on Cuellar’s home and office is part of an
investigation led by the DOJ team that handles issues related to bribery,
corruption, election crimes, and more. That investigation is related to
ties between U.S. businessmen and Azerbaijan.

An FBI raid is a very bad look for Cuellar, especially this close to the
primary. He may say the investigation will show “no wrongdoing” on his
part, but the public surely is questioning why the FBI was at his house
and campaign office, lugging out boxes of evidence.

This is the moment for Jessica to close the gap and defeat Cuellar. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91403?refcode=em20220127-21697&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21697%2E1203867%2EDj_35I ]If
you can, please split a donation to Jessica and Justice Democrats so we
can show voters that Jessica is the right choice in TX-28.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21697%2E1203867%2EDj_35I ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21697%2E1203867%2EDj_35I ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220127-21697-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21697_1203867_Dj_35I&akid=21697%2E1203867%2EDj_35I

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=21697%2E1203867%2EDj_35I

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Nikki Fried
subject: “Don’t Say Gay”
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
This is a new low

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41134784/327492507/-1987745334?refcode=hb15571&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWY1NDVhNy1jNzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yTO2so8ZVYrl0U2vtk7oJcY7RGSubnrB-6--fyH7X-E=) Peter, Usually, I’d be reaching out today to ask for your help with our January fundraising deadline. But, this week, Ron DeSantis and his GOP allies have gone above and beyond their usual level of authoritarianism, prejudice, and cruelty. So, instead, I want to talk to you about a bill that’s making its way through the Florida legislature. HB 1557 and SB 1834, or, more accurately, the “Don’t Say Gay” bills, prohibit school districts from having in-school discussions about sexual orientation or gender identity and allow parents to sue schools if they feel topics of discussion are inappropriate. I’d tell you what I think about this bill, but this sums it up perfectly: **** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41134785/327492508/-1987745334?refcode=hb15571&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWY1NDVhNy1jNzdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yTO2so8ZVYrl0U2vtk7oJcY7RGSubnrB-6--fyH7X-E=) **This bill will kill Florida students. It takes away one of the most accessible, safe, and reliable sources of support for LGBTQ youth. It’s a legal tool of alienation, discrimination, and suppression, and it’s unbelievably cruel. ** [**But we’re not going to let this happen without a fight, Peter. I’m ready to stand with the LGBTQ community and fight back against DeSantis’ authoritarian cruelty towards Florida students. clean_body: | = Friends, There's one thing we absolutely must do in the next few weeks -- put a field program together. We need to rent space for our headquarters, design and print literature for our volunteers to carry as they walk door-to-door, and get phone lines up and running. = As always I want you to know what your contribution is going toward. We must hire field staff, starting with a field director, to manage our volunteers, voter outreach, and persuasion efforts so we can deploy resources strategically across key areas of our district. I hope you're as excited as I am that we're about to open a headquarters. A well-funded and resourced field team is exactly what we need to flip this district blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for being part of our team and for helping get us to this very important milestone. Kara Hahn Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = = *

There are massive new areas of Tennessee that we'll have to hit hard with our voter outreach efforts. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefMUduXjG0Xl38j10DremYCUx0xtM9IIEAy-63XfjWDn1rWVVdPnOQ4m_IB5SUv6YXOPvZisoWr8Af8TL96Yn-QP9czfs6DfA0pucyE279-tfWch04CGPAqIQpZ2319JmfRfbCpNcUb0Z6Douylw4qoe84BVMvWZWjcJ8uFxbHmV0KFjmw-C9ZKhWpJrWfz9ShoQkPK6cnr4o2fu4nI4LKWr-vSJcXebQUpnNgTjEeUrY/3j2/w4VLRNSPThmvrIK3JiYmuw/h0/ogfp32x2yZ1Dn_Aeyk4qG-G3dW1jEdCnEw__k6B5gQQ) Peter, the new Tennessee Congressional maps are approved: [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEibUDaX1ZfpTKxiSvjXLSax43oUJGa9exJ_OnaMivCVdBCbrnmqeFqeS1TzbWzIWkSgBOXCqYkh09rfINQ9w1l-1hqp4gyjmP-3TSVwE2a9s8BdifFjTjR_VCHD8mrWxN_VFY0qgXXiAIX4RprWlGP4K2XCbCB-fuooysAnuOwN73yw1VPcosn01OQBSjaM3DFBUR3a5aicQUUh3yMMJs6ilmbAnOxhkX3GMjql_k39tdPlM4s74U4gdL8Biwv0FyaQKBsrtrshokGBZJmMmw-ohjuAvK9XsNIthLnozaSi-RQEg8pyTq8bfDdCLi6DJb0oXtpw9Ba_3sQGAvTrDeJ0w/3j2/w4VLRNSPThmvrIK3JiYmuw/h1/nC17Gde-GpigZfzHFwpQAcZHgb97SuxvLE7ChcoE8bc) Plain and simple, this gerrymandering is an attempt to break up our progressive stronghold here in Middle Tennessee. By carving up Nashville into three separate districts, the GOP is trying to erase the voices of Black and brown voters here in Nashville. It’s a shameful, anti-democratic, blatantly racist power-grab. But the GOP should be careful what they wish for.
This progressive movement knows how to organize. Our agenda to deliver for working people resonates across the state — no matter how urban, suburban or rural. And while we look into the new district lines and chart a path forward for this campaign, **we need your support more than ever.**
[**_We can turn this around on the GOP by winning a seat in Congress — but we can’t do it without your support. Peter, will you chip in whatever you can to help us demonstrate that we’ve got what it takes to win this red-to-blue seat?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEibUDaX1ZfpTKxiSvjXLSax43oUJGa9exJ_OnaMivCVdAYAOoVQOBbYZJM3LzVJVN5QyFuOpzS1oZUlstQiXGVFX77NtuIYeZlwQmYl7fU1QdD587nraF1pzTxU4COyhZDa-L0eQvwpxNH5WbD8sHyiy9y-CzOM4JgBDTj0Y_pqerUUOefHx-kBx3b1w8ocExuD5C9GM25DhV9pFk1q1QL6gbHizA35f0wNPIJM4i-Be4-b2BgoyU9f-XvfBfaikRqLbz_yeGS8HJhOyHV5RG_D-ByGJkG9I7KM_Hvl08m939dhlpPN8-1ajK3yNGbEYW3-3CjnkuQEmNEvvtgFwaTew/3j2/w4VLRNSPThmvrIK3JiYmuw/h2/ysUSR7O_pqMTmNcrrVuu9smMXOnEqQNT4h1fmzC7TsY) clean_body: There are massive new areas of Tennessee that we'll have to hit hard with our voter outreach efforts. | | | Peter, the new Tennessee Congressional maps are approved: Plain and simple, this gerrymandering is an attempt to break up our progressive stronghold here in Middle Tennessee. By carving up Nashville into three separate districts, the GOP is trying to erase the voices of Black and brown voters here in Nashville. It’s a shameful, anti-democratic, blatantly racist power-grab. But the GOP should be careful what they wish for. This progressive movement knows how to organize. Our agenda to deliver for working people resonates across the state — no matter how urban, suburban or rural. And while we look into the new district lines and chart a path forward for this campaign, we need your support more than ever. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Odessa is committed to getting a seat at the table for working class Tennesseans and having another organizer in Congress to fight like hell for our future. But to make that happen with these new maps, we’ve got a lot of ground to cover. There are massive new areas of Tennessee that we'll have to hit hard with our voter outreach efforts. To build our momentum, reach new voters, and compete in a red-to-blue race, we’re going to need more resources. Thank you for fighting with us, Peter. In solidarity, Odessa Kelly HQ | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

| | Friend,

I’m thrilled to announce that I just added Marcy Kaptur to the DCCC’s list of 2022 Frontline Members -- a list of incredible incumbent Democrats whose victories are essential to protecting our Democratic House Majority this year.

I’ve seen Marcy’s leadership firsthand, and trust me when I say that we need to keep her powerful voice in Congress.

clean_body: Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. | $9.8 million is an incredible sum of money to raise in three short months. If we're going to pull off a win in November, we MUST close the gap financially. Fellow American, Our opponent just announced his 4th quarter fundraising report, and it was significantly more than what we raised. In fact, it was the most raised by any senate candidate in the whole country! While there was little doubt that national Democrats and special interests would pour money into our opponent's bank account last quarter, it was an eye-popping amount. Over 90% of the money came from outside Georgia! We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap. Our opponent is the top fundraiser in the entire U.S. Senate, so any gift you make will help us chip away at his financial advantage and grow our media fund. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia race, which is a dead heat according to recent polling. I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. While I know money certainly isn't everything in campaigns, it's still important for candidates who are running in statewide races like we are. This race is a TOSS-UP. Because of the cash advantage our opponent holds over us, he will be able to start reaching out to voters sooner than we can via TV ads, radio ads, social media ads, direct mail and billboards. We can't let our opponent get too much of a head start in advertising, so we've got to close the fundraising gap. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Peter,

Pennsylvania is one of just seven states that voting rights advocates are closely monitoring ahead of the crucial midterm elections. GOP State legislators are poised to further restrict voting access for Pennsylvania voters through measures including elimination of mail-in voting, which was just authorized in 2019 (pre-pandemic) and became an invaluable tool for voters as the pandemic spread.

We cannot move backward in our quest for equitable voting rights. Our best defense against state-level voting restrictions like the ones proposed here in Pennsylvania is to enshrine voting rights at the federal level.

I am proud to fight every day to deliver real voting rights reform for Pennsylvanians and all Americans. But if Republicans take back control of the House in November, we’ll lose all the progress we’ve made. The stakes are too high, so we can’t afford to lose a single seat — and that starts right here. But if Republicans take back control of the House in November, we’ll lose all the progress we’ve made. The stakes are too high, so we can’t afford to lose a single seat — and that starts right here. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. Susan's campaign runs on grassroots donations. = = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145971&L=78692&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0tlbGxpV2FyZDAxMjAyMkV1Y2xpZERWRCZzYz1NSzkyMUVNMTI=)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=145971&L=78692&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2R2ZC1tYXRoZW1hdGljcy1hbmQtbG9naWMtY291cnNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0tlbGxpV2FyZDAxMjAyMkV1Y2xpZERWRCZzYz1NSzkyMUVNMTI=) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. body:
#
Friends -
Just this week, FiveThirtyEight put North Carolina on the list of races expected to decide the Senate majority — saying it will be “highly competitive.”
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220127-1-t1&refcode2=313.357359.L9lsdL&t=2&akid=313%2E357359%2EL9lsdL)

name: Alisha Shelton
subject: Why Nebraska is Special
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is one of the most flippable House districts in the country.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41135224/327494148/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220127-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGYzZjU5Yi1jOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRsrHqprT4T4GsvjgjKLdRHKoBG23GzWBsOWU-spdJk=)

| Peter,

Nebraska is a special place. I’ve known since I was young — but it seems like other folks are finally starting to realize it, too.

It’s not just because of our music, our food, our zoo with an aquarium, and our hardworking constituents. **We’re also one of just nine congressional districts in the entire country that voted for President Biden but sent a Republican to the House of Representatives.**

**That means that this is one of the most flippable House districts in the country. I know I can be the candidate to flip this seat, but we need all hands on deck to make it happen.[_Will you join our fight by chipping in $5, $25 or more before our upcoming fundraising deadline?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41135225/327494149/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220127-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGYzZjU5Yi1jOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRsrHqprT4T4GsvjgjKLdRHKoBG23GzWBsOWU-spdJk=)**

I’ve heard over and over again from Nebraskans that they are sick and tired of being left behind by Washington. Politicians consistently show that they are more concerned with personal profit than with what’s best for their constituents, and I’m here to break that cycle. My promise to you is that I will never forget where I came from or who I work for. clean_body: This is one of the most flippable House districts in the country. | = | Peter, Nebraska is a special place. I’ve known since I was young — but it seems like other folks are finally starting to realize it, too. It’s not just because of our music, our food, our zoo with an aquarium, and our hardworking constituents. We’re also one of just nine congressional districts in the entire country that voted for President Biden but sent a Republican to the House of Representatives. That means that this is one of the most flippable House districts in the country. I know I can be the candidate to flip this seat, but we need all hands on deck to make it happen.= | = I’ve heard over and over again from Nebraskans that they are sick and tired of being left behind by Washington. Politicians consistently show that they are more concerned with personal profit than with what’s best for their constituents, and I’m here to break that cycle. My promise to you is that I will never forget where I came from or who I work for. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude for supporters like you, = * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

name: Ryan (Team Demings)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I wake up every morning and fight to elect Val Demings
| | |
---
Friend,

I wake up every morning and fight to elect Val Demings because I know she'll make my family, my friends and my home state of Florida proud. **Today, I'd love to tell you why.**
The first time Val Demings ran for Congress, I was working at a Democratic Party committee writing about upcoming political leaders, and she was one of the only Black women on our radar that cycle. It also meant a lot to me that she is from Florida like I am.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41135269/327494368/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2021-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDRjNzliYy1jOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3e9KptXWPeIAyGhdfMG9BUSYNmVvhZeA9LdVxErRA7s=)
Researching Val Demings more, I learned that she dedicated her life to service, working as a police officer for 27 years. I was so impressed that she extended her love for her community through her police work – just as my cousin Robin did for the Jacksonville Sheriff's Office when I was younger.
So, as soon as I learned about Val Demings' dedication to our state, I knew right away that I had to work for her in some capacity. It's been my dream since I was growing up to show the world that you can be Black and from somewhere like Jacksonville and accomplish big things. Val Demings has proven exactly that to folks like me.
When Chief Demings is elected to the Senate, her election won't just expand our Senate majority, it will have a very real impact on Black kids in Duval County Public Schools and at colleges like Florida State University – and it will make Floridians of all political backgrounds proud to have a Senator who _never tires_ of fighting for them.
**No one knows better than I do that this race will be a challenge. Val Demings is up against Republicans with deep pockets who are spending millions in attack ads against her. It's going to take all hands on deck to overcome that kind of spending, but I know that we can make Florida proud if we work together.**
**[I'm giving everything I have to this race, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 right now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, deliver better leadership to the people of Florida and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41135270/327494370/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2021-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDRjNzliYy1jOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3e9KptXWPeIAyGhdfMG9BUSYNmVvhZeA9LdVxErRA7s=)**
Thanks for joining this grassroots team,

Ryan
Deputy Campaign Manager
Team Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41135271/327494372/1320837545?refcode=jtk2021-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDRjNzliYy1jOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3e9KptXWPeIAyGhdfMG9BUSYNmVvhZeA9LdVxErRA7s=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41135272/327494373/1320837545?refcode=jtk2021-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDRjNzliYy1jOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3e9KptXWPeIAyGhdfMG9BUSYNmVvhZeA9LdVxErRA7s=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41135273/327494377/-460395862?refcode=jtk2021-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDRjNzliYy1jOTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3e9KptXWPeIAyGhdfMG9BUSYNmVvhZeA9LdVxErRA7s=&emci=58694cd3-fe7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b04c79bc-c97f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

When Chief Demings is elected to the Senate, her election won't just expand our Senate majority, it will have a very real impact on Black kids in Duval County Public Schools and at colleges like Florida State University – and it will make Floridians of all political backgrounds proud to have a Senator who never tires of fighting for them. No one knows better than I do that this race will be a challenge. Val Demings is up against Republicans with deep pockets who are spending millions in attack ads against her. It's going to take all hands on deck to overcome that kind of spending, but I know that we can make Florida proud if we work together. = Thanks for joining this grassroots team, Ryan Deputy Campaign Manager Team Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

clean_body: sorry to be so direct | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | This is HISTORIC: President Biden has the opportunity to appoint a new Supreme Court Justice and he signaled he intends to nominate a Black woman – YES! But we’re worried: we’ll never forget that Mitch McConnell BLOCKED President Obama’s SCOTUS nominee in 2016. And then Republicans spent to ram through Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett. | | | | | | Too much is on the line to sit on the sidelines, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Beto HQ
subject: You’re invited: Beers with Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
It’s happening Monday night.
#
**[Join Beto for a beer on Monday night.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52053?utm_source=ema20220127-173531&t=1&akid=173531%2E444211%2EIZvoj6)**
It’ll be good to bring everyone together and talk about what we’re doing to win this election and bring new leadership to Texas. So Beto and Amy are getting together (virtually) with supporters over beers (or your drink of choice), and we want you to be there.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52053?utm_source=ema20220127-173531&t=2&akid=173531%2E444211%2EIZvoj6)
We’re gearing up to reach at least 2 million Texas voters in February by making calls, sending texts, and knocking doors — and scaling up those operations won’t be cheap.
So if you’d like to join Beers with Beto, we’re asking you to chip in $49 or more to help elect Beto as the 49th Governor of Texas. Grassroots supporters like you will power everything we do from now to Election Day.
**[Make your donation now to RSVP to our virtual event Beers with Beto on Monday, January 31st, at 7:00 p.m. CT.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52053?utm_source=ema20220127-173531&t=3&akid=173531%2E444211%2EIZvoj6)**
We hope to see you there!
Thank you,
Beto HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220127-173531-footer&t=4&refcode2=173531_444211_IZvoj6&akid=173531%2E444211%2EIZvoj6)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=5&akid=173531%2E444211%2EIZvoj6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=173531%2E444211%2EIZvoj6)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Stephen Breyer’s retirement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41135529/327495429/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220127_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWZjMzc2MC1jYjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AsPUaEvotvqb7ZNMo76DPnJOFxl0DU0q5YS_9lj6eXk=&emci=2afc3760-cb7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=2efc3760-cb7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)

Folks — After 27 years on the Supreme Court, Justice Stephen Breyer is planning to retire. Justice Breyer has served our country well and worked hard to protect our constitutional rights — from the First Amendment to women’s reproductive rights to accessible health care. Breyer has created a long and important legacy on the bench. Now, President Biden and our Democratic majority have the opportunity to build on that legacy. **I look forward to working together to nominate and confirm a new justice who will fight for our constitutional rights at this critical time in our history.** That means defending reproductive rights, protecting voting rights, preserving our public lands, and more. **I’m going to fight to make sure the U.S. Senate confirms a strong justice who will protect our rights for years to come, a lift — I have learned — that takes an enormous amount of work. While I focus on that, I’m counting on your support to continue powering our critical campaign work. I look forward to working together to nominate and confirm a new justice who will fight for our constitutional rights at this critical time in our history. That means defending reproductive rights, protecting voting rights, preserving our public lands, and more. I’m going to fight to make sure the U.S. Senate confirms a strong justice who will protect our rights for years to come, a lift — I have learned — that takes an enormous amount of work. While I focus on that, I’m counting on your support to continue powering our critical campaign work. Can you add a donation of any amount that works for you? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

name: Team Booker
subject: Bear spray
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Bear spray.

On Tuesday, a sitting United States Senator actually went on National TV
and encouraged Americans to use bear spray on teachers and other
responsible men and women encouraging the use of masks in public.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220127?refcode=em20220127-1504&t=1001&refcode2=1504_346206_MlY6wR&akid=1504%2E346206%2EMlY6wR ]Screenshot of Rand Paul on that show

There’s no doubt that Rand will say this is a joke so he can hide his
hands — but we see him for the reckless, pointless, dangerous,
racketeering sham that he is.

Rather than offering any leadership about saving lives, Rand Paul would
rather incite violent actions towards people who ask him to follow
science. Remember: they used bear spray on January 6th too.

Peter, we’re sick
and tired of politicians who make jokes about a pandemic that’s left over
870,000 people dead in our country. We’re sick and tired of elected
officials making money off us getting sick. We’re sick and tired of Rand
Paul. And that’s why we’re building the historic people-powered campaign
to remove him from office this year.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220127?refcode=em20220127-1504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1504_346206_MlY6wR&akid=1504%2E346206%2EMlY6wR ]If you can afford it, please chip in $5 or whatever you
can to our campaign so we can send Charles to the Senate to fight for us —
and oust Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220127?refcode=em20220127-1504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1504_346206_MlY6wR&akid=1504%2E346206%2EMlY6wR ]Contribute $5

Rand has been representing Kentucky in the U.S. Senate for more than 10
years. For more than a decade, he could have used his power to uplift
Kentuckians and our Commonwealth. But the only person who's benefited from
Rand being in the Senate is Rand himself.

Even now — in the midst of the COVID-19 pandemic — Rand refuses to lift a
finger for the record number of working families who are struggling to
make ends meet and instead whines on Twitter about how “masks don’t work.”
Now, he’s suggesting that people use bear spray on others who ask them to
wear a mask.

He’s consistently ignored Kentuckians and our needs. Instead of fighting
to reduce poverty, protect voting rights, and provide healthcare to all —
he picks petty fights with leaders like Dr. Fauci on national television.
He uses his elected office to profit off the pandemic and trade stocks
with insider knowledge.

It's time to elect someone who's the complete opposite of Rand
Paul, Peter.

Someone who knows what it's like to not have enough money to feed his
family.

Someone who looks at his community and asks, "How can I help?"

Someone who isn't afraid to fight for the right thing even when it isn't
politically convenient.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220127?refcode=em20220127-other-1504&t=1022&refcode2=1504_346206_MlY6wR&akid=1504%2E346206%2EMlY6wR ]Please chip in $5 or anything you can to our campaign
right now — and let’s show Rand that our grassroots movement is strong and
ready to kick him out of office.

— Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220127-1504-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1504_346206_MlY6wR&akid=1504%2E346206%2EMlY6wR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1504%2E346206%2EMlY6wR

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Tragic Consequences of Biden Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Link to must-read article inside >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c5c83f74bf63601d/ed0370c53afaa115c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter,

We’ve all watched in dismay over the last year as our southern border has devolved into complete and total chaos.

Illegal border crossing soared to a record high last year – and Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the Democrats in Congress REFUSE to address the crisis this administration has caused.

Now, we are seeing Joe Biden’s stunning hypocrisy on full display...

As he issues a presidential proclamation for Human Trafficking Prevention Month, former Department of Homeland Security officials are pointing out that the border crisis has led to an increase in human trafficking and should be this administration’s TOP priority.

[**Tap or click to read more from Fox News >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c5c83f74bf63601d/5522cb702ccd7849c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

It’s not just human trafficking on the rise due to the Biden Border Crisis.

The Border Patrol has reported a more than 1,000% increase in fentanyl coming across the border last year... and in 2021, fentanyl overdoses became the leading cause of death for Americans 18-45 years old.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH of Joe Biden and the Democrats dismissing the tragic consequences of their open border agenda.** We must defeat them this November to END the insanity.

\- Kevin
---
id:2022-01-19-18:08:11:120t
---

name: Carole King
subject: Mitch McConnell’s been very clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, it's Carole King. I hope you and everyone you love are well.

In 2009, Mitch McConnell said his number-one priority was to make Barack Obama a one-term president. Then, in 2021, he said “100%” of his focus was on stopping President Biden.

So, the Republican leader’s been very clear: His number-one priority is NOT to help the American people.

[**Will you join me in supporting Democratic Senate candidates in 2022 whose priority IS to help the American people?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&akid=2753%2E9716520%2EROcxtz)

Thankfully, Mitch didn’t achieve his number-one priority in 2009. But this year, he and Senate Republicans continue to obstruct legislation proposed by Democrats that would improve people’s lives.

Refusing to work with Democrats is all part of their strategy. Republicans want to campaign on a claim that Democrats couldn’t get anything done, but that claim is ENTIRELY FALSE!

**In 2021 Democrats delivered:**

Millions of good-paying jobs
Super-charged vaccine distribution
Lower taxes for the middle class
Higher wages and incomes

When Republicans say, “We need change. Give US the majority!” our response must be strong, in unison:

**The change we need is MORE Democrats!**

[**Will you join me in helping Democrats EXPAND their Senate majority in 2022?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&akid=2753%2E9716520%2EROcxtz)

MORE Democrats will allow us to pass essential legislation.
MORE Democrats will protect voting rights for all Americans.
MORE Democrats will give us enduring legislation to protect women’s health—and so much more!

We cannot reward Republicans’ hypocrisy, threats, and disdain for civil discourse by electing or re-electing them.

An expanded Democratic Senate majority will send a message to Republicans whose behavior is so far over the line that it’s in another galaxy. That conduct is unacceptable.

**Democrats have long been allies of hardworking, decent Americans in the fight for truth, transparency, and good faith solutions to the problems that keep families up at night.**

[**Will you join me in helping elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority in 2022?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&akid=2753%2E9716520%2EROcxtz)

This is a pivotal time in American history. So many families are feeling uncertain about the next day, let alone the future. But there are some things you can do to make it better.

Donate whatever you can afford to Democrats.
Protest peacefully if you have the time.
And do not let anyone keep you from voting.

Your donation, your vote, and your participation in even the smallest of ways could make all the difference.

With gratitude and best wishes to you and your family,
\- Carole | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&akid=2753%2E9716520%2EROcxtz)Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority. And yes, Carole really did write this email.
| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220127-CaroleKing-CaroleOriginal-Pros-sl1&akid=2753%2E9716520%2EROcxtz)
---
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=2753_9716520_ROcxtz&akid=2753%2E9716520%2EROcxtz)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2753%2E9716520%2EROcxtz)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2753%2E9716520%2EROcxtz)** to unsubscribe.
