name: Tim
subject: If you cut your own firewood, it’ll warm you twice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2133%2E3611125%2ERH60z7 ][IMG]

Hi there,

My grandpa used to tell me, “If you cut your own firewood, it’ll warm you
twice.”

Well folks, investing in our Senate campaign now is like cutting your own
firewood—it does double the duty.

In a few days we have our first critical fundraising deadline of 2022 and
the window for early campaign investment is quickly closing. If there’s
one thing you can do to help us prepare for a win, it’s to make a donation
now.

I’m counting on my grassroots team to chip in so we can start the election
year off on the strongest foot possible. My team has set a $50,000
end-of-month goal—and if we don’t reach it, we’ll be in bad shape.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6522?t=1007&akid=2133%2E3611125%2ERH60z7 ]Can I count on you, folks, to chip in $20.22 toward our first
critical deadline of this election year? We can’t flip this seat without
you.

name: The A-Team
subject: We've got goals
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41136336/327498690/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2I2NTQ2MS1jZDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5aRKIzzCsdjeXJvRZ--V1BB7dHAG_XiGuPnTGGbytU=&emci=7b051ae5-f97e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=07b65461-cd7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=8410825)
---
Hey folks,

We kicked off Angela's campaign one month ago with an ambitious goal of bringing a new voice to Congress. A voice who will speak truth to power, listen to and uplift the needs of working people, and fight tooth and nail to bring real, transformational change to a stagnant political system.

As we begin 2022 with the deeply frustrating news around Congress' failure to pass voting protections and a Supreme Court hell-bent on overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , it is even more evident that we need to make big changes to our representation _now._

That's why we're setting our fundraising goals high this month.**With so much on the line this year, we need a strong, resolute leader like Angela who will work with the urgency and conviction that is required of this moment.**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41136339/327498693/347518524?refcode=em22_220127_EOM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2I2NTQ2MS1jZDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5aRKIzzCsdjeXJvRZ--V1BB7dHAG_XiGuPnTGGbytU=)
---

**[Will you become a founding donor of Angela's campaign today and help us hit our goal of $4,000? We need a fierce, unrelenting voice like Angela's -- someone who will not stop fighting to protect the rights and urgent needs of everyone in her district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41136342/327498750/347518524?refcode=em22_220127_EOM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2I2NTQ2MS1jZDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5aRKIzzCsdjeXJvRZ--V1BB7dHAG_XiGuPnTGGbytU=)**

We need our grassroots donors to pull through so we can start the year in the best possible place. The money we raise this month will determine the trajectory of our campaign -- including how many new staff members we hire, how many digital ads we can buy, and how many voters we can talk to, so Angela can get her message out far and wide.

**Because we rely on grassroots support, and not corporate PAC money, your donation in any amount makes such a powerful impact.

[Angela is in the ring fighting for all of us, let's get in the ring for her. Become a founding donor of The A-Team and help us hit our fundraising goal today. >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41136346/327498759/347518524?refcode=em22_220127_EOM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2I2NTQ2MS1jZDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5aRKIzzCsdjeXJvRZ--V1BB7dHAG_XiGuPnTGGbytU=)**[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41136350/327498775/347518524?refcode=em22_220127_EOM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2I2NTQ2MS1jZDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5aRKIzzCsdjeXJvRZ--V1BB7dHAG_XiGuPnTGGbytU=)

As we begin 2022 with the deeply frustrating news around Congress' failure to pass voting protections and a Supreme Court hell-bent on overturning Roe v. Wade , it is even more evident that we need to make big changes to our representation now. That's why we're setting our fundraising goals high this month.With so much on the line this year, we need a strong, resolute leader like Angela who will work with the urgency and conviction that is required of this moment. | = = We need our grassroots donors to pull through so we can start the year in the best possible place. The money we raise this month will determine the trajectory of our campaign -- including how many new staff members we hire, how many digital ads we can buy, and how many voters we can talk to, so Angela can get her message out far and wide. name: Shelby Baioni
subject: MEDIA RELEASE: Brice Wiggins Congressional Campaign Raises Over $125,000 in Two Months
body:
62c147b2538240bb858fb99d3882b266.png

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Media Contact:

Shelby Baioni

sbaioni@focusgroupms.com

(228) 325-2954

------------------------------------------------------------

Brice Wiggins Congressional Campaign Raises Over $125,000 in Two Months

For photos accompanying this release, visit:

https://u7061146.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=4tNED-2FM8iDZJQyQ53jATUfZK2EragSb2mWFHFGGdD-2BYKetYUY8nwJB9RiJm-2BQzde8NiAHFRZpuIjR3t1jUkRAwp1cdidsZ8z1ZUwiZ2f7mrwKidpF5TMRnYE9sX8TqCk3mOd_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjluivAV-2BLCIPjimQbTEPU-2BFTEZFOLS7Yq3IabULZ0Ln7EMMLWqPg9M4b5eAglVr3ok5-2BQmEzqIoUpBO9JM1dB8wZkiMHYh-2BVoYfZHD3ewjWFi3-2FFgerXzfIQWBlr-2FbgzmCx5hdMGlHxzs5Tou-2FCUJMD6VqlYaujQOjFHaXuFyxXIEGke82lusQMb8nUOYZTnMIGxE02yAEghayI9QLGIOA-2F-2BoV5DufmKu-2FtZcV6-2BHS84YKXAVS2YepCAPRCoR5ShdaFPlr9o4tqTWSX3-2FlDCW-2FKGrY9A5Yxbs-2BaJUH6nGpik3roYZN0Z7P7RH-2FvKlYD0U-3D

January 27, 2022 PASCAGOULA, Miss. – In the two months between State Senator Brice Wiggins’ congressional campaign announcement on Oct. 25, 2021 and the Dec. 31 FEC (Federal Election Commission) reporting cutoff, his campaign raised over $125,000. FEC reports for all candidates are due by Jan. 31, 2022.

“We went from $0 to over $125,000 in just over two months,” said Wiggins. “Our campaign is resonating with people throughout the Fourth Congressional District. That total came from almost every county in the district.”

The list includes a combination of max donations ($2,900 per person for the primary), those under the $200 level and a large number in between.

Jerry St. Pé, former president of Ingalls Shipbuilding in Pascagoula, who retired after 16 years at the helm and 40 years total at the company, is one of those donors. While he was president, Ingalls built over 40 ships for the Navy.

“I strongly support Brice for several reasons, one of which is the need for effectiveness at the federal level, particularly in the areas of national defense and appropriations,” said St. Pé. “I also know him to be a man of honor who will listen, study the issues and work tirelessly to get things done for the people of South Mississippi just like he has shown us in the state senate. We need Brice right now in Congress.”

Wiggins also filed a report at the state level which reflects a total of over $196,000 in his state senate campaign fund.

This week on Monday, Wiggins took the next step toward candidacy for the June 7, 2022 Congressional primary by qualifying as a candidate with the Mississippi GOP. Mississippi election law requires candidates be qualified by their parties between January 1 and before March 1 to become official.

“I’m running to get things done for all the people of south Mississippi. I pride myself as a State Senator on listening to and being personally available for the people. With determination, experience and my legislative skills, I can make things happen,” said Wiggins. “I will be a dedicated servant leader in D.C. who prioritizes the Fourth Congressional District.”

To learn more and support the campaign, visit bricewiggins.ms. ##

Mississippi State Senator Brice Wiggins (R-Pascagoula) represents District 52 of Mississippi covering south Jackson County, including the cities of Pascagoula, Gautier, and Ocean Springs. He is now running for Congress in Mississippi’s District 4. Brice has generations of ties to the Jackson County area, growing up in Pascagoula as the great-grandson of former mayor Ed Wiggins. He adamantly believes in giving back to his community. His current committee assignments in the Mississippi Senate are: Judiciary, Division A- (Chairman); Judiciary, Division B; Appropriations; Congressional Redistricting; Corrections; Legislative Reapportionment; Education; Medicaid; Ports & Marine Resources and Public Health & Welfare.

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: the incoming attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41136650/327501112/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDIzZTA0NC1jZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUcNK71lUw5nuLnbwCBvFevnUJ18U7vBwjdVy2dYZT4=&emci=193e684b-cd7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7023e044-ce7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41136651/327501113/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDIzZTA0NC1jZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUcNK71lUw5nuLnbwCBvFevnUJ18U7vBwjdVy2dYZT4=&emci=193e684b-cd7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=7023e044-ce7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
When I retired from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service, I felt called to continue to serve my country in a meaningful way. **But never did I expect running for the U.S. Senate that a Super PAC would run $1 million in TV ads attacking me for serving in the United States military.**
They ran ads saying that because my service moved my family and I all over the country, that we weren’t Iowans anymore. They said because I was called upon to work for the likes of great leaders like President Barack Obama and Senator Ted Kennedy, that I somehow lost the ability to represent Iowa. _Really?_
It was offensive to everyone who signs up to serve our nation – an overseas teacher, a diplomat, a Peace Corps volunteer, or a military member. I was particularly appalled at what Gold Star families who gave the ultimate sacrifice must have thought.
Now I’m taking on Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are already readying millions to run even more ridiculous ads against me. I’m a hard target for a GOP hit job, but I’m sure it is coming. We can and must keep the Senate blue and win this seat in Iowa.
Our first end-of-month deadline of 2022 is at midnight January 31st, and if the Super PACs see even one shred of weakness in our fundraising report, they’ll pounce with attacks to try to bury us.

clean_body: Hello, When I retired from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service, I felt called to continue to serve my country in a meaningful way. But never did I expect running for the U.S. Senate that a Super PAC would run $1 million in TV ads attacking me for serving in the United States military. They ran ads saying that because my service moved my family and I all over the country, that we weren’t Iowans anymore. They said because I was called upon to work for the likes of great leaders like President Barack Obama and Senator Ted Kennedy, that I somehow lost the ability to represent Iowa. Really? It was offensive to everyone who signs up to serve our nation – an overseas teacher, a diplomat, a Peace Corps volunteer, or a military member. I was particularly appalled at what Gold Star families who gave the ultimate sacrifice must have thought. Now I’m taking on Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are already readying millions to run even more ridiculous ads against me. I’m a hard target for a GOP hit job, but I’m sure it is coming. We can and must keep the Senate blue and win this seat in Iowa. Our first end-of-month deadline of 2022 is at midnight January 31st, and if the Super PACs see even one shred of weakness in our fundraising report, they’ll pounce with attacks to try to bury us. We’re just $54,139 away from our $250,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. But I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if I’m going to hit this goal and have the resources I need to fight back against the incoming attacks: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The Super PACs attacks are coming, but I know we can fend them off with your help today. Before we ask you to **[chip in an urgent $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41136597/327500703/-217444029?refcode=em-1.27.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzllODVmNi1jZDdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRoDK_9u3roAYHCfOJwDp5UVk6TyC7yTfpxWmpBJzNw=) **to stop Kevin McCarthy from becoming Speaker of the House, here’s a rundown of our pathway to victory here in CA-20.

**» We're mounting a serious campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.** That means launching an unprecedented voter registration push with residents who will be voting against McCarthy for their first time.

**» We're shining a light on McCarthy's neglect of our community.** Local voters are beginning to realize that while McCarthy defends Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene, our community is suffering. CA-20 is one of the poorest regions in the state, and McCarthy isn't doing a damn thing about it.

**» We're countering McCarthy's lies everywhere they appear.** Right now, McCarthy is blanketing our community with misleading information about his record. Folks, We don’t like to beg for donations or use scare tactics like “the sky is falling” when we ask for your support. You’re as much a part of this team as the staff here at headquarters, and the work it takes to keep Colorado blue and defend Michael’s seat is deeply personal. This grassroots team is made up of staff members, generous grassroots donors, and loyal supporters and we’re all here for the same reasons:
* We believe that every child should have a fighting chance, no matter where they grow up.
* We know that climate change is an urgent threat to our way of life and that we have the power to fight it.
* We believe health care should be affordable and no one should be one illness away from losing all they’ve worked for.
* We believe we should leave our democracy stronger for the next generation.
* And we know Michael refuses to accept that our economy and democracy are too broken to fix and he always puts Colorado first over partisan games.

This campaign is about building on Michael’s progress delivering for Coloradans. We don’t need to use scare tactics when the reality of Mitch McConnell leading the Senate into a legislative graveyard is still a recent memory. Your support today helps fund the rapid response efforts we’ll need to set the record straight on Michael’s work, hire and train staff, talk to voters, and so much more. **Please pitch in $10 — or whatever works for your budget — before Monday's end-of-month deadline to help re-elect Michael and help us keep building on the progress he’s made for families in Colorado and nationwide.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41136844/327504543/-625499226?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220127_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2IyYTA1NS1jZjdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IZzOTkBkHGVq7TCQkH-FsKvW_WGtbyexFoTnH1dfWYY=)****

**Peter, Democrat Mark Takano is running for re-election!**

That’s right, this is a big midterm election year, and Mark’s seat in Congress is at stake. But with Republicans desperate to steal our House majority, no seat can be taken for granted.

We’re so proud of Mark’s work in Congress. He’s been a steadfast progressive who’s always fought for the most vulnerable Americans. He’s even taken the lead on a four-day workweek bill in Congress to reduce the labor burden on working families, and it has gained the support of AOC and the Congressional Progressive Caucus.

**And as a gay man, a Japanese-American, and a former teacher,_the representation he brings to Congress is invaluable._**

That’s why to boost momentum for Mark’s re-election campaign, we need YOU to endorse Mark for Congress.

subject: Let's win this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Tanya for Arizona
body:
Sign Tanya's petition today to show the Democrats that we mean business. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/33c072f27d98/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-6722225?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hi friend,

Big news today, the DCCC has added Greg Stanton to their list of vulnerable incumbents. That means they know what we know, they are in trouble in AZ-04! It also means they will pull out all of the stops to defeat Tanya in November.

Team Tanya needs all hands on deck.

We need to get as many petition signatures as possible to get Tanya on the ballot, but also to show the Democrats that we mean business by blowing past our signature total goal.

To do this we need your help!

If you haven't signed Tanya's petition yet, you can sign it [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=53a538964c&e=bd2b55b0e3). Please forward this email to friends, family, and neighbors and ask them to sign as well.

Recent polling shows that Americans are tired of the soaring gas prices, empty store shelves and crime and drugs pouring over our border that are endemic of the Biden Administration.

AZ-04 will be the center of the red wave in 2022 with your help. To join our fight, sign Tanya's petition and sign up to volunteer: [https://tanyaforarizona.com/volunteer](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=7864489267&e=bd2b55b0e3).

If you have any questions about petitions, reach out to our team by replying to this email or texting or calling us at 480-420-7822.

Let's win this!

Thanks,
Team Tanya
---
| | | _The Tanya for Arizona campaign is about what WE CAN do together. WE CAN defend opportunity and freedom, but Tanya will need your help. No act of support is too small so please join our movement today by
[_DONATING_](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=3ea1eabaf1&e=bd2b55b0e3) or _[VOLUNTEERING](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=0db2f491b3&e=bd2b55b0e3)_._

name: Mia McLeod
subject: Our criminal justice system doesn't provide justice at all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
How can we succeed when people are being victimized by those who are supposed to protect them? | | | Friend, For far too many South Carolinians, our criminal justice system doesn't provide justice at all. How can we succeed when people in our state are being victimized by those who are supposed to protect them? **In the General Assembly, I sponsored the _Transparency in Justice Act_ to take on this issue.** I took action to ban no-knock warrants and chokeholds, and end qualified immunity for members of law enforcement who kill civilians without justification. **And as your governor, I will elevate the fight for justice by addressing the systemic factors that disproportionately impact Black and brown people, as well as those that create unsafe environments for all South Carolinians.** **[A more just South Carolina is possible — but I need your help to make change. Chip in to my campaign for governor so we can make systemic change and build a South Carolina that is equitable and just for all.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A37RwJfHfTv7-sTXXJFEnSRikmtrl03sLOGXTC8To-Y-6FNYa6kaUcOPGLkY_q_mrW1MfnRFSFBWxjOWIEZhjJ2kh4jrRW5Wc7nvh2BnuQI1q5J8ZgAOnEcUphGt6zEOWLkKURI11qAz_fhUUmfa3Np_p5jF_9ViVrajPp8u46hRp2W5fMe304vzkhpKa5tr0gIVdh_wPJj4LRoAElukt1FPc-wsrF0GogbjMOBeH-7l1sY4yS9JL3h0Tp5PanVyWsk0Kx81zbUlI4Xy4Yg8VOf5o3R8_oofapcILAf3sE8IMV7KHvC7PtiO3MuuhZS2ZepAXTm0N1HA71D9Qb8yyUh8rYkm-SHIVCCP5kqsGShIAinpubINu3IhydjUf2VrL0unCPtnf3CY_w-7694x2vTk/3j2/nlGOh9-SQEKVMnJObdVQKA/h0/0YQOVPFnzFGksj3VhMo9SZic2oVAodjyUF2IM0qDa38)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed6LmDxcUTbAsMgtdikhdvrXnTY2MT7kny3_crXfF8_A37RwJfHfTv7-sTXXJFEnSRiKUNLs2mwwLi5jcEWs8AnngX2RAnV7Ww_IyrMkSNE2051BI_eSJeRcwcrToQFBFGBCRGIP7BZZNoZ49_0Llvhbg_XkZtYt0U6S1Woeg6nZ6KiAjLmraGDY3JPysZTsdPiIXx8-cbnXfNXGPxqu3_TkU0qADaVqoQbfF2G69ApTpQ4PV-aoRDPLPyJnql7-b7VhRtYLkHb8h4B_gsAnrTzzaa3vF4l-gqUMUNa0rEgYNq8BMBoZW9SDXLk_D6Lw3q8_iu6tp8GI3oH5wvp5FdoGiH8fbW8B0JimAf7Nws6BkNvHV-Hms_vX9NzbvTZ4GJi5ycpaMrMs47Qb8tosJGdQKwG1A1ozqT4seGhlNIyWEFOaIWNYfz1iW31MU9aHClhjRX9ffuk7QS1KCvgeXVzQA/3j2/nlGOh9-SQEKVMnJObdVQKA/h1/b1RaMoZwB4wDFDdCKR_cFRTzA-Z5HWgphV7y1Lw9GRc)

clean_body: How can we succeed when people are being victimized by those who are supposed to protect them? | | | Friend, For far too many South Carolinians, our criminal justice system doesn't provide justice at all. How can we succeed when people in our state are being victimized by those who are supposed to protect them? In the General Assembly, I sponsored the Transparency in Justice Act to take on this issue. I took action to ban no-knock warrants and chokeholds, and end qualified immunity for members of law enforcement who kill civilians without justification. And as your governor, I will elevate the fight for justice by addressing the systemic factors that disproportionately impact Black and brown people, as well as those that create unsafe environments for all South Carolinians. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | My heart goes out to every mother, every parent who lost a child to police violence. No one should have to feel that pain. Thank you for joining me in the fight for a better, more just future. — Mia Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . | | | A stolen right-wing majority on SCOTUS is on the brink of gutting or overturning Roe v. Wade, threatening the reproductive rights of millions.
**My position is clear: I’m pro-choice AF.** And to defend our pro-choice majority in the House, we need to win this open Democratic seat.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC9jTPF1pDN1B-8hLg6YaNR_RgcyVWxZ4MeijXetInl3WpIGhnI0Tfx8fZVxtps-PABKsvqF4xUg32rWEH-wejYwoYZNPsnmKy9w7E8N0kJknVpTHkU1oRhZJ9dFiJkIyc3HPV425aJgsuH-EQuaoWeGIygQxzWUJ5KB74Uo8K1FY_lVJ-YkHn7bCuaiuyUo9LdnhEPlkGBV9jkokIIQpRwbS5GgUl5pXeWe8M7iMJCHvYw_OmhI-ZO0NGDhEb7ZhJU/3j2/xtiugkXlQEuoGz7yg9_Ibw/h0/KmpKqBqGYbsP2yXtsiKBPqbpnIAl2WWO2Dpt8M60VHo)

Right wing extremists across the country are _relentlessly_ attacking our reproductive rights at the state level.
I don’t know about you, but I'm _so tired of_ politicians controlling our bodies – that’s why I'm fighting back against anti-choice efforts to silence us.
**In Congress, I will continue to fight to repeal the Hyde Amendment, pass the Women’s Health Protection Act, and rebalance SCOTUS to restore, protect and expand reproductive rights across the country.**

body:
Team, Hice, Finchem, Marchant, Karamo – they’re just the tip of the iceberg. Trump is bringing a new era of election denial and extremism to our politics.

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

body:

| | Dear Patriot:

Here in Arkansas, we support our Second Amendment.

The Regime doesn't give us our freedoms.

_God does._

But our God-given right to Self-Defense is under attack like never before from the Left.

**They want to take our guns. They say it every day.

_RINOs like my opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, are helping them do it by supporting Red Flag gun confiscation._**

They're defunding the police.

They're letting drug dealers, rapists, and murderers go free. George Soros-funded District Attorneys across our country are refusing to enforce the law.

Crime is out of control, and murders are skyrocketing.

**Meanwhile, they want to make sure that normal, decent, patriotic citizens like you and I can't defend ourselves.**

They want to make sure that all we have is a criminal underclass and a totalitarian overclass.

_There has never been more reason to own a gun. You owe it to yourself and, more importantly, to your family._

Be ready to defend them against the predators that the Left is unleashing against all of us.

**I'm giving away a Radical Firearms 16" SOCOM 5.56 AR-15 Rifle.**

[](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=cd156f24df&e=eda539b26b)

Initially, this was a Christmas giveaway. But, after the Republican National Committee banned me from WinRed, I decided to extend it for Valentine's Day--_because there is no better expression of love than to be ready to defend your loved ones._

[_**Enter today for your chance to win!**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=c5ff43b620&e=eda539b26b)

We'll be choosing the winner at random just before Valentine's Day, and you could end up with a brand new AR-15 at your door.

[_**Though contributing is not required in order to win, I'm hoping you'll also chip into my America First campaign**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a89e66ed7b&e=eda539b26b)[.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e195e58de4&e=eda539b26b)

[_**I need your help to defeat a weak RINO and protect our God-given rights in Washington, so enter my gun giveaway today, and please contribute what you can**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=c517f528df&e=eda539b26b)[. ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=4d220f29ce&e=eda539b26b)

For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. I'm giving away an AR-15 for Valentine's Day!** [_**Enter for your chance to win, and while you're at it, chip in to support my America First congressional campaign**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=c835e0f8c9&e=eda539b26b)[** _._**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=3bf3194cbb&e=eda539b26b)

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403WwCceE4ya5U7jYF_NKTvzz_O7wtthBCALJq8EQV_9ddUgXZbkbvZHpF0rTmAaBLo9TdrpHz3_HxMgqDfJppqP8Oc46QDBixzp-oeC5-vXqSJ2OlHEz3-v4TlbaWBGbGfCU1hE0H8mWTvZYDnRACPgw13FB4D2iQPPGjiHljGQ1NnEt6S-pskDDBlipffiCM-QZRXU2Ejxcn6PZlTzblk1LrGfsFNKA-9DqbPT81ZJAca7uM1ONpJCS-WUlbMFHfwVQvAHYkBn0Un6J0LHYAT0lg2YF2AZA9cQP6-gj7UQ3WEjPEg2Ku0NwcSe4_0dyME1DxE5r5ibSJYK0mFoPJYDgNkCVnQIqqwG5kiijK2WdE41HNt8ymZn8BatiMAJHNt7tple8QRfyLKSQbCrgUKE9FunC6XNhrWOtvb3m0DatvhGcnykQqPWRHlk6Qcrvd-eVPboyftu1DtFMg-ac5hGk/3j2/xdmdjQLYQW-sB1NOrAeqew/h1/Bd7VZkel-QLag3RzFRaRn07NW3zkZAWa0nwKWXtJf3I) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-biggest-fundraiser-in-az-is-also-the-biggest-conspiracy-theorist&email_referrer=email_1422356&email_subject=the-biggest-fundraiser-in-az-is-also-the-biggest-conspiracy-theorist)
That’s right – a far-right fringe state senator just outraised every other state-level candidate and elected official in 2021. And it was her lies, conspiracy theories, and far-right lunacy that helped her raise the cash.

If there was any doubt before, there isn’t now. The far right owns the AZ GOP. The question that remains is whether we’ll have the resources to combat it.

**[Team, money talks, and right now, it’s the far right that’s the loudest in AZ. Will you donate $10 today so we can fight the far right’s growing influence in AZ?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403WwCceE4ya5U7jYF_NKTvzz_O7wtthBCALJq8EQV_9ddUgXZbkbvZHpF0rTmAaBLo_h2mbwo3mvxKXs2Wyuz_hhYm8toFYRut09azJKzXFM28_DVg5rGMpa8EC0ALEldDQC83CNEmvMkyu9fI8TJjqbWn6qvoifoA-DvB6VgOTpYLN00U59x8g09rLdoYoHX9AU2oo-WcIxZeWhs6bRIszq5B0XDLsvZZfVga0q52CJ6Etzzf3ubbFfX3u1LAzbo2r2pVFaiHTxhddH97iJqqkZkQjgp0jhIORrgF6g27Zvhj8DF0kNjMrmIKmJDkZ3Uie-j8Qb-ppDgAR77N2B4Om9YMa1gRhy1lkUIhoWzJRpkGnXse9KJmhRH9uSn2-tlT_lnk_lBO24Uob5FGrz14oRVV7qgQK1wNdRzSTxrF1EaxpEbw9qMwne-v5lwWLWmqIQorwKEmy7uHL76QpJ8rXg/3j2/xdmdjQLYQW-sB1NOrAeqew/h2/uHfWRqncmY5dzHEkPKqem013gxPPVvG1NbqRd5CirpI)** [

Wendy Rogers’ massive fundraising haul puts her above every other AZ Republican on the ballot. Rather than use that cash to launch a national profile, Rogers has said her intent is to grow her influence on the state level instead.

Make no mistake – her campaign cash will grow her influence in the state legislature. If Republicans win control, that cash could propel her into leadership, especially with her desire to continue Trump’s lies. The havoc she would wreak on our state would be unimaginable.

**[Team, if we’re going to stop the growing far-right movement in AZ, we have to do it this year! We can’t let the far-right damage our state any longer. Will you please give a $10 donation to send a message that the far right won’t control AZ any longer?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403WwCceE4ya5U7jYF_NKTvzz_O7wtthBCALJq8EQV_9ddUgXZbkbvZHpF0rTmAaBLo2VMjMSUFPkKGs9qzynxczx-jr__a8WmXnvAPAKHxsDFBo2agJxjdk9nTc0qBOlUm0apJ7rdiEIIQgYhT84bd89PzSpDKvqp-nc3GUptfFtunQYc-MaZE252d9ChWf806HTAk-fg_-CUXG1ldfV-YqSfO7fEosvnbDzS-wUhHLxPvE4P4yat7oc5dHKmE4xXO-f5fkPkH2CU3y6n-rRZc5kc9VOHWv6aQVM4fb26MjWg3upmupbkCYZxcpZbFVJxfYq4KenH98FmV_km6aMCAg9vLJc0ZNhodRk6ocdViMqzS7QyrOxupGwYwM2w1KHbctWe-OQ18FNBhehC_d4fkkA_zjw6f5ut051FHZumerrvGwuyJXucnd122cL5MzHZYsSG_uVLit56nhChtjCvlnw/3j2/xdmdjQLYQW-sB1NOrAeqew/h4/D2fFWSnFtH4_YIVkC7GxAkf6UKwnVAvpqKWm9SFyXuQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAPOiZHoL86xdRqAkJLp1234_0_ax97LeQouvR2rTdO1uIlvrJtM_-PzXSMihhunEARHhJhEPKp_jFNWit7YOFNY-SM2c1RTKyzoK7GLpdTjMsOkVCqduC2tH7foBFJjHDu2sxRl6uh_V-X1ApMRq3Ei4F0gjZyEmVGAGsMvAaGKUkkwHySn3JYqXcaglW-NqQdn3FiMQDefHv4nFikDVgmyJCTUEerIAodaPOPEPzefB04DLLjbQTia1sd_aDJUfQK1MymnRzDTE5bsqnBbhvcH3twD9GSIpnGJQPSCYag6kErjyrh0c1nuWsianExZHvWOz8apRIjAIxE9jEFc8J5lY18CYPTMlwhKuFbz777KgT3Wd5Ns_0wCyibYr5ulms8HP_LN8qqHOn3572lClrddjKPMv6-2RidxWZKLYdv2Jxl8OIblEtrLIiWuwbWGBePTWPjyv8J0Ff-yDeualh51VMgzOjpHBGf3743esWsnRZ7xzB718x62kSUVLuy2Y6Z/3j2/xdmdjQLYQW-sB1NOrAeqew/h5/USiODXd432o4jzGPA8oKUvx6j3v5X43SFmPL4OUERnI)

name: Team Caraveo
subject: re: our Democracy’s future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Are you ready to act?

| | Dr. Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. Dr. Caraveo has been endorsed by **314 Action, Elect Democratic Women, and EMILY’s List**. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. | $9.8 million is an incredible sum of money to raise in three short months. In fact, it was the most raised by any senate candidate in the whole country! While there was little doubt that national Democrats and special interests would pour money into our opponent's bank account last quarter, it was an eye-popping amount. Over 90% of the money came from outside Georgia! We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap. Our opponent is the top fundraiser in the entire U.S. Senate, so any gift you make will help us chip away at his financial advantage and grow our media fund. | | | I'm in disbelief:

**Fox News admitted Republicans are FLEEING the Senate.**

\-- Ohio's Senator called it quits.
\-- Pennsylvania's Senator is out.
\-- North Carolina's Senator is retiring.
\-- Alabama's Senator is stepping down.
\-- And Missouri's Senator is leaving, too!

I cannot emphasize this enough:

We have a once-in-a-lifetime chance to HOLD the House, HOLD the Senate, and keep Democrats in power for another two years.
**
**[So I'm calling on 16,250 Democratic Members to step up before my End of Month deadline to build on this momentum and prove that Democrats have what it takes to WIN. Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can to defend our House Majority and become a 2022 Democratic Member before my End of Month deadline in 96 hours?? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)****
| | _**2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBER**_

**Name: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
** 2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBER: PENDING
DEADLINE: 1/31, 11:59PM**
[Become a 2022 Democratic Member >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)

Republicans might have more cash in the bank than us, **but I know we 're on the right side of history.**

...and to ensure we can continue making progress on all of the issues that are most important to millions of Americans across the country --_**like health care, child care, the Build Back Better Act, Social Security, and our democracy.**_

I hope I can count on you.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: The media is attacking me again...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Help me get my story out! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f3ca4a3621&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
The media is once again turning up the heat on me. They are attacking me on election integrity. They know the truth and they are terrified of me because I speak truth to their BIG LIE!

[**They know if they want to keep Democrats in power – they CANNOT let me win!**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6bd4ab2e17&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=630ba432c0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This Yahoo broadside against my campaign starts as follows:

_On Jan. 6, 2021, Arizona lawmaker Mark Finchem — a practiced peddler of nutso conspiracy theories — stood outside the US Capitol and tweeted his support for the mob seeking to overturn Joe Biden's victory ._

_"What happens when the People feel they have been ignored, and Congress refuses to acknowledge rampant fraud," Finchem wrote, pushing the election lie hatched in the Trump White House._

_Returning home, Finchem not only supported the supposed "audit" of Biden's 2020 win in Arizona but also found a way to make a fast buck off the Maricopa County clown show by selling T-shirts reading "#Proveit."_

_So naturally, when it came time to support a candidate to oversee future Arizona elections, Donald Trump went all-in for Finchem, who marinates in QAnon Kool-Aid when he isn't grifting or hanging out with members of the right-wing Oath Keepers militia._

_"A man who is tough and smart and loves our country," the former president said at his recent rally in the Arizona desert._

_It would be funny if it weren't so scary._

_Finchem, a four-term member of the Arizona House, is part of a larger effort by Trump and his acolytes to hijack the country's election machinery by putting loyalists in charge of the balloting in key states._

You know what? The same-old lies and tricks are starting to tick me off.

This is what gaslighting America looks like, folks. They spend an entire election cycle trying to rob Donald Trump of victory, and then spend the next election cycle that Republicans want to steal elections?

**How dumb do they think we are?**

_But you know what? If every time they are attacking me, they are also attacking President Trump, then I know I’m standing on the right side of history!_

The only reason they are attacking me like this is because I am one of the only candidates for Secretary of State across the nation who is GETTING WORK DONE!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=80b58a64f3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| I have been leading the vanguard of the grassroots election integrity movement all year:
* I paid out of pocket for election integrity hearings in Maricopa when no one else would listen
* I pioneered and developed currency grade ballots and waterproofing.
* I have advanced election integrity nationwide, working with countless state legislators.
* I have been a vocal supporter of President Trump, speaking at his rallies.
* I have introduced legislation, through H.B. 2023 to increase election transparency at the ballot box!

**The media has shown their true colors.**

**_They hate nothing more than President Trump and Election Integrity! And they know I’m the face of it!_**

When you see them get the knives out and start attacking me, you know that’s because we are making tremendous progress, and the Left is getting SCARED.

[_Help us keep the Left SCARED of Election Integrity by donating TODAY! Together we can win Arizona in 2022 and make Arizona the gold standard for Election Integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=512510da59&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Anything you can give helps tremendously!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=877d963903&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=27db7676dd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9c77067523&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4cac1d8f68&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=b44dde174c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=b44dde174c).
---

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: Re: Justice Breyer’s retirement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
Friend –

Yesterday, we learned that Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer plans to retire this year. His departure from our nation’s highest court will leave a hole that must be filled without delay.

I've known Justice Breyer since he served as a counsel on the Senate Judiciary Committee, and I want to thank him for his service to our nation and the rich legacy he will leave behind.

Significantly, Justice Breyer will be remembered for his fierce guardianship of the Constitution as well as his genuine desire to forge friendship and common ground across party lines. When he retires, my colleagues in the Senate must fulfill our Constitutional duty and quickly consider President Biden's nominee to fill his vacancy.

Will you join me in supporting Majority Leader Schumer's commitment to moving quickly on a prompt hearing for President Biden's eventual nominee? Add your name right now.

In these unprecedented times, it has never been more important for us to have a complete court to consider the critical issues facing our country.

The process by which Supreme Court justices are considered by the Senate must return to normal order and not be tainted by politically motivated obstruction, as we saw with Merrick Garland's nomination in 2016.

With the possibility that bad actors in the Senate will pull out their old antics, we must speak out – starting today – about the importance of not obstructing this process.

Will you add your name next to mine in support of Leader Schumer expeditiously considering President Biden's eventual nominee?

Thank you, as always, for speaking out alongside me.

Sincerely,

Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator

name: =?utf-8?Q?Charlie=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Charlie Urges The RNC To Pick Pittsburgh for the 2024 GOP Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Charlie For Governor**
body:
| | | [ ](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=8340760afc&e=df21354de5)
---
| Read Charlie’s letter to RNC Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel urging her to select Pittsburgh as the host city for the 2024 Republican National Convention:

Dear Chairwoman McDaniel,

I’ve enjoyed our time together at RNC meetings and on the stage at CPAC. I’m writing to urge you to select Pittsburgh as the host city for the 2024 Republican National Convention.

Pittsburgh has everything the Republican Party needs for a successful convention and more — plentiful energy, a skilled and dedicated workforce, a growing tech sector and easy accessibility to other parts of the country and the world.

The region’s abundant and affordable energy is driving manufacturing, innovation and technology advances. For example, the Royal Dutch Shell natural gas cracker plant being built in the region represents a multibillion-dollar investment and thousands of construction jobs in our area with similar plants to follow. The estimated $200 million economic impact the convention will bring to the region will be an additional boost to the local economy.

Selecting Pittsburgh will also be historic. The first Republican Party national convention was held in Pittsburgh on February 22, 1856. Later that June the first nominating convention was held in Philadelphia. Pittsburgh has not hosted a convention for either party since then. It’s time to change that.

Holding the convention in Pittsburgh will also give the Republican Party an opportunity to showcase the expanding strength of the Party in southwestern Pennsylvania. Allegheny County has the highest number of registered Republicans of all 67 Pennsylvania counties in the state and in recent years the surrounding counties have all gone from deep Blue to Red in both voting and registration.

Read Charlie's full comments **[HERE](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=151901434c&e=df21354de5)**.

name: Alex Padilla
subject: (bump) SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
this issue is too important to wait.
#

Friends —
In June of last year, Mitch McConnell told a conservative radio host that it’s “highly unlikely” he would allow President Biden to fill a Supreme Court vacancy if he becomes Majority Leader.
So now that news outlets are reporting that Justice Breyer will soon retire from the Supreme Court, President Biden **must** nominate a replacement — and they must be confirmed by the Senate — as soon as possible.
And I fully support President Biden’s call to nominate a Black woman for this seat. I look forward to helping seat a historic and historically unrepresented voice to the Court.
The brutal truth is, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back the Senate and block _any_ nominees President Biden would put forward.
So it’s incredibly important that we get this done before November. We cannot let Republicans block another nominee and further stack the Supreme Court with conservatives.
_As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I will do everything in my power to confirm President Biden’s nominee as quickly as possible._
I look forward to casting my vote, but we need all Senate Democrats united in getting this done as quickly as possible, so I am asking you today to stand with me in calling on President Biden and the Senate to treat this imminent Supreme Court vacancy with the urgency it requires.
[**Add your name: Call on President Biden and the Senate to appoint and confirm a new nominee to the Supreme Court as quickly as possible. We must act now — this issue is too important to wait.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scotus-petition-em-jan22/?source=em220127-1-15&refcode2=608.159979.J-QJlk&akid=608%2E159979%2EJ-QJlk)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/scotus-petition-em-jan22/?source=em220127-1-15&refcode2=608.159979.J-QJlk&akid=608%2E159979%2EJ-QJlk)**
Thank you so much for standing with me in this important moment.
\- Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=608%2E159979%2EJ-QJlk)

subject: A huge loss for Oregon's economy
body:
Oregon just missed out on a huge opportunity. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ebe4d605134c/a-huge-loss-for-oregons-economy?e=7e91be8cad)

| |

---
| | Dear Friend,

Have you heard the devastating news that Intel will be investing billions of dollars in Ohio instead of Oregon? Our state has long been a leader in the tech industry, but years of failed leadership and a lack of coordination have resulted in a situation where _**we are missing out on this huge opportunity for thousands of good-paying jobs and billions of dollars invested in Oregon.**_

As a tech CEO in the semiconductor industry, a member of the Oregon Business Council and Business Oregon, and Board of Trustees Chair of Oregon Institute of Technology, I have been warning about this for years now and am saddened that our leaders have failed to take advantage of this huge opportunity.

Friends, it's never been more clear: **we need a business leader in Salem to ensure we are the economic envy of the United States.** _Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to help send a business leader to the governor's office and fix our economy?_

---
| [Donate Today!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=b37e2f2db5&e=7e91be8cad "Donate Today!")
---
| As a successful small business owner, I know what it takes to make our state a great place to start a business and create good-paying jobs. Instead of antagonizing businesses, **_my administration will partner with businesses to bring about a strong economic recovery._** Won't you join me in the fight to reboot our state?

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

body:
We can’t let GOP leadership bully Liz Cheney into letting Trump off scot-free!
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220127_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=6&akid=1183%2E878179%2EoZ3mSI) Team, we asked you to stand with Liz Cheney after she refused to rule out criminal charges for Donald Trump’s involvement in the January 6th insurrection.

**_But you didn’t sign – and Cheney is still being bombarded by disgusting MAGA attacks DAILY. We don’t know how much longer she can hold out!_** [So we’re reopening our petition for the next [2] HOURS. Republicans have declared all-out WAR on Cheney to save Trump from jail. She needs our support more than ever! SIGN NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220127_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=1183%2E878179%2EoZ3mSI) | [SIGN NOW: Stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220127_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=1183%2E878179%2EoZ3mSI)
---
**UNLESS WE HIT OUR 35,000 SIGNATURE GOAL IN JUST [2] HOURS, LIZ CHENEY COULD FOLD AND LET TRUMP OFF SCOT-FREE. SIGN NOW!**
* * *
Team, the MAGA Party’s leadership is _terrified_ of Liz Cheney.

After Liz Cheney REFUSED to bow down to Trump, they’ve DESTROYED her approval rating, STRIPPED her of her leadership position, and ATTACKED her daily!

All just to save Donald Trump from being punished for the insurrection he helped incite. IT’S PATHETIC!

We don’t always agree with Liz Cheney. **But this time, we have to stand with her.**
[**Please, our petition will only be open for another [2] HOURS. Don’t let Trump get off scot-free. Sign NOW to stand with Liz Cheney »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220127_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=9&akid=1183%2E878179%2EoZ3mSI)

We need a wave of grassroots support to meet our end-of-month deadline and defeat Zinke. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132533/327483329/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=) Friend, In this email, I’m going to ask you to make a [**donation of $3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132537/327483333/63357279?refcode=em-1.27.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=) to help us hit our first end-of-month fundraising goal of 2022. It’s critical that we start the election year on a high note, so let me explain why your contribution is so important.

**This month, the Republicans’ largest super PAC—The Congressional Leadership Fund—announced they’ll be backing Ryan Zinke in the coming midterm. That means heaps of out-of-state money are about to be dumped into Montana on ruthless attack ads and mailers to turn friends and neighbors against me.**

Zinke and his allies have one goal in this race: to whitewash his shameful record, turn this seat red, and give Republicans control of the House.

We need to beat back these attacks and shed light on the real issues facing Montana families. That’s how we win, and it’s why your support is so critical:

[**Will you donate my campaign today to help us counter the wave of attacks headed our way? We set out to raise $14,000 in online contributions before our deadline, and $3 from you would go a long way in getting us there.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132541/327483337/655314317?refcode=em-1.27.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132545/327483341/655314317?refcode=em-1.27.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=)

| [Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132562/327483360/655314317?refcode=em-1.27.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=)
---
**We know where Ryan Zinke’s priorities lie.**

He had his chance, and it’s clear he’s not interested in supporting Montana families or bolstering small businesses. He’s in this race to enrich himself and the special interests funneling cash into his campaign.

You deserve a leader who understands the issues Montana families are experiencing. You deserve someone whose local roots and experience delivering for rural communities gives them the backbone to stand up to Washington. And you deserve someone who will make sure Montana continues to be a place where our children can grow and thrive.

[**Chip in a donation of $3 so we can hit our end-of-month goal and keep up our momentum going to defeat Ryan Zinke.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132564/327483362/655314317?refcode=em-1.27.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=)
**[Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132567/327483364/655314317?refcode=em-1.27.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=)**
---

Your support means the world to me,
_Cora_
Paid for by Cora for Montana

Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132569/327483367/-1800721441?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=&emci=19735bc6-a87f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=b7762088-be7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=37373330) Consider supporting Cora's campaign [by making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41132571/327483369/1820125544?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/19735bc6-a87f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/b7762088-be7f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzc2MjA4OC1iZTdmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XyxUycFGVdb982rj-_k99AIvs-ikPgtolEkw7c8PDxo=&id=143536037).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chief=20Bell?=
subject: It’s time to take a stand against Communism!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Listen right away | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/breitbart-4657308?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=8be43e6338&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,
For years, I have traveled across the nation leading a fight against the very real threat that is Communism in America.

Communism and other similar woke ideologies have infiltrated nearly every American institution. [**_Our school system shoves anti-American agendas down our children’s throats. Our military has turned into a soft, liberal institution. Even our sports leagues have gone woke_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f85404a585&e=af4b86f5c6).

Recently, I encouraged the U.S. to finally do something about this obvious threat and boycott the Olympics. Very few are bold enough to speak the truth but we are not alone! Just last week, the Golden State Warriors owner Chamath Palihapitiya courageously put Big Tech’s feet to the fire by saying they don’t care about China’s persecution of Muslims.

The time is now to keep China accountable. The Chinese Communist Party has been wreaking havoc on our country for too long. Joe Biden, Democrats, and weak Republicans are too afraid to address this. I am not afraid of the CCP.

America is our **_home_** and we cannot let it be torn apart by people who **_hate_** us. I’m running for Congress so I can lead a fight against the communists and against woke Big Tech so we can make America what it is supposed to be. _The land of the free is not free if Big Tech and Big Business continue to bow down to the Chinese and globalists._

Support my campaign so we can finally stand up and make our public schools pro-America, make our sports leagues pro-America and strengthen our military’s leadership. [**_We need to take a stand now or else America, as we know it, is gone_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=9d087ba63e&e=af4b86f5c6)!

Thank you for your support,
**Jarome Bell
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=98044e502e&e=af4b86f5c6)

Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate

P.S.**: [Woke Leftist ideologies and Communism are the root of so many of the problems that are tearing America apart. _We need to take a stand and put Americans first so we can create a better culture and future for America._ Join the fight to start putting Americans first, before all other foreign threats! Thank you for your support](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=a8a2f08dc9&e=af4b86f5c6)!

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Right now, it looks like we’re going to miss this deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This isn’t the email we were hoping to send today.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220127-2752-header&t=1&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp)
We’ll be honest here. This isn’t the email we were hoping to send today. But unfortunately, it’s the one that we have to send.
We’re only 64% of the way towards our $150K end-of-month goal right now. **If we’re going to get there, the response to this email has to be one of the best we’ve ever seen.**
You see, most people who read this email aren’t going to donate. If you’re reading this far, you’re already one of our top supporters. And it’s why we’re asking for your help.
[Our movement is fueled overwhelmingly by small-dollar donations to emails just like this one. Your support is the foundation of our organizing. If you can afford it, will you make a $3 donation to boost our progressive momentum?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220127?refcode=em20220127-2752-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2752_2526796_fEUnCp&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220127?refcode=em20220127-2752-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2752_2526796_fEUnCp&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp)**
We set this goal because we understand a fundamental reality: The enemies that dumped _millions_ into our primary opponent’s campaign last year are not gone. Wall Street and Trump donors still have a ton of financial power to try and stop our progressive agenda.
It’s already started. So far, there are three Republican opponents that we know are exploring a run against Alexandria — including our opponent from last year who spent over $10 million trying to unseat us.
That’s a lot of negative ads and attacks that we’ll have to be prepared to defend against, all while organizing on the ground in New York’s 14th.
[We don’t have any Wall Street allies to fuel this campaign. We don’t want them. From day one, this movement has been built by everyday folks – teachers, nurses, firefighters, and even the occasional bartender – chipping in whatever they can afford. Will you be one of them?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220127?refcode=em20220127-2752-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2752_2526796_fEUnCp&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp)
Making up this ground won’t be easy. But we’ve never set the aspirations of this movement around what is just easy, but what needs to be done.
Thank you for being with us.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220127?refcode=em20220127-2752-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2752_2526796_fEUnCp&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220127-2752-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=24&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2752%2E2526796%2EfEUnCp)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
clean_body: This isn’t the email we were hoping to send today. We’ll be honest here. This isn’t the email we were hoping to send today. But unfortunately, it’s the one that we have to send. We’re only 64% of the way towards our $150K end-of-month goal right now. If we’re going to get there, the response to this email has to be one of the best we’ve ever seen. You see, most people who read this email aren’t going to donate. If you’re reading this far, you’re already one of our top supporters. And it’s why we’re asking for your help. We set this goal because we understand a fundamental reality: The enemies that dumped millions into our primary opponent’s campaign last year are not gone. Wall Street and Trump donors still have a ton of financial power to try and stop our progressive agenda. It’s already started. So far, there are three Republican opponents that we know are exploring a run against Alexandria — including our opponent from last year who spent over $10 million trying to unseat us. That’s a lot of negative ads and attacks that we’ll have to be prepared to defend against, all while organizing on the ground in New York’s 14th. Making up this ground won’t be easy. But we’ve never set the aspirations of this movement around what is just easy, but what needs to be done. Thank you for being with us. In solidarity, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: John Fetterman
subject: BREAKING: Dr. Oz update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Yes, Dr. Oz really spent half a million dollars on ads in ONE DAY.
#
Derek, my team and I just got some exclusive information, and it’s not good news:
**Dr. Oz spent half a MILLION dollars in one day on television ads in Pennsylvania. 📺**
That’s a *lot* of money. Though it’s not too surprising.
In the last four weeks alone, Republicans and their super PACs spent nearly $15 million on TV advertisements. And the last time this seat was up for re-election in 2016, it was the *single* most expensive race in PA history.
Still, Dr. Oz’s single-day dollar dump is _unprecedented._
With so many millionaire GOP challengers (and their super PACs) running for Senate in Pennsylvania, I think there’s a preettttttyyy good chance our race will break that record. 🤯
**That’s why every single dollar you donate to this campaign makes a world of difference, Derek.** If we’re going to keep up with the millionaires + their super PACs, we need to increase our momentum NOW and carry it through Election Day.
**I’m humbly asking:[Can you rush a donation today so that we can launch our own TV ads soon and keep up with Republicans Dr. Oz, David McCormick, and their GOP super PACs?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42098?refcode=ema20220127-4357&t=1&akid=4357%2E434096%2EreKoEH)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42098?refcode=em20220127-4357&t=2&akid=4357%2E434096%2EreKoEH)**
We know that our campaign is powerfully supported by grassroots donors, unlike anything we’ve ever seen in Pennsylvania. But that doesn’t take away the fact that the unlimited power of super PACs + self-funded millionaires can easily overpower the work of the people if we’re not prepared.
**We gotta be prepared for whatever Dr. Oz and his powerful friends throw our way.**
**[Please, if you can afford it today, please make a donation of $HPC to help us fight back against our GOP opponents and get our own TV ads on the air. Every dollar you give makes a difference in a grassroots campaign like ours.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42098?refcode=em20220127-4357&t=3&akid=4357%2E434096%2EreKoEH)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42098?refcode=em20220127-4357&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4357%2E434096%2EreKoEH)**
Whether you can give today or not, I’m incredibly grateful that you’re on the team. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220127-4357-footer&t=23&refcode2=4357_434096_reKoEH&akid=4357%2E434096%2EreKoEH)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Joe Biden wins America’s Biggest Liar for... Peter, Welcome to the Blundies, where I’m giving out awards for some of Biden's Biggest Blunders in his first year in office. In today’s installment, I’m both excited and disgusted to award the Biggest Lie to Joe for his famous line: "I'm not gonna shut down the country, I'm gonna shut down the virus!" This comes as no surprise, Peter. Joe and his Democrat buddies are notorious for broken promises and dashed dreams. It’s always the same story with these guys! One look at skyrocketing COVID rates coupled with a nationwide test shortage tells everyone what a failure Joe is. Even worse, people are making more staying at home than working, causing an insane workers shortage! Joe didn’t fail this country alone, he had a great supporting cast: House Democrats! That’s why it’s vital we take back the House in 2022 and loosen Joe Biden’s stranglehold on America. It’s going to take all of us fighting! Are you in? Thank you, Jesse Jensen Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. In the Army, he led troops in combat and took out high-value targets. Now, he’s taking on the politicians in D.C. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB, TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY. Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress

name: Matt Jacobs for Congress
subject: Matt Jacobs Decisively Wins Ventura County Republican Party Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Jacobs received 81% of the votes cast by GOP Central Committee [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=60e1ed5252ff45828eee611319454851&_e=b-Rq1MZvg5NsJyoTiHYqfl-VBs64GgohpVRVox8DtE8RfVIzz3y18ISgZcRnasKXeFrLzprlJIssel7VQ-HxKYdGfj52k1976We3hMP46OfnlGWRSWOx7P0cHI60EfLXDIN1la4guXUACE_eGGc6F9IEP3gXyGjRbR1Uwb1bMLgX_OYGOaCuj0grXbqHOSjWLuEpQJ0clwRZp8KJwRAlaV9f_lZkXCLz3LTimIaObSIhkByRUU-4Iwhv9suaSk6IkSHAQJlT86SA1nasD_6cRw%3D%3D) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **January 27, 2022** **Contact:[press@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com")** **Website:**[**www.MattJacobsForCongress.com**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=60e1ed5252ff45828eee611319454851&_e=b-Rq1MZvg5NsJyoTiHYqfqGbpNrAVrsNuL5YUF6WqqbQQLIqdJR9j0YkwoyFx9nIJ2wmTEg_PwXDmrIRYDJvRy7AbWsQFvSvGac6q7XmkzhspjnEsGXdpqrhcCitJcglTr-C4gMtx3mEI5hlR8xtlx5luc1DWG3UbyZxnQ3XNVmH-7fQ64--tK2RqTABQx4pS_HnPUjp_kToZ3-w6F2V7ULAZVV5oTAvVUOyyvb9KyKdvkFOBGUlXHvoDcPV57_2BpRXy8GKQZQ4kgfyqxdk3g%3D%3D) **Contact:[press@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com")** **Website:**[**www.MattJacobsForCongress.com**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=60e1ed5252ff45828eee611319454851&_e=b-Rq1MZvg5NsJyoTiHYqfqGbpNrAVrsNuL5YUF6WqqbQQLIqdJR9j0YkwoyFx9nIFPLkEqMjnswwVI85vgcJua2-nZ-K28PwaMgLARs0o3g1NZ247RzfByZ68CWStcH0rgCCPF2EosdPwRtO8Fay8t-a0rIsTQYLsJ_eMIN7x8-kc62EsKkIzJNTiCV1n3B9p0txMkuxP8ipMm7CGx2-ZQq7d7Eb6ubPE2A4J821xsX276mTv3pX6PZZvrH0_ZPV3NJfncBulBa7cXuZrVRxxQ%3D%3D) **MATT JACOBS DECISIVELY WINS****VENTURA COUNTY REPUBLICAN PARTY ENDORSEMENT** _Jacobs received 81% of the votes cast by GOP Central Committee_ **Thousand Oaks, CA -** Matt Jacobs, former federal prosecutor who successfully spent his career prosecuting America’s worst enemies - child sex traffickers, mafia bosses, and high-level al-Qaeda terrorists - **received, by an overwhelming majority, the endorsement of the Ventura County Republican Party for the 26th Congressional District. ** **_“With Matt Jacobs, we can take back the 26th Congressional District,”_** said Ventura County Republican Party Chairman John Andersen. **_“Matt has repeatedly proven he has what it takes to defeat incumbent Democrat Julia Brownley – record-breaking off-year fundraising, impressive local and national support, and a grassroots ground game knocking thousands of doors in January 2022 alone. The Ventura County Republican Party and conservatives throughout the district are eager to join Matt’s efforts and win in June and November.” _** **_“I’m honored to have the Ventura County Republican Party’s endorsement,”_** said Jacobs. **_The VCRP stands firmly for values we all hold dear – individual liberty, limited government, free enterprise, and equality of opportunity. Their endorsement proves that we have the grassroots support necessary to take back this seat, and I’m thrilled to work alongside local Party leaders who care so deeply about our community and country._** Since entering the race last January, Matt Jacobs has been coalescing Republican and local support around his candidacy. In addition to the Ventura County Republican Party, Matt Jacobs has been endorsed by: CA DELEGATION ENDORSEMENTS **Rep. Kevin McCarthy** _House Republican Leader _ **Rep. Ken Calvert ** **Rep. Young Kim ** **Rep. Doug LaMalfa ** **Rep. Jay Obernolte ** **Rep. Michelle Steel ** **Rep. David Valadao ** **Former Rep. Mimi Walters ** LOCAL ENDORSEMENTS **Ventura County Deputy Sheriffs’ Association ** **Ventura County Professional Peace Officers’ Association ** **National Latino Peace Officers Association, Advocacy** **Judge Steven Hintz** _Ventura County Treasurer-Tax Collector_ **Keith Mashburn** _Mayor of Simi Valley _ **Frank Visco** _Former Chairman of the CAGOP _ **Mike Osborn** _Former Chairman of Ventura County Republican Party _ **Tony Strickland** _Former State Senator _ **Mike Antonovich,**_Former Los Angeles County Supervisor _ **Denis Weber** _Councilmember / Former Mayor of Agoura Hills _ **Mike Morgan** _Former Mayor / Councilmember of Camarillo _ **Barbra Williamson** _Former Councilmember of Simi Valley _ **Dallas Lawrence** _Las Virgenes Unified School District Board Member_ In addition to his strong grassroots organization, Jacobs is the Republican fundraising leader in CA-26 raising $850,000 in 2021 — the most ever by a challenger in CA-26 in the non-election year. Cycle-to-date, Matt Jacobs has outraised incumbent Democrat Julia Brownley in individual contributions, and in the first 10 months of 2021, **he raised more than the last 3 Republican nominees combined in 6 years.** ### **About Matt Jacobs -** As the grandson of a World War II veteran and two Holocaust survivors who came to this country as refugees, Matt has always been deeply proud and grateful to be an American. That pride and gratitude led Matt to pursue a career as a federal prosecutor, where he investigated and prosecuted some of America’s worst enemies and most dangerous criminals – including al-Qaeda terrorists, child sex traffickers, mafia bosses, leaders of violent street gangs, opioid traffickers and many others. For his success in protecting our country and communities, Matt earned “Prosecutor of the Year” and “True American Hero” awards from national law enforcement organizations. Born and raised in Ventura County, Matt attended Conejo Valley public schools and was valedictorian of his Thousand Oaks High School class. He went to UCLA on an academic scholarship (graduating in the top 1% of his class) before earning a master’s degree in public affairs from Princeton and a law degree from NYU. Matt and his wife Julie are blessed to be the parents of Benjamin, Alexander and Abigail. They live in Westlake Village, just miles from Matt’s childhood home in Thousand Oaks. | | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=60e1ed5252ff45828eee611319454851&_e=b-Rq1MZvg5NsJyoTiHYqfucLO9i6ao_OgchiIsF2YfwoDjcbSlfCNlgRb-r8zf9Wm5D3jR7CaGNWBCHwmuLgVz6TlRdod9RHkvF5b2_v1ZHAC906z6Xf_49LJcA5HOTQh8j0UDJWD1VhBRhBlZICd3fENGtOO7gNxBckEzkZoFnkYsMDV29IQnz8zy2OtA6XuYkqxxsqx3T9rJMtRlR41Ek8aapBz374P4B2BdxXS-AEHwsHRMk1G1rBYgfrhviUT4Yx6LeOUsU28q5pO4rCZQ%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=60e1ed5252ff45828eee611319454851&_e=b-Rq1MZvg5NsJyoTiHYqfi2I4g0riBNNU47H6l5JQWKbj0OamaUci6o90eVduINuezuBcV-Niscseq2HsgrfT5EfzbgT8alGMRmR-LRZXf4ud3JleFIiXwk3pyqD-H6Rga_oIQ_AYr7YEFJc1HvKYS_UX8C3TleCqbSSZ_NjIMpu-OdtkwXAAHebdUTgTU-frtbWl5_ny6dRRtT0GEncbZERXBS25MIrcN0cQEwhndQQl8NZZG__WhsnTCF0Vef74Q0lMzuxv9VHi-fjUkmWRw%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=60e1ed5252ff45828eee611319454851&_e=b-Rq1MZvg5NsJyoTiHYqfgD1V0co9shD4x8XzAxu3eV_UnXBQzTEaTxaGXBOb6bTHAPRc2T33ZWP1BuaYQ6RxTDCqKZN0pxShsgwU9X48KguAJ-Qqt_Yt_ioq5ise546fMYXbq0uIyzKCAEIaHy5htDNKRxPHXmzxQXBbT3oTbv6o7UAyOFgxkDvJvEa4l2MrjmCt-BHgjaADLr7wZxxohHUOghFKHeDVn7EopOwwEtScfFAAifJ0pumyeDC04pn_U4cFF0PrQDL5Llz6adsytq498iqw7lpcK1zJPh8GH8%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=60e1ed5252ff45828eee611319454851&_e=b-Rq1MZvg5NsJyoTiHYqfjirgTrwY66qIRfIysSXoe_BWKzmxM4jb_GVlliTxw0FoaJONX1oPbq02ydrwq7LbdhZBr0UX3P_d_nS5Uq92PXH4JNGWmQGRZ82fJJVGnfQop-fcKIIEirWM_1lqYuCTjbZuSziqkekrkxYSqnlv8F6dKYe5S1gSSb8jEZLlx4kGPw8cukp_CDxhDoZAS3EuZX_c57w5WxPKArRuclCW9Tz3Q7rkr2Y0bJ2GOil5ghRlgzXjp5jKN6ha4pkN4cXFVmDOGtlcCyjFgWNOFJfI7k%3D)
