name: =?utf-8?Q?Betsy=20Johnson?=
subject: No BS…for a change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Run Betsy Run
body:
[](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=77784944b2&e=b87254c2cd) |
---
Dear Friend, Oregon is ready for change. Are you? I believe only the people of Oregon, not the leadership of the two political parties, can fix Oregon's broken politics and broken state government. That's what separates me from every other candidate running for governor. It's why I'm running for governor as an independent leader - loyal only to the people of Oregon. You don't have to leave the Republican or Democratic Party to support me - you only have to want a better Oregon. I don't care if you voted for Biden or Trump - I want to you to join me in putting the state we love above partisan stalemate and ceaseless bickering. [**I need your help today to build a powerful, populist grassroots movement to help change Oregon for the better. Please join me today and help fuel our movement with $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can.**](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=a0a35ffb26&e=b87254c2cd) | [Donate Today ](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=ae6c6edb03&e=b87254c2cd)
---
You know me. I believe in honest straight talk. I don't engage in BS. I recently told a newspaper reporter that I'm an equal opportunity pisser-offer. I believe a lot of people would back me up on that.
To fix what's wrong with Oregon, we need a governor who will clearly speak her mind, who can force the two parties to work together, and who will lead where Kate Brown has too often failed.
Here's what you can expect right away from Governor Betsy:
I'll be an independent voice that represents the independent spirit of Oregon -- not a voice for any single political party, region, or ideology. I'll stand up to the unions to keep our kids in classrooms and schools open five days week. I'll put an end to Kate Brown's vaccine and mask mandates.
I won't abandon Portland or other neighborhoods to a never-ending homeless crisis and runaway violence. I'll be a champion for good jobs where we need them - especially in rural communities. I'll fight the effects of climate change by actively managing our forests to prevent catastrophic wildfires.
And I'll never, ever forget that it's usually working families and job-creating small businesses that bear the biggest burden of the excessive taxes and regulations dreamed up in Salem.
[Donate Today ](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=d301a6310f&e=b87254c2cd)
---
Running outside of the two political parties isn't the easy choice. I'll be a punching bag for both political extremes. But it's the right choice for Oregon. Real change will only come from the people - not the political parties. And change begins with you.
Are you with me? I'm certainly counting on it.
Sincerely,
Betsy
| [ Donate Today ](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=81874fc1d0&e=b87254c2cd)
---
* * *
Paid for by Run Betsy Run

This movement is powered by grassroots supporters like you and it's so important that we work together to capture Oregon’s independent spirit. But we still understand if you'd prefer not to recieve emails anymore.
To update your email preferences or unsubscribe, [click here](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=81558e5d2e&e=b87254c2cd&c=a82f491f19).
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) by Run Betsy Run.

name: Team Morganize
subject: We only have an hour left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Help us wish Morgan good luck!
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220127-574-footer-ak&t=2&akid=574%2E90090%2EYxF2Gx)
We have an urgent request.
Morgan is getting ready to walk on stage and debate Josh Mandel. Unfortunately, we’re still $7,982 away from our monthly goal, but Morgan needs to focus on the debate.
[**Morgan has a lot to cover tonight, and we don’t want her to be distracted at all by the pressure of fundraising. Can you pitch in anything you can before Morgan takes the stage to show how strong our grassroots movement is?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/23445?t=3&akid=574%2E90090%2EYxF2Gx)
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/23445?t=4&akid=574%2E90090%2EYxF2Gx)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/23451?refcode=em20220127-574&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=574%2E90090%2EYxF2Gx)**
Thank you for being a part of our campaign! **And don’t forget to tune into the debate on Matter News at 7pm ET tonight. Here’s all the links to stream the debate live:**
**[Watch on Twitch »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/23202?t=24&akid=574%2E90090%2EYxF2Gx)**
**[Watch on Facebook »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/23203?t=25&akid=574%2E90090%2EYxF2Gx)**

**[Watch on Twitter »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/23205?t=27&akid=574%2E90090%2EYxF2Gx)**
— Team Morganize
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220127-574-footer&t=28&refcode2=574_90090_YxF2Gx&akid=574%2E90090%2EYxF2Gx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I believe that a safer future is possible, and I will never stop fighting for it.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Meeting this goal will make or break our ability to push forward.
#

Friends, because of supporters like you, we've accomplished so much in the fight against gun violence.
We’ve elected gun safety candidates up and down the ballot, and have been holding the gun lobby accountable so we can save lives. We appreciate you being on our team—but today, I am reaching out with a special request:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution towards our $115,000 fundraising goal before our Monday end-of-month deadline? Pitch in here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?refcode=em220127-2-30&t=1&refcode2=1488_3935704_2rsIIh&akid=1488%2E3935704%2E2rsIIh)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220127-2-30&t=20&refcode2=1488_3935704_2rsIIh&akid=1488%2E3935704%2E2rsIIh)**

| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220127-2-30&t=21&refcode2=1488_3935704_2rsIIh&akid=1488%2E3935704%2E2rsIIh)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220127-2-30&t=23&refcode2=1488_3935704_2rsIIh&akid=1488%2E3935704%2E2rsIIh)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220127-2-30&t=24&refcode2=1488_3935704_2rsIIh&akid=1488%2E3935704%2E2rsIIh)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22-eom?express_lane=true&refcode=em220127-2-30&t=25&refcode2=1488_3935704_2rsIIh&akid=1488%2E3935704%2E2rsIIh)**
---
****
We’ve set a fundraising goal of $115,000, so your $3 contribution will bring us one step closer to hitting that goal.
Meeting this goal will make or break our ability to push forward. There is a lot on the line—we fight day in and day out against the gun lobby to stop them from unraveling decades of gun safety progress and all of our honest work. And we are not going to give up.
I believe that a safer future is possible, and I will never stop fighting for it.
Thank you for doing your part.
All my best,
Gabby

clean_body: Meeting this goal will make or break our ability to push forward. Friends, because of supporters like you, we've accomplished so much in the fight against gun violence. We’ve elected gun safety candidates up and down the ballot, and have been holding the gun lobby accountable so we can save lives. We appreciate you being on our team—but today, I am reaching out with a special request: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | We’ve set a fundraising goal of $115,000, so your $3 contribution will bring us one step closer to hitting that goal. Meeting this goal will make or break our ability to push forward. There is a lot on the line—we fight day in and day out against the gun lobby to stop them from unraveling decades of gun safety progress and all of our honest work. And we are not going to give up. I believe that a safer future is possible, and I will never stop fighting for it. Thank you for doing your part. All my best, Gabby ** Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

| | | Friend, **_Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is set to retire_** , and it just might leave a big decision in the hands of liberal Washington politicians like Maggie Hassan, Chuck Schumer, and Elizabeth Warren... **If we thought that D.C. was holding back the 603 before, just wait until progressive Democrats shape the highest court in the land for decades to come!** You and I know that if they get their way, this pick will be nothing more than a far-left activist who is set on remaking our nation into something that none of us recognize, and none of us want. It’s yet another reason why we need to win big in New Hampshire this year and flip the U.S. Senate red! **_[Will you support that effort today?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODcyNzcyNzg1OTk5MTkwMDUwJmM9cDN6NSZlPTAmYj04ODUxOTMxMzkmZD11NWcxaTlj.JPmtnBHoSHU3IEY3dS11tJSc_2Z7u2V0aMdjLlklKS0)_**

And our best chance of stopping D.C. from making this bad choice might just be winning in a razor-thin Senate. ** That’s why I hope you’ll get behind my launch to become New Hampshire’s next U.S. Senator - I want to make sure Washington doesn’t hold us back even more!

subject: What I’ve been hearing from voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA
body:
We need a representative who is focused on building trust and loyalty with Montanans. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yTtiGbGjuBaxUEGTPCIZqpnr5saUBUhznlKjrv480ip7FHtRxND7mNwuh5AQf3pK6Ynjc8YcsbAUSxUd6ax_mr5HVZmB2tzV8mgshuPU63QKNazT9iC3cgFKzGIXIMdWi44vRj2OCY7GSYI1inHQPK6JChSftTbXW9CfRoAYPj-LIeDuzdbp3YRlY3ZSYL4dNP-AXbQh9KyREKuU5o6QDGULEfahNkgzxtExCr1GM2MDJwNHlK1irICsymptPKAmFrARgDpcETM3jdKwl0W7Dz8BgEC_eU0kzgvtq3hUChf3PsCokZYImZpnNrFJu34ZsU-UfiaZa5kNN6NnhM0xh6/3j2/rdbivj_gR-uASl40Xc1-FA/h0/gkLtsIHWxK5BIyEy7YNDCZ7n2IKFLY_cj1PtsuBuWTA) Hi Friend,

Our first monthly fundraising deadline of this election year is approaching, and we’ve set an ambitious goal: $10,000 from grassroots supporters like you. I want to be honest about why we’ve set this goal. You see, it’s going to take a lot to defeat a corrupt, self-serving, multi-millionaire in Ryan Zinke. But if we continue building our momentum, we are going to have a real shot at winning this thing.

While Ryan Zinke is spending his days in California raking in kickbacks from his time in government, I am staying right here in Montana, where I work for my living and work to earn the vote of everyone I can – from any side of the political spectrum.

I’ve met with countless Montanans in recent weeks, and the overwhelming message I’ve received from voters is that life just isn’t as stable as it used to be. Our communities are still suffering from this pandemic, both economically and from a public health perspective.

**At a time that is so uncertain for so many Montana families, we need a representative who is focused on building trust and loyalty with Montanans – not with Donald Trump and the far-right GOP who are trying to unravel our democracy.**
****_**[I’ll be the representative who serves the people. That’s why I’m humbly asking: Can you make a grassroots donation of $5 to power our campaign and reach our $10,000 January goal?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yTtiGbGjuBaxUEGTPCIZqpnr5saUBUhznlKjrv480ip7FHtRxND7mNwuh5AQf3pK6Ynjc8YcsbAUSxUd6ax_mrty8Lq8lhueaH69-Oz18GC5_ATxmeeXzA9ZF5J-097Ghmb_17cVO9uph6fDo0Z3Lpbk68tNLfUpKdnCpWwX3_vitPtTjiAK9gOb9HDoYMOFQAWIo4K7TWbebksO1Hljs5XT5-ch8x4R8jvCIntdsHr5gMLxcrwTTkTsH1gphl5LMbWftuy6L7yq9vvJ8ysYc0BLoEV7SYAaAQx-9pIdmDfgjq_53TtcEhWvFEABs5edO9ArXAE9YT2X6ijrUggD7S/3j2/rdbivj_gR-uASl40Xc1-FA/h1/GdJLv4WoDFfUV8w92WShj-UVujTQMyVWD2ULwrLQBBI)

Another thing I’ve been hearing a lot from voters is that they are anxious about the future and are having a hard time believing that we can return some stability to our community. The main reason we’re feeling this way is because billionaires are ruling our state and our government – and they sure as hell don’t care about making life any easier for working class folks like you and me.

**Because of everything billionaires and corrupt politicians have done to shake our system, 56% of Americans can’t afford a $1,000 emergency, according to CNBC. Take a moment to think about that. Jeff Bezos, Elon Musk, and Ryan Zinke can make endless amounts of money – but a majority of Americans are a second away from total financial havoc.**

_**[I believe that the corrupt class’s days of power are numbered – but only if we work together. That starts by electing a representative who will work tirelessly to stop them. I’ll be that representative. So please, make a donation of $5 to help us reach our January fundraising goal and restore our democracy.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y9EMk1-51Kul8D8mBdqO3ZCfg-oxqEls-YAMwdzS4Dd6jfYOPFNYR0R0IpPfA21QgCRMn3ZpNDud9D400l4DEAhZ1tOdK48LRVIkcGhAom9iIzGChdPrkFK4fyNGsTqVnpZmuvAQ1EKYKZSrweHYhPBd9pVnkygSbpY79FM1xp0yWGxqNl5MGDhbQ_nHTcFXsB2dw82I7M7C6M3awihWnaubIGgtNG9K1h2aruCtwB1PZQla-XqsY53wj5LtgaZSrAoMZKdbq1ns2u30-22tXs7WN9E--2CCkwtNo1TH6frRpDxoxbzeigS_Li49_ykcTmDF7Xpg-3wXenhNi-_UO-/3j2/rdbivj_gR-uASl40Xc1-FA/h7/wCjIdI1tcifuDESD5Cy8iX6pkaByUC23i2zSrLww5cs)**_

clean_body: We need a representative who is focused on building trust and loyalty with Montanans. | | | Hi Friend, Our first monthly fundraising deadline of this election year is approaching, and we’ve set an ambitious goal: $10,000 from grassroots supporters like you. I want to be honest about why we’ve set this goal. You see, it’s going to take a lot to defeat a corrupt, self-serving, multi-millionaire in Ryan Zinke. But if we continue building our momentum, we are going to have a real shot at winning this thing. While Ryan Zinke is spending his days in California raking in kickbacks from his time in government, I am staying right here in Montana, where I work for my living and work to earn the vote of everyone I can – from any side of the political spectrum. I’ve met with countless Montanans in recent weeks, and the overwhelming message I’ve received from voters is that life just isn’t as stable as it used to be. Our communities are still suffering from this pandemic, both economically and from a public health perspective. At a time that is so uncertain for so many Montana families, we need a representative who is focused on building trust and loyalty with Montanans – not with Donald Trump and the far-right GOP who are trying to unravel our democracy. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Another thing I’ve been hearing a lot from voters is that they are anxious about the future and are having a hard time believing that we can return some stability to our community. The main reason we’re feeling this way is because billionaires are ruling our state and our government – and they sure as hell don’t care about making life any easier for working class folks like you and me. Because of everything billionaires and corrupt politicians have done to shake our system, 56% of Americans can’t afford a $1,000 emergency, according to CNBC. Take a moment to think about that. Jeff Bezos, Elon Musk, and Ryan Zinke can make endless amounts of money – but a majority of Americans are a second away from total financial havoc. ** The only way to preserve the rule of the people in this country is for the people themselves to stand up and claim it. I’m glad to have you in this with me. Thank you, Tom PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana PO Box 1592 Polson, MT 59860 | | Sent via . name: Nick Freitas
subject: See me on Hannity tonight at 9:30 EST
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
Friends, **[Yesterday in the Virginia House of Delegates, I took to the floor to call out the radical Left for ruthlessly slandering my constituents and conservatives across the Commonwealth.](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=b5a3ff11c1ab47598f2175faf7cf582f&_e=4x3h7440ZRYLP3tyfxUysyD88ZYTqP4gtat49WKAb3GrS2bk7QMYBTp4qj2uMd-E8H8D2daex55TfnwyOR09iEty4AdEDoYCsrNPyyX_dIt9tkYElOKlKsgotjazBLuWGVwRDqO6_h4fGDMziIAJkKXgDw31QWzVXePJrvrd8_T3DXd0svmDlPIbIKpXxFaCBOVwwg_HL10SKTWeLqFJ6h73XlyaKTfADNCIkG3k_vvH9NEm2wmtNAzc6XdBrXy0DhDEktafr4iqYf79SSabEFa1xvo9jcuYXfqwGA9QiwSCrLz6JkoCG4vkn-62BYF_XAYHeTuV-O2aQ-YDzSewBQ%3D%3D)** Month after month, we've seen Democrats rail against anyone who disagrees with them as a racist, sexist, bigot.

_Just yesterday, one Democrat went so far as to claim that Governor Glenn Youngkin wasn't a "true Christian" because he wants to end mandatory mask rules and opposes Critical Race Theory._ Another Leftist even alleged that "Segregationists control VA again." **Why?** Because Republicans want to give kids trapped in failing government schools the ability to obtain a good education elsewhere, regardless of what zip code they're in. _Conservatives are beyond tired of this sort of hyperbolic, politically-driven outrage from the woke mob._ And for too long, Republicans have sat down and taken these outrageous attacks on the chin. **Not anymore.** It's time to stand up to the perpetual outrage machine that drives the Left. _That's why I took to the floor. And it's why the world is starting to take notice._ Less than 24 hours after my speech, it has already been seen almost one million times. If you haven't had a chance to watch it for yourself, you can do so here on [Facebook](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=b5a3ff11c1ab47598f2175faf7cf582f&_e=4x3h7440ZRYLP3tyfxUys8XfFztFwRBO-Ux68y8bCppY_VT4XfiWIRHVODZwCCzfPuqxbXwHidllAeVHghkwaWKQbk-zNNkY2ouCD-RKD-iR3s7O5OglLwq0bmV0pk6pxEV9GgRIqyQOGW0bj7GUNycQ_rPbijiv9SVq2D7BQd9o-Uc1lhmKIglKyHAny2XYk-hC4kmCfnR-cTJXLnYvLzu7Zn8IYy3F0LH3Hk73pbbMPYzk1j1XBDkz8uMCiAmE6PQJBmDplWmXtJq-TAKeLQ%3D%3D), [Twitter](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=b5a3ff11c1ab47598f2175faf7cf582f&_e=4x3h7440ZRYLP3tyfxUysyD88ZYTqP4gtat49WKAb3GrS2bk7QMYBTp4qj2uMd-E8H8D2daex55TfnwyOR09iEty4AdEDoYCsrNPyyX_dIt9tkYElOKlKsgotjazBLuWO3iCIa_ohnvhM4K1PLi1iejyuGuEVNyTgBNXfQCup0QjTihgwNRJpXqWSqIjo-ZFF4OBeO565le_NMSA1W0W-4bWHNOHs_y3mMti07FYCdMpJeei6dWc7ZUKm4uZQ_54B4iaTNClEQed7jFsYyT60bOlHDc208MdrEg98topo2GGU1x2BSeDnwGZ90IU7lQ37gP11iC3vIxzVWgcqC7urg%3D%3D), or [YouTube](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=b5a3ff11c1ab47598f2175faf7cf582f&_e=4x3h7440ZRYLP3tyfxUys5ilyv6Y5VNuMC6NoG1q8ZR_OgZxh8rUozYCowjvUMEuVZUcoa85NM_Tn87c4VVgN-x1pkmOeD65slALbd_-0xUAUFFe4rgamTYjkSOCbm2VyoQkq52FCe7jv32g2JOV1F_miPM0734UdN1_2uObEij1ZwpLzWUtif2CG6a2ibsGoRCyCEFzlrF08GDvNGzkT3iQOYborfLTr-2Wm_wXFTMp9ZtT_HM-dn-c4pyhzrMHf1ndy3ft_Ss1ppfynIrTfw%3D%3D). And for those who have watched it, **I'll be on Sean Hannity tonight at 9:30 pm EST **to discuss my viral floor speech and how Republicans must start pushing back against character assassination, lies, and politically-driven perpetual outrage promoted by the Left and their allies. Now more than ever, we need the conservative movement to stand up to the woke mob. _I hope you will stand by me._ -Nick Freitas Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
